title: Practicante de Marketing
description:
About the job

Oportunidad de Prácticas Profesionales | Marketing




Se busca estudiante universitario(a) para integrarse como Practicante de Marketing y brindar apoyo al área en actividades operativas, analíticas y de seguimiento dentro de la industria farmacéutica.




Objetivo del puesto

Brindar soporte operativo, analítico y creativo al equipo de Marketing, colaborando en la implementación de estrategias de comunicación, promoción y posicionamiento de productos.




Responsabilidades

• Apoyar en la ejecución de campañas promocionales y actividades de marketing.

• Recopilar y analizar información de mercado, tendencias y competencia.

• Dar soporte en la organización y logística de eventos, lanzamientos y capacitaciones.

• Elaborar reportes y presentaciones para el área.

• Dar seguimiento a proyectos y estrategias de marketing.

• Apoyar en el control y seguimiento de presupuestos y órdenes de compra.

• Coordinar actividades con proveedores externos.




Requisitos

• Estudiante activo(a) de Mercadotecnia, Administración o carrera afín.

• Contar con 1.5 a 2 años para concluir la licenciatura.

• Manejo de Excel intermedio (indispensable).

• Inglés intermedio.

• Conocimiento de herramientas de análisis de datos (deseable).

• Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.

• Proactividad, actitud de servicio y sentido de urgencia.




Condiciones

• Duración inicial de 6 meses, con posibilidad de renovación.

• Esquema híbrido.

• Horario: Lunes a viernes de 8:00 a 14:00 hrs.

• Ubicación: Polanco, Ciudad de México.

title: Trainee Comercial & Marketing Digital
description:
About the job

🧠 Requisitos

Sin experiencia necesaria.

IMPORTANTE E INDISPENSABLE: Recién egresadas o interés en realizar prácticas profesionales en carreras de Marketing digital, Comercial, Relaciones internacionales, Negocios internacionales o afines.

Interés en áreas de ventas, marketing digital, inteligencia comercial o similar.

Habilidad para estructurar contenidos comerciales y diseñar materiales con impacto visual y estratégico.




🧩 Responsabilidades

Desarrollar e implementar estrategias de Sales Enablement alineadas con los objetivos comerciales de Turing-IA.

Diseñar y mantener materiales de soporte a ventas: presentaciones, one-pagers, casos de uso, guiones y kits comerciales.

Implementar dashboards de inteligencia comercial y marketing para monitorear oportunidades, ciclos de ventas y desempeño por vertical.

Colaborar estrechamente con el equipo comercial para identificar brechas de contenido, oportunidades de mejora y automatizaciones necesarias.

Generar y analizar reportes de campañas de marketing digital y acciones comerciales (ABM, inbound, email marketing).

Proponer iniciativas para mejorar la conversión de leads, ciclo de ventas y retención de clientes.

Apoyar en el entrenamiento de nuevos integrantes del equipo comercial y generación de playbooks internos.

Participar en la coordinación de lanzamientos de nuevos servicios, asegurando una narrativa clara, diferenciadora y basada en valor.

Realizar investigaciones de mercado y análisis competitivo para fortalecer el posicionamiento de la empresa.




🕐 Horario

Lunes a Jueves de 9:00 am a 7:00 pm (con 1.5 horas libres)

Viernes de 9:00 am a 5:00 pm (con 1 hora libre)




💡 Beneficios

Modalidad 100% remota

Aumentos salariales programados por desempeño

Apoyo a oficina en casa a partir del segundo mes

Bonos por productividad y cumplimiento de metas comerciales

Pago de días extras al doble

Día libre en tu cumpleaños

Acceso a capacitaciones en herramientas de trabajo (Tableau, GCP, HubSpot, etc.)

Oportunidad real de crecimiento a mediano y largo plazo

Clases de inglés

Participación en proyectos con impacto real y clientes relevantes

title: Especialista en marketing digital
skills: Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.
description:
About the job

Te frustra cuando una campaña se lanza y nadie sabe realmente si funcionó? 




A nosotros también.

Por eso estamos buscando un(a) Especialista en Marketing que vea más allá de los clics y las impresiones.

Alguien que entienda que detrás de cada campaña existe un negocio, un objetivo y una oportunidad de crecimiento.




Probablemente conectes con esta vacante si alguna vez has pensado:

💭 "¿Por qué estamos haciendo esto si nadie analizó los resultados anteriores?"

💭 "Hay mejores maneras de comunicar este mensaje."

💭 "Las métricas deberían servir para tomar decisiones, no para llenar reportes."

💭 "Me gustaría participar más en la estrategia y menos en la ejecución mecánica.




Lo que harás

Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.




Lo que valoramos

Más que años de experiencia, buscamos criterio.

Queremos personas que sepan hacer preguntas inteligentes, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones respaldadas por datos.

Porque para nosotros el marketing no se trata de lanzar anuncios.

Se trata de generar resultados.




📩 Si disfrutas combinar comunicación, estrategia y análisis, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

title: Growth Operations Intern
skills: Taking ownership of DiDi's growth in your region.
Build deep insights and understanding of the business and product features trough project management, stakeholder management, and be data driven ALWAYS.
Design and implement initiatives to improve business and product indicators, being able to leverage data for the decision-making process.
Optimize processes and strategies to improve efficiency and scalability.
Support the execution of high-impact growth initiatives across multiple markets.
Ensure collaboration with multiple stakeholders to improve operational productivity & user experience.
Partner cross-functionally with Strategy, Marketing, Product, and Data teams.
Balance attention to detail with swift execution - we need to do things quickly, and we need to do them well.
Balancing those can be challenging, but this should be our strength.
Partner cross-functionally with Strategy, Marketing, Product, and Data teams.
Balancing those can be challenging, but this should be our strength.
description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

Being part of the Operations team gives you a unique opportunity to help drive growth at one of the fastest-growing companies in the region. This data-driven role requires a rare combination of analytical thinking, consumer empathy, operational excellence, and strong interpersonal skills.

You will work closely with a high-performing team to launch, scale, and optimize DiDi’s business across Latin America. Be prepared for a fast-paced, dynamic, and highly challenging environment. There is never a dull moment!

In this role, you will constantly seek scalable solutions while overseeing critical growth initiatives across the business. Your analyses, processes, and projects will directly contribute to DiDi’s expansion and success in LATAM.

We believe in giving our team members a level of ownership and responsibility that is above and beyond the norm. From day one, you will have the autonomy to make an impact, contribute ideas, and drive strategic decisions that shape the future of the business.

In this role, you'll be... 


Taking ownership of DiDi's growth in your region.
Build deep insights and understanding of the business and product features trough project management, stakeholder management, and be data driven ALWAYS.
Design and implement initiatives to improve business and product indicators, being able to leverage data for the decision-making process. 
Optimize processes and strategies to improve efficiency and scalability.
Support the execution of high-impact growth initiatives across multiple markets.
Ensure collaboration with multiple stakeholders to improve operational productivity & user experience.
Partner cross-functionally with Strategy, Marketing, Product, and Data teams.
Balance attention to detail with swift execution - we need to do things quickly, and we need to do them well.
Balancing those can be challenging, but this should be our strength.

We're eager to be in touch because you have...

Currently enrolled Industrial Engineering, Economics, Business, Administation, Mathematic or such related field

Proficiency with Excel

Experience with data analysis tools such as Python, SQL (it's a plus)

Data driven decision making and strong analytical thinking.

Studies with data-based decision-making, exercising good judgment in ambiguous circumstances, and effectively communicating across a diverse team.

Abilities to have optimal communication with all stakeholders, follow up on the project, and deliver results.

Creative approaches to solve complex issues and use data driven thinking to back those ideas.

Proficiency in English & Spanish.

You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
Curious, proactive, and eager to learn.

Passion for marketing, healthcare, skincare, and consumer behavior.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

description:
About the job

About Puig




At Puig, we are a family-owned company with a long-term commitment to creativity, innovation, and people development. Through our Graduate Program, we are looking for exceptional young talent ready to begin their professional journey in a dynamic, international, and purpose-driven environment.




This is a unique opportunity to accelerate your career, gain exposure to a leading global organization, and contribute to the growth of prestigious dermatological brands that improve people's quality of life through science-backed skincare solutions.




Your Mission




As a Marketing Graduate (Entry Level) within our Derma Division, you will support the Marketing team in the development and execution of brand strategies, product launches, and commercial initiatives while gaining hands-on experience across multiple areas of the business.




You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Medical Affairs, Sales, Trade Marketing, Digital, and Finance, contributing to projects that have a direct impact on business performance and patient outcomes.




What You'll Do




• Support the planning, execution, and optimization of digital marketing campaigns across social media platforms, with a strong focus on TikTok and emerging digital channels.

• Assist in the creation, coordination, and publishing of engaging content aligned with brand strategies, consumer trends, and business objectives.

• Collaborate closely with the Digital & Marketing team to manage community engagement, monitor social conversations, and identify opportunities to increase brand relevance and reach.

• Support influencer and content creator initiatives, including campaign coordination, performance tracking, and reporting.

• Monitor digital KPIs and campaign performance, providing insights and recommendations to improve engagement, visibility, and business impact.

• Contribute to the development and management of a dedicated social media project aimed at healthcare professionals, helping create educational and scientifically relevant content for derma brands.

• Coordinate with Medical Visit and cross-functional teams to ensure content accuracy, compliance, and alignment with brand objectives.

• Assist in the preparation of presentations, reports, and business reviews related to digital performance, marketing initiatives, and key projects.

• Participate in local and global marketing projects, gaining exposure to brand management, consumer engagement, and omnichannel strategies.

• Provide support on ad hoc marketing initiatives, product launches, events, and special projects across the Derma division.




Who You Are

Recent graduate (Bachelor's degree completed within the last 1–2 years) in Marketing, Business Administration, Communication, Pharmaceutical Business, or related fields.
Previous internship, trainee, student leadership, or extracurricular experience is highly valued.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
Curious, proactive, and eager to learn.
Collaborative mindset and ability to work in diverse teams.
Passion for marketing, healthcare, skincare, and consumer behavior.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.




Requirements

Bachelor's degree completed by the start date.
Intermediate English proficiency (written and spoken).
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel and PowerPoint preferred).
Availability to work full-time.
Authorization to work in Mexico.




What We Offer

Participation in a global Graduate Program designed to accelerate your development.
Exposure to senior leaders and international projects.
Structured learning and development opportunities.
Mentorship and career guidance.
A collaborative, inclusive, and innovative culture.
Opportunity to build a long-term career within Puig.




Our Commitment

At Puig, we believe that diversity, equity, and inclusion drive innovation and creativity. We are committed to creating an environment where everyone can thrive, contribute, and grow.

Join us and help shape the future of dermatological skincare through science, innovation, and purpose. ✨

description:
About the job

BAT está evolucionando a gran velocidad hacia un negocio global multicategoría. Nuestro propósito es construir A Better Tomorrow™ creando un mundo sin humo.

Para lograr nuestra ambición, buscamos personas dispuestas a unirse a este viaje. ¡Tomorrow can’t wait, hagámoslo realidad juntos!

British American Tobacco México tiene una oportunidad emocionante como Paid Media Digital Marketing Intern en Monterrey, Nuevo León.

Tus responsabilidades incluirán 


Apoyar en la ejecución y optimización de campañas de Paid Media (Meta, Google, entre otros).
Analizar el desempeño de campañas y generar insights accionables.
Monitorear KPI’s clave (CTR, CPC, conversión rate,) y elaborar reportes.
Colaborar en pruebas A/B y mejoras continuas de campañas.
Trabajar de la mano con equipos internos (CRM, Social Media, entre otros).


¿Qué buscamos?


Estudiante activo de Marketing, con fecha de graduación posterior a Julio 2027.
Indispensable inglés intermedio a avanzado.
Manejo de Excel básico a intermedio.
Mentalidad analítica y afinidad por trabajar con datos y números 
Persona proactiva, con ganas de aprender y aportar ideas 
Organización y atención al detalle 


QUÉ TE OFRECEMOS?


Nuestra gama de beneficios varía según el país e incluye diversos planes de salud, iniciativas para conciliación entre el trabajo y la vida personal, apoyo para el transporte y días de vacaciones flexibles con incentivos adicionales
Tu crecimiento profesional con nosotros no tiene límites; Está impulsado por tus aspiraciones. Únete a BAT y forma parte de un entorno que fomenta el avance interno, donde la progresión de tu carrera no es solo una declaración de intenciones, es una realidad que estamos ansiosos por construir juntos. Aprovecha la oportunidad y toma las riendas de tu desarrollo; Tu próximo capítulo comienza aquí.
Tendrás acceso a plataformas de aprendizaje online y programas de crecimiento personalizados para nutrir tus habilidades de liderazgo
Priorizamos la mejora continua dentro de un entorno transformador, lo que nos prepara para el cambio constante. 


POR QUÉ UNIRTE A BAT?

Somos una de las pocas empresas nombradas como uno de los Mejores Empleadores Globales por el Instituto “Top Employers”, certificados por ofrecer excelentes condiciones laborales.

La colaboración, la inclusión y la asociación son la base de todo lo que hacemos en BAT. Nuestra finalidad es permitir que cada individuo prospere, independientemente de su género, orientación sexual, estado civil o de pareja, reasignación de género, raza, religión o creencia, color, nacionalidad, origen étnico o nacional, discapacidad, edad, habilidades, experiencia, educación, antecedentes socioeconómicos y profesionales, estado de veterano, perspectivas y formas de pensar. Sabemos que abrazar todo tipo de talento es lo que nos hace más fuertes y mejor preparados para cumplir nuestros objetivos comerciales.

Consideramos las pausas en la carrera profesional como oportunidades, no obstáculos. A través del programa Global Returners, apoyamos a profesionales que buscan reiniciar sus carreras después de una ausencia prolongada en el mercado laboral (por ejemplo, tiempo dedicado al cuidado de la familia, permisos parentales, servicio nacional, sabático y/o inicio de un propio emprendimiento).

Ven, aporta tu diferencia y descubre todas las posibilidades que tenemos para ti en BAT. Obtén más información sobre nuestra cultura y nuestra galardonada experiencia laboral aquí.

Si necesitas ajustes razonables o acuerdos para ayudarte a rendir al máximo durante el proceso de selección, te animamos a que nos lo notifiques. Estamos totalmente comprometidos a apoyarte para que puedas demostrar todo tu potencial.

description:
About the job

Marketing Intern |

Location: Carr. a Colombia S/N-KM 6, Sin Nombre de Col 13, Gral. Escobedo, N.L. 66050, Mexico.

Make sure your first professional steps are within a Global and Inclusive Company.

We are proactively looking for students interested in developing high-impact projects while pursuing their university degree.

At Cummins (https://www.cummins.com?utm\_source=chatgpt.com) , you will work alongside highly innovative thinkers, technology leaders, and within a diverse and inclusive environment to make meaningful contributions to the business, our customers, our communities, and the world. You will have all the resources and support you need from our teams and leaders for your professional career development, as well as support in achieving an optimal work-life balance aligned with your individual needs and aspirations.

You’ll be amazed at what we can accomplish together!

We Offer


Monthly scholarship/stipend.
Meal and transportation allowance.
Professional development.


What We Expect From You


 Integrity: do what you say you are going to do, and do it correctly.
 Diversity and Inclusion: valuing and including our differences in decision-making is our competitive advantage.
 Caring for Others: demonstrating awareness and consideration for people’s well-being.
 Excellence: consistently delivering results beyond expectations.
 Teamwork: collaborating across teams, departments, segments, and borders to achieve the best results.


To be considered as an intern at Cummins Mexico, you must remain enrolled through your university for the entire internship period. Please review your enrollment dates carefully.

Our policy seeks to provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified individuals regardless of race, sex, color, disability, national origin, age, religion, union affiliation, sexual orientation, veteran status, citizenship, gender identity and/or expression, or any other status protected by law.

If you need any reasonable accommodation related to a health condition or disability, please let us know. Your experience with us matters.

If you are interested in becoming part of Cummins, complete your registration!

Application link: https://forms.cloud.microsoft/r/7a3cTRrtXb

Pecific Information About The Area

The Marketing area aims to provide strategic and operational support to commercial and product initiatives through brand promotion and the development of actions that help drive sales. Main activities include advertising, events, social media, email marketing, sales incentive activities, and management of the department’s budget. The main interface areas are Sales and Product teams, with whom close collaboration is maintained to support business priorities and execute marketing initiatives.

description:
About the job

Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual! 🚀




💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 🎯 Paid Search & Social Role | 🏆 Award-Winning Agency Culture




Veta Virtual is hiring a Paid Search & Social Specialist for a high-growth client in the Digital Marketing industry — an award-winning agency specializing in the automotive vertical, recognized as Best Large SEO Agency and winner of Best Low Budget PPC Campaign at the 2024 US Search Awards. This is a learning-forward role for someone curious, resourceful, and ready to run real campaigns that push what is possible.




🔑 Your Role:




You will manage and optimize paid search and social campaigns for automotive dealership clients — trained and mentored by top specialists while taking real ownership of results. Your day-to-day will involve:




Managing and optimizing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns — delivering higher ROI and lower cost per conversion for automotive dealership clients.
Conducting daily account audits, budget pacing, and campaign adjustments to keep performance on track and spend optimized.
Generating performance reports from Google Ads and Meta — and conducting client calls to present strategies and results clearly and confidently.
Managing OEM reimbursement processes — reviewing requirements, gathering materials, and submitting claims accurately and on time.
Using Google Analytics, Data Studio, Tag Manager, Merchant Center, and Meta Ads Manager to analyze data and drive campaign improvements.
Collaborating with SEOs, writers, and designers on new experiments and client work — contributing to a team that tests, learns, and pushes boundaries daily.




✅ What You'll Need:




1+ year of hands-on Google Ads experience — able to build, manage, and optimize paid search campaigns confidently.
1+ year of Meta Ads experience — proficient in Facebook and Instagram campaign setup, targeting, and optimization inside Ads Manager.
Working knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Data Studio, Google Ads Editor, Google Tag Manager, and Google Merchant Center.
Prior agency experience — you understand client management, reporting, and the pace of agency work.
Detail-oriented, research-driven, and a strong communicator in written and spoken English.
Bonus: automotive vertical experience, OEM reimbursement knowledge, or campaigns you can show us with real results.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:




💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 Direct mentorship from top paid media specialists — real room to grow and own your campaigns inside a fast-moving agency.
🏆 A high-performance, collaborative culture where testing, learning, and pushing boundaries are part of daily life.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client where curiosity is rewarded and your growth is taken seriously from day one.




Ready to Apply?




If you are ready to run real campaigns, learn from the best, and grow inside one of the most innovative digital marketing agencies in the automotive space — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual!




Once you apply, you will complete a short 2-minute video question — come ready to tell us about campaigns you have run and results you have driven. We can't wait to meet you!

title: ESTUDIANTES DE MERCADOTECNIA, COMUNICACIONES Y ADMINISTRACION DE EMPRESAS
company: LumiQ - Gabinete de Negocios en México
skills: 2. Llenar una ficha de participación.
description:
About the job

¿Eres una persona convencida de que el aporte profesionales establece base para el crecimiento y desarrollo empresarial? 

¿Estás dispuesto(a) a participar con nosotros para encontrar formas creativas y positivas de inspirar a otros a mejorar? 

Si es así ¡te estamos buscando!!







Deseamos estudiantes curiosos, proactivos y comprometidos, que reconozcan que el éxito de los demás es su éxito y sobre todo que busquen vivenciar lo que están aprendiendo.







NUESTRA LABOR BUSCA:




1. Reconectar a las nuevas generaciones con la empresa, de una forma distinta.

2. Brindar herramientas a los participantes para que descubran y ejerzan su poder como agentes de mejora ante el sector empresarial.







¿EN QUÉ CONSISTE EL VOLUNTARIADO EMPRESARIAL INTERNACIONAL?




Se entiende por ello, el conjunto de actividades desarrolladas SIN FINES DE LUCRO, EN FORMA GRATUITA Y SIN VÍNCULO NI RESPONSABILIDAD CONTRACTUAL, POR UN GRUPO DE ESTUDIANTES DE BUENA VOLUNTAD, DISPUESTOS A APOYAR DESINTERESADAMENTE en la búsqueda de mejoras de los sistemas de gestión en las empresas.







¿ES UNA LABOR A TIEMPO COMPLETO?




NO...La realizas de acuerdo a tu disponibilidad (No hay imposición de horarios)




¿ES PRESENCIAL?




No…Las labores se ejecutan por medio de la plataforma de zoom y las coordinaciones por medio del WhatsApp. 




¿CUÁL ES LA FUNCIÓN QUE DEBO CUMPLIR?




1. Compartir los conocimientos que más te apasionan con quienes lo requieren (Empresarios y emprendedores de Latinoamérica y el caribe)

2. Diseñar y ejecutar un plan orientado a establecer mejoras en la gestión de las empresas, 

3. Entre otros.




¿QUÉ ES LO QUE OFRECEN AL ESTUDIANTE?




1. Empoderamiento para el desarrollo de las actividades propuestas.

2. Integración a un equipo internacional multidisciplinario.

3. Soporte de recursos para la realización de las actividades.

4. Constancias internacionales por participar en el programa.

5. Participación en el desarrollo de acciones de mejora empresarial 100% reales.




¿QUÉ DEBO HACER PARA PARTICIPAR EN EL VOLUNTARIADO EMPRESARIAL INTERNACIONAL?




1. Hacernos llegar tu CV.

2. Llenar una ficha de participación.

description:
About the job

Join Our Team at TalentPop App as an Influencer Marketing Specialist!

At TalentPop App, we're on a mission to transform the digital landscape through impactful influencer partnerships. We're looking for an innovative and strategic Influencer Marketing Specialist with strong marketing experience to help shape the future of e-commerce. If you're passionate about influencer marketing, skilled in executing high-impact campaigns, and eager to make a real impact, this is the perfect opportunity for you!

Why You'll Love This Role

You’ll be at the forefront of developing and executing marketing strategies that leverage influencers to build brand awareness, drive engagement, and boost conversions. As part of our team, your creativity, strategic thinking, and results-driven approach will directly contribute to our growth and success.

What You'll Do


Develop Strategies: Create influencer marketing plans that align with overall marketing objectives, brand goals, and measurable KPIs.
Source Talent: Identify and engage influencers who resonate with our brand, target audience, and campaign goals.
Build Partnerships: Cultivate and maintain strong, professional relationships with influencers, agencies, and brand partners.
Oversee Campaigns: Manage campaign timelines, content creation, and deliverables in collaboration with influencers and the marketing team.
Ensure Quality: Provide creative direction and review influencer content to ensure it aligns with brand identity and campaign messaging.
Analyze & Report: Use analytics tools to measure performance, generate reports, and optimize future marketing initiatives.
Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with social media, content, and paid marketing teams to ensure campaigns integrate seamlessly into broader marketing efforts.


What We're Looking For


At least 1 year of proven experience in influencer marketing, with a solid background in broader marketing campaigns.
Exceptional relationship-building, negotiation, and communication skills.
In-depth understanding of social media platforms, influencer trends, digital marketing strategies, and audience engagement tactics.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret performance data and translate insights into actionable strategies.
A creative and passionate mindset for digital marketing, brand storytelling, and campaign innovation.


Tech Requirements


Personally owned PC or laptop with sufficient processing power.
Reliable internet connection with a minimum of 25 Mbps for both upload and download speed.


Perks And Benefits


Permanent remote work setup, giving you the flexibility to work from anywhere.
HMO coverage or a health stipend to support your health and well-being.
Performance bonuses to reward your hard work and success.
Generous Paid Time Off (PTO) to rest and recharge.
Opportunities for professional growth and development within a dynamic and supportive environment at TalentPop App.


Special Instruction

For us to prioritize your application for the Influencer Marketing Specialist role, please enter code INFL26 when asked.

At TalentPop App, we’re not just hiring; we’re building a team of passionate, innovative individuals who will drive the future of e-commerce. If you’re ready to make a real impact and take your marketing career to the next level, apply now!

title: SEO Specialist
skills: Driving organic traffic growth through on-page SEO, advanced keyword research, technical optimizations, and site structure improvements that produce measurable ranking results.
Using GA, GSC, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, and GBP to evaluate rankings, diagnose issues, and turn data into clear action plans.
Implementing internal linking, keyword cannibalization diagnoses, competitor analyses, website audits, and Local SEO and GEO strategies — including AI Overview and LLM visibility tactics.
Experimenting with new SEO approaches, challenging the status quo, and contributing to a team culture built on testing and evidence-based thinking.
Working directly with clients — communicating findings clearly and recommending the best path forward even when it challenges their assumptions.
3+ years of hands-on SEO experience — with demonstrated, proven ability to rank pages and websites. Theoretical knowledge is great but this team wants real results.
2+ years of client-facing agency experience — you manage expectations, communicate SEO concepts clearly, and uncover the real need behind every request.
Advanced proficiency with GA, GSC, GBP, Ahrefs, SEMrush, and Screaming Frog.
Ability to execute both short and long-term SEO strategies — and thrive in the uncertainty of an ever-changing algorithm landscape.
Strong analytical and independent problem-solving skills — you find patterns where others see noise.
Bonus: own website experience, digital PR or link building, WordPress/CMS, basic HTML/CSS, automotive or local SEO background.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.
💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 True ownership over strategy and execution — freedom to experiment and prove your ideas in a team that rewards curiosity over convention.
🏆 A collaborative, high-growth culture with access to SEO conferences, continuous learning, and a team that genuinely invests in making you better.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client with a clear path to growth from day one.
description:
About the job

Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual!




💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 📈 Real SEO Ownership | 🏆 Award-Winning Agency Culture




Veta Virtual is hiring an SEO Specialist for a high-growth client in the Digital Marketing industry — an award-winning SEO agency specializing in the automotive vertical with a track record of 70%+ organic traffic increases within six months. This is not a checklist role. It is a thinking role built for someone who is analytical, curious, and proves results rather than theorizing about them.




🔑 Your Role:




You will have true ownership over strategy and execution for automotive client accounts — with the freedom to experiment, challenge assumptions, and see the direct impact of your work on real rankings and traffic growth. Your day-to-day will involve:




Driving organic traffic growth through on-page SEO, advanced keyword research, technical optimizations, and site structure improvements that produce measurable ranking results.
Using GA, GSC, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, and GBP to evaluate rankings, diagnose issues, and turn data into clear action plans.
Implementing internal linking, keyword cannibalization diagnoses, competitor analyses, website audits, and Local SEO and GEO strategies — including AI Overview and LLM visibility tactics.
Experimenting with new SEO approaches, challenging the status quo, and contributing to a team culture built on testing and evidence-based thinking.
Working directly with clients — communicating findings clearly and recommending the best path forward even when it challenges their assumptions.




✅ What You'll Need:




3+ years of hands-on SEO experience — with demonstrated, proven ability to rank pages and websites. Theoretical knowledge is great but this team wants real results.
2+ years of client-facing agency experience — you manage expectations, communicate SEO concepts clearly, and uncover the real need behind every request.
Advanced proficiency with GA, GSC, GBP, Ahrefs, SEMrush, and Screaming Frog.
Ability to execute both short and long-term SEO strategies — and thrive in the uncertainty of an ever-changing algorithm landscape.
Strong analytical and independent problem-solving skills — you find patterns where others see noise.
Bonus: own website experience, digital PR or link building, WordPress/CMS, basic HTML/CSS, automotive or local SEO background.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:




💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 True ownership over strategy and execution — freedom to experiment and prove your ideas in a team that rewards curiosity over convention.
🏆 A collaborative, high-growth culture with access to SEO conferences, continuous learning, and a team that genuinely invests in making you better.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client with a clear path to growth from day one.




Ready to Apply?




If you are ready to own real SEO results, experiment boldly, and grow with one of the most innovative digital marketing teams in the automotive space — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual. 




Once you apply, you will complete a short 2-minute video question — come ready to show us pages you have ranked. Proof of concept matters here. We can't wait to meet you!

title: SEM Senior Associate
skills: Build and manage paid search campaigns, creating new campaigns and optimizing existing ones to meet client performance goals.
Analyze and optimize campaign performance on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis, using data-driven insights to identify and act on opportunities for improvement.
Execute and oversee search marketing campaigns, including ad group setup, keyword research and expansion, budget pacing, forecasting, and performance reporting.
Test and refine campaign strategies, driving continuous improvement through creative testing and performance analysis.
Contribute to budget management, monitoring spend across accounts and making recommendations to maximize results.
Create and maintain detailed performance reports, pulling data from search platforms and additional sources to provide actionable insights.
Stay informed on SEM industry trends, assessing their impact on clients and making proactive recommendations.
Leverage PMG’s proprietary technology platform, Alli, to analyze data, streamline processes, and drive impactful results for clients.
3+ years of experience in paid search, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.
Advanced knowledge of paid search platforms like Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, enabling you to create and optimize campaigns that deliver measurable results.
Proficiency in campaign management, including keyword research, campaign, budget pacing, and forecasting to meet performance goals.
Expertise in analyzing performance metrics and delivering actionable insights to enhance campaign outcomes.
Experience with A/B testing methodologies and creative testing to refine strategies and drive continuous improvement.
Proficiency in tools like Microsoft Excel, Google Analytics, and SQL to manage data, uncover valuable insights, and create clear, actionable performance reports.
Strong organizational and collaborative skills, enabling you to align efforts across internal teams and clients effectively.

A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a continual learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a customer-focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value.
A dedication to people-focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by leading by example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel.
Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support.
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones.
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events.
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching.
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses.
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography.
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances.
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being.
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available.
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus.
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities.
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety.
description:
About the job

We are PMG

Named Ad Age Best Places to Work for 11 years in a row and Fast Company Best Workplaces for Innovators since 2022, PMG is a global independent marketing services and technology company that seeks to inspire people and brands that anything is possible. Driven by shared success, PMG leverages business strategy and transformation, creative, media, and insights—as well as its proprietary operating system, Alli—to deliver cutting-edge digital solutions and innovative media strategies.

Our team comprises over 900 employees globally, and our work for ambitious brands like Apple, Nike, Sephora, Experian, Therabody, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, Creed Fragrances, BNY, Intuit, CKE Restaurants, Travelex, and Whole Foods spans 85+ countries.

Professional proficiency in written and spoken English is required, including for resume submission and interviews.

Who You Will Be Working With

At PMG, our Paid Search Marketing (SEM) team is a group of creative problem solvers and strategic thinkers who thrive on helping clients achieve meaningful results. We collaborate with cross-functional teams across media strategy, analytics, and creative to develop innovative paid search campaigns that make a tangible impact.

Our team approaches search marketing with curiosity and a fresh perspective, constantly exploring new solutions and opportunities to deliver value for our clients. We pride ourselves on creating an environment where everyone can grow professionally and personally, supported by a culture that values collaboration, innovation, and individuality.

As an SEM Senior Associate, you’ll play a critical role in shaping campaign performance, managing client goals, and contributing to broader strategic initiatives. If you’re passionate about digital marketing and enjoy solving challenges in a fast-paced environment, we’d love to welcome you to our team.

What You Will Do


Build and manage paid search campaigns, creating new campaigns and optimizing existing ones to meet client performance goals. 
Analyze and optimize campaign performance on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis, using data-driven insights to identify and act on opportunities for improvement. 
Execute and oversee search marketing campaigns, including ad group setup, keyword research and expansion, budget pacing, forecasting, and performance reporting. 
Test and refine campaign strategies, driving continuous improvement through creative testing and performance analysis. 
Contribute to budget management, monitoring spend across accounts and making recommendations to maximize results. 
Create and maintain detailed performance reports, pulling data from search platforms and additional sources to provide actionable insights. 
Stay informed on SEM industry trends, assessing their impact on clients and making proactive recommendations. 
Leverage PMG’s proprietary technology platform, Alli, to analyze data, streamline processes, and drive impactful results for clients. 


What You Will Bring


3+ years of experience in paid search, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience. 
Advanced knowledge of paid search platforms like Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, enabling you to create and optimize campaigns that deliver measurable results. 
Proficiency in campaign management, including keyword research, campaign, budget pacing, and forecasting to meet performance goals. 
Expertise in analyzing performance metrics and delivering actionable insights to enhance campaign outcomes. 
Experience with A/B testing methodologies and creative testing to refine strategies and drive continuous improvement. 
Proficiency in tools like Microsoft Excel, Google Analytics, and SQL to manage data, uncover valuable insights, and create clear, actionable performance reports. 
Strong organizational and collaborative skills, enabling you to align efforts across internal teams and clients effectively. 
A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a continual learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a customer-focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value. 
A dedication to people-focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by leading by example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel. 


What We Offer


Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support. 
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones. 
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events. 
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching. 
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses. 
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography. 
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances. 
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being. 
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available. 
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus. 
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities. 
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety. 


Benefits vary by country, location, and geography to reflect local laws, norms, and expectations.

What Sets Us Apart

Being part of PMG means joining a company culture that’s unmatched in digital. We're dedicated to working hard to serve our employees and clients, delivering value, results, and innovation—which often requires true grit and agility. We believe in taking care of ourselves and each other to continuously improve in every way.

In alignment with our core values to be inclusive and always change for the better, PMG is committed to creating a more diverse and inclusive culture, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe that we only change for the better by bringing diverse perspectives to our company. PMG recruits, employs, trains, compensates, and promotes regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

title: Marketing Manager Growth & Product
skills: Leading marketing growth and product strategy connecting the business ambition with the brand vision based on analytical and strategic thinking, including development of goals, approach, strategic definition and plan.
Bring innovative marketing ideas to the table, and best in class strategic initiatives, obtaining buy-in and efficiently implementing them at scale through marketing programs.
Business driven mindset defining strategic plans and actions to increase market share.
Use internal and external data to find relevant insights that transform into effective Brand insights, campaigns and content.
Drive research recommendations, and discussions to find sources of growth around the product, user value proposition and market expansion.
Translate high-level strategy and positioning into concrete deliverables (campaign blueprints, messaging frameworks, value propositions, etc.)
Develop marketing campaigns; providing input into media plans, key messaging RTBs and strategic briefs.
Develop campaign reporting crossing business results with brand results to find sources of growth for user value creation based on learnings and optimizations.
Develop enablement materials (Toolkits, playbooks) to scale new developments/learnings and help drive brand consistency and market penetration.
Remain fully informed on market trends and marketing brand campaigns.
6+ years of relevant experience developing marketing strategy and plan at a regional level.
Strong stakeholder management and leadership influencing teams.
Knowledge in product marketing, inapp campaigns and go to marketing strategies.
Fast learner; ability to manage competing priorities and operate effectively in a matrixed organization / fast-paced environment
Understands the “why” and applies critical thinking and strategic reasoning to decision making.
Experience in Brand and business KPIs analysis
Experience with in-app and 360 campaigns
Be able to work under constant deadline pressure and manage multiple projects.
You are fluent in English.
description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

In this role, you will lead marketing growth and product strategy, connecting business ambition with brand vision through data-driven and strategic thinking. You will define clear goals and plans that drive market share growth and user value.

You will develop and scale innovative marketing initiatives, translating insights into strong brand strategies, campaigns, and messaging frameworks. With a business-driven mindset, you will use internal and external data to identify growth opportunities across product, value proposition, and market expansion.

You will turn high-level strategy into concrete execution—campaign blueprints, briefs, media inputs, and RTBs—while tracking performance across brand and business metrics to optimize impact. You will also create toolkits and playbooks to scale learnings, ensure brand consistency, and stay ahead of market and consumer trends.

In this role, you'll be...


Leading marketing growth and product strategy connecting the business ambition with the brand vision based on analytical and strategic thinking, including development of goals, approach, strategic definition and plan. 
Bring innovative marketing ideas to the table, and best in class strategic initiatives, obtaining buy-in and efficiently implementing them at scale through marketing programs. 
Business driven mindset defining strategic plans and actions to increase market share. 
Use internal and external data to find relevant insights that transform into effective Brand insights, campaigns and content. 
Drive research recommendations, and discussions to find sources of growth around the product, user value proposition and market expansion. 
Translate high-level strategy and positioning into concrete deliverables (campaign blueprints, messaging frameworks, value propositions, etc.)
Develop marketing campaigns; providing input into media plans, key messaging RTBs and strategic briefs.
Develop campaign reporting crossing business results with brand results to find sources of growth for user value creation based on learnings and optimizations. 
Develop enablement materials (Toolkits, playbooks) to scale new developments/learnings and help drive brand consistency and market penetration.
Remain fully informed on market trends and marketing brand campaigns.



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


6+ years of relevant experience developing marketing strategy and plan at a regional level. 
Strong stakeholder management and leadership influencing teams. 
Knowledge in product marketing, inapp campaigns and go to marketing strategies. 
Fast learner; ability to manage competing priorities and operate effectively in a matrixed organization / fast-paced environment
Understands the “why” and applies critical thinking and strategic reasoning to decision making. 
Experience in Brand and business KPIs analysis 
Experience with in-app and 360 campaigns
Be able to work under constant deadline pressure and manage multiple projects.
You are fluent in English. 



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

title: RSNA Expert - Marketing Specialist
description:
About the job

Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Overseas Exhibition Project Manager to oversee the comprehensive management of the entire process for international exhibitions, including the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) annual meeting. This role will lead exhibition planning, execution, vendor coordination, and client relationship management to ensure optimal brand presentation and participation outcomes at international events. Additionally, this position will serve as a key liaison for the company's digital accounts, collaborating closely with the marketing team to effectively convert offline exhibition traffic into online digital assets.




Position Responsibilities:

1. Exhibition Project Management (RSNA & Overseas Exhibitions)

· Manage the full lifecycle of planning and execution for the RSNA annual meeting and other overseas exhibitions, including booth reservation, exhibit material shipping, construction plan coordination, and on-site services.

· Maintain efficient communication with venues, external suppliers (construction, logistics, service providers) to ensure the smooth execution of all exhibition phases.

· Develop and manage project timelines and quality standards, ensuring critical milestones are met on schedule.

· Oversee on-site operations during exhibitions, including construction supervision, activity execution, and emergency handling.

· Possess thorough knowledge of RSNA rules and regulations to ensure exhibition behavior complies with organizer requirements and mitigates compliance risks.

2. Supplier and Budget Management

· Participate in the tendering, evaluation, and selection process for service suppliers (construction, logistics, PR, etc.), managing the Request for Proposals (RFP) process.

· Prepare and monitor exhibition project budgets, including booth fees, construction costs, shipping, travel expenses, etc., ensuring expenditures stay within budget and identifying cost-saving opportunities.

· Responsible for reviewing, archiving, and ensuring compliance for all exhibition-related contracts.

3. Client Relations and Sales Support

· Maintain efficient communication with exhibitors, providing professional services and on-site support.

· Nurture existing client relationships, identify potential client needs, and assist the sales team with registration and administrative processes.

· Collaborate with the digital marketing team to ensure sales leads generated during exhibitions are effectively entered into the CRM system (e.g., Salesforce) for data integration.

4. Cross-Cultural Communication & International Coordination

· Navigate cross-regional and cross-cultural work environments, building strong collaborative relationships with overseas organizers, service providers, and partners.

· Adapt to overseas travel requirements, leading teams to participate in RSNA and other international exhibitions, providing on-site support and problem-solving.

· Coordinate with internal departments (Marketing, Sales, Product, etc.) to ensure exhibition objectives align with the company's overall strategy.

5. Documentation and Reporting

· Organize, archive, and manage exhibition-related documents, including participation contracts, service agreements, and exhibition materials.

· Regularly prepare comprehensive post-exhibition summary reports, including effectiveness evaluation, ROI analysis, and recommendations for improvement

· Monitor industry trends and exhibition developments, providing data-driven insights and optimization suggestions for the company's exhibition strategy.




Required Skills & Education:

1. Education Background

· Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in International Business, Exhibition Management, Marketing, or a related field.

2. Work Experience

· Minimum 3 years of project management experience specifically with overseas exhibitions, having successfully led the preparation and execution of multiple international events.

· Experience with RSNA or other major medical/professional international exhibitions is highly preferred.

· Experience in domestic and international exhibition organization is preferred.

3. Professional Skills

· Proficient in the full cycle of exhibition project management, including planning, execution, and evaluation.

· Familiar with international trade practices and characteristics of overseas markets, possessing strong negotiation skills.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Asana).

· Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) is a plus.

· Experience in financial modeling and budget management is an advantage.

4. Language Ability

· Fluent in English with excellent listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills, capable of using English as a working language for business communication with international partners.

· Overseas work or study background is highly preferred.

5. Core Competencies

· Excellent communication, coordination, and execution skills, capable of building and maintaining strong collaborative relationships across departments and international teams.

· Strong project and time management skills, able to handle multiple tasks and emergencies simultaneously.

· High sense of responsibility and strong ability to work under pressure, adaptable to overseas travel and the high-intensity pace of exhibition work.

· Strong learning agility and market insight, capable of quickly grasping industry dynamics.

· Customer-oriented mindset with attention to detail and a pursuit of excellence in the industry’s exhibition experience.




Carestream is an Equal Opportunity Employer

Carestream is an equal opportunity organization. We recruit, employ, train, compensate, and promote withoutregard to race, religion, creed, color, national origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status,disability, veteran status, or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state or local law.

Applying for a job with Carestream

All applicants must complete the on-line application process.

Familiarity with social and digital platforms (e.g., LinkedIn, YouTube, basic CMS tools) and their asset requirements.
Familiar with AI generation tools.
While performing the duties of this job, the team member is regularly required to talk and hear.
The team member frequently is required to sit; have flexible use of hands; reach with hands and arms; and stoop, kneel, crouch, or crawl.
The team member is occasionally required to stand, walk, and taste or smell.
The team member must regularly lift and/or move up to 10 pounds and occasionally lift and/or move up to 25 - 50 pounds.
Specific vision abilities required by this job include close vision, distance vision, color vision, peripheral vision, depth perception, and the ability to adjust focus.
General office environment
Expected in office at minimum 3 days/week and moving towards 5 days/week.
description:
About the job

Please note: All resumes must be submitted in English, as the hiring process will be conducted in English.




SUMMARY

We are seeking a Marketing Communications Designer to create compelling, visual storytelling that supports Kids2’s in-market launches, marketing communications and B2B efforts. This role will focus on designing digital and video assets that help our global teams tell a cohesive Kids2 enterprise story - elevating our brands, capabilities, and partnerships with retailers and other key stakeholders. In-market retail product launch experience in Mexico is a must!

The ideal candidate combines strong digital design skills and storytelling. They can translate complex ideas into clear, engaging visuals and are comfortable working across presentations, social/digital content, and short-form video.

This highly cross-functional role partners closely with Category, Social, Marketing, Communications, Sales, E-commerce, and Creative teams to ensure storytelling reflects a shared direction.

The ideal candidate is creative, collaborative, and detail-oriented, with a passion for global brand storytelling. They bring ideas to life through thoughtful design and development, and possess excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.




PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES AND ESSENTIAL FUNCTIONS:

Develop in-market retail product launch campaign and design all marketing materials
Support at-large marketing campaigns including B2B and corporate focused visuals (newsletters, PPT, campaign graphics, etc.) and social media
Edit and produce short-form video content that supports:
Sales storytelling (sell-in videos)
Social
Corporate and brand narrative (company story, capabilities, milestones)
Collaborate closely with Category, Social, Marketing, Communications, Sales, E-commerce, and Creative teams to understand objectives and translate them into effective visual communications that tell Kids2 enterprise strategy in compelling, insight-led narratives that connect our purpose, brands and products into a cohesive story.
Adapt existing creative and footage into new formats, cuts, and specs for different channels, audiences, and retailers.
Maintain organized libraries of visual assets, templates, and footage for reuse and consistency.
Manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment, proactively communicating status and timing.
Partner with key stakeholders to ensure communications support promotional calendars, key moments, and creative assets.
Develop copy and visuals that bring collaborations, launches, milestones, and initiatives to life.




QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE 

Proof of developing, designing and executing in-market retail product launch campaign in Mexico.
4-6 years of experience in marketing communications (B2B, corporate, Sales support, and/or MarCom)
Excellent Spanish and English written skills and strong command of verbal communication.
Familiarity with social media tools and platforms.
Familiarity with marketing and design platforms.
Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, with proven ability to create visually engaging marketing materials and tools.
Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines.
Collaborative team player comfortable working across departments.
Passion for global brand storytelling and helping partners express and extend the brand authentically and creatively.
Ability to deal with changing environments, tight timelines and multiple projects.
Ability to execute and excel in high-paced organization.
Team player mindset with a high level of energy and enthusiasm.




EDUCATION & SKILLS 

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Graphic Design, Digital Design, related field.
Strong communication, organizational, and design skills.
Exceptional attention to detail and ability to synthesize direction into compelling stories and stories.
Creative mindset with an understanding of marketing storytelling across digital and partner channels.
Fluency in English and Spanish (written and verbal). Additional languages a plus.
Portfolio demonstrating strong digital design (presentations, social, web, B2B/corporate) and video/motion work.
Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign

Premiere Pro and After Effects

Strong proficiency in Microsoft PowerPoint; able to create elevated, on-brand decks for Sales and leadership.
Solid understanding of digital production standards (RGB vs. CMYK, resolution, file formats, platform specs).
Excellent visual storytelling, layout, and typography skills.
Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple, fast-turn projects.
Collaborative team player with strong communication skills and a proactive mindset.




CERTIFICATES, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONS

No specific certifications required.




COMPUTER/TECHNICAL SKILLS

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite.
Working knowledge of Canva
Proficient in Mac OS.
Adobe Creative Cloud: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Acrobat.
Microsoft Office Suite: PowerPoint, Word, Excel, Outlook.
Familiarity with social and digital platforms (e.g., LinkedIn, YouTube, basic CMS tools) and their asset requirements.

PHYSICAL DEMANDS

WORK ENVIRONMENT

description:
About the job

We are Reckitt

Home to the world's best loved and trusted hygiene, health, and nutrition brands. Our purpose defines why we exist: to protect, heal and nurture in the relentless pursuit of a cleaner, healthier world. We are a global team united by this purpose. Join us in our fight to make access to the highest quality hygiene, wellness, and nourishment a right and not a privilege.

Sales

Our Sales teams help to deliver Reckitt's purpose by building shared success with our customers, making access to the highest quality hygiene, wellness, and nourishment possible in-stores and online. Within Sales, we're focused on achieving outperformance across all of our channels, operating in highly competitive categories. This focus results in a dynamic, fast paced environment where cross functional teams are encouraged to collaborate to achieve success. We have around 10,000 sales people across the world, within market roles and ranging in areas like Field Sales, Key Accounts, Trade Marketing and Category Development.

About The Role

Dive into the dynamic world of trade marketing with Reckitt and be at the forefront of driving growth and elevating brand presence. As a Channel, you will build and execute go-to-market strategies that resonate with our trade channels and customers. This role is your opportunity to bring creativity and analytics together, influencing sales and creating lasting impacts on the market. Embrace the opportunity to leave a distinctive mark on our business, driving both our growth and yours.

Your responsibilities


 Solid background in trade marketing, sales or marketing with a proven track record of crafting compelling trade strategies.
 Insight driven with a strong understanding of trade channels and consumer behaviour.
 Excellent ability to analyse data and translate it into actionable strategies.
 Creative thinker with a results-driven mindset and ability to adapt to market shifts. - Effective communicator and influencer, adept at stakeholder engagement and negotiation.
 Proficient in using Syndicated Data (e.g., Nielsen / IRI) and tools such as Excel, PowerPoint, and relevant category management software.


The experience we're looking for


 Solid background in trade marketing, sales or marketing with a proven track record of crafting compelling trade strategies.
 Insight driven with a strong understanding of trade channels and consumer behaviour.
 Excellent ability to analyse data and translate it into actionable strategies.
 Creative thinker with a results-driven mindset and ability to adapt to market shifts. - Effective communicator and influencer, adept at stakeholder engagement and negotiation.
 Proficient in using Syndicated Data (e.g., Nielsen / IRI) and tools such as Excel, PowerPoint, and relevant category management software.


The skills for success

Trade Marketing, Field sales; Field sales management, Ecommerce, Analysing sales and Ecommerce data, Leadership skills, Consumer Insights; Shopper Insights; Customer Insights; Category Analysis, Collaboration and partnership skills; Influencing, Consultative Selling, Customer strategy; Channel strategy, Sales strategy development, Perform product planning, financial accumen, commercial accumen, Sales negotiation, P&L Management, Strategy Execution, Operational Excellence.

What we offer

With inclusion at the heart of everything we do, working alongside our four global Employee Resource Groups, we support our people at every step of their career journey, helping them to succeed in their own individual way. We invest in the wellbeing of our people through parental benefits, an Employee Assistance Program to promote mental health, and life insurance for all employees globally. We have a range of other benefits in line with the local market. Through our global share plans we offer the opportunity to save and share in Reckitt's potential future successes. For eligible roles, we also offer short-term incentives to recognise, appreciate and reward your work for delivering outstanding results. You will be rewarded in line with Reckitt's pay for performance philosophy.

Equality

We recognise that in real life, great people don't always 'tick all the boxes'. That's why we hire for potential as well as experience. Even if you don't meet every point on the job description, if this role and our company feels like a good fit for you, we still want to hear from you. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, disability or medical condition; colour, ethnicity, race, citizenship, and national origin; religion, faith; pregnancy, family status and caring responsibilities; sexual orientation; sex, gender identity, gender expression, and transgender identity; protected veteran status; size or any other basis protected by appropriate law.

title: Strategic Partnerships Lead
description:
About the job

Ubicación: Ciudad de México

Modalidad: Presencial

Experiencia requerida: 6–12 años




En VKNG Group buscamos un Strategic Partnerships Lead que nos ayude a fortalecer y expandir nuestro ecosistema de plataformas, agencias y aliados estratégicos desde VKNG LITE.

Este rol será clave para construir relaciones de largo plazo con partners como TikTok, YouTube, Meta, Amazon, Spotify, Netflix, agencias y otras plataformas relevantes, generando oportunidades comerciales, acceso a programas, beneficios estratégicos, productos beta, certificaciones e iniciativas que impulsen el crecimiento de VKNG.

Buscamos a una persona con visión estratégica, gran capacidad relacional, sensibilidad comercial y habilidad para convertir relaciones con plataformas y aliados en oportunidades reales para las distintas divisiones del grupo.




✨ Ideal para ti si:

• Disfrutas construir relaciones estratégicas con plataformas, agencias y aliados clave.

• Tienes facilidad para generar confianza con equipos de partnerships, representantes comerciales, plataformas y stakeholders relevantes.

• Te interesa el ecosistema digital, creator economy, social commerce, plataformas, contenido y nuevas oportunidades de negocio.

• Sabes identificar oportunidades antes que los demás y convertirlas en iniciativas claras.

• Tienes visión comercial, pero también sensibilidad para cuidar relaciones de largo plazo.

• Te gusta representar a una compañía en reuniones, eventos, programas especiales y espacios relevantes de la industria.

• Sabes conectar áreas internas para que una oportunidad se convierta en algo ejecutable.

• Te emociona abrir puertas, construir alianzas y generar crecimiento a partir de relaciones estratégicas.




✨ Principales responsabilidades




• Liderar relaciones estratégicas con plataformas, agencias y aliados clave para VKNG Group.

• Mantener comunicación activa con Strategic & Platform Partners, fortaleciendo relaciones de largo plazo.

• Identificar oportunidades de colaboración, programas, beneficios, productos beta, certificaciones y modelos de trabajo que impulsen crecimiento o diferenciación para VKNG.

• Desarrollar un pipeline claro de oportunidades derivadas de plataformas y aliados estratégicos.

• Dar seguimiento a iniciativas derivadas de partnerships, alineando expectativas entre partners y equipos internos.

• Representar a VKNG en reuniones, eventos, negociaciones, certificaciones, programas especiales y espacios de industria.

• Coordinar con áreas internas como Creative, Growth, Client Success, Creator Marketing, Social Commerce, Production y Finance & Administration para convertir oportunidades en iniciativas ejecutables.

• Documentar avances, oportunidades, próximos pasos, beneficios obtenidos y estado de cada partnership.




✨ Requisitos




✔ Experiencia en Strategic Partnerships, Business Development, Platform Partnerships, Growth, alianzas estratégicas, agencia, plataforma, medios digitales o roles similares.

✔ Experiencia desarrollando relaciones con plataformas, agencias, partners comerciales o aliados estratégicos.

✔ Capacidad para identificar oportunidades comerciales y traducirlas en iniciativas concretas.

✔ Excelente comunicación verbal y escrita.

✔ Habilidad para construir relaciones de confianza con perfiles senior, equipos comerciales, plataformas y stakeholders externos.

✔ Entendimiento del ecosistema digital, social media, creator economy, social commerce, content, ads o plataformas.

✔ Capacidad para dar seguimiento, documentar oportunidades y mantener visibilidad clara de avances.

✔ Criterio para coordinar equipos internos sin sustituir a las áreas responsables de ejecución.

✔ Mentalidad orientada a crecimiento, innovación, colaboración y generación de valor.

✔ Disponibilidad para reuniones presenciales, eventos de industria y espacios de relacionamiento con partners.

✔ Uso habitual de herramientas de IA para investigación, análisis y generación de oportunidades.




✨ Lo que ofrecemos




Ser parte del grupo creativo digital más innovador de LATAM y participar en la construcción de relaciones estratégicas que abren nuevas oportunidades para VKNG.

Trabajo directo con liderazgo y áreas clave del grupo, con impacto real en crecimiento, innovación y posicionamiento.

Participación en una unidad estratégica como VKNG LITE, con alto potencial para desarrollar nuevas oportunidades comerciales, programas, partnerships y modelos de colaboración.

Aprendizaje constante dentro de un entorno creativo, dinámico y en crecimiento.

Hasta 30 días de vacaciones al año (vacaciones de ley + VKNG Victory Days ligados a desempeño).

Work hard, party hard!




Sobre VKNG




VKNG es el ecosistema creativo digital más innovador de LATAM, reconocido por su enfoque integral en social media marketing y social commerce.

Orgullosamente somos el único grupo mexicano reconocido como TikTok Creative Partner, TikTok Agency Partner y TikTok Shop Partner a nivel global, con el mayor número de casos de éxito en la región.


Nuestras especialidades:




⚡ Contenido Auténtico (UGC)

⚡ Influencer & Creator Marketing

⚡ Ads & Performance

⚡ Account Management & Growth

⚡ Social Commerce, MRC & TikTok Shop

⚡ Livestreaming & Shoppertainment

⚡ Experiences & Special Projects
