description:
About the job

Descripción de la empresa The Coffee es una empresa de cafeterías urbanas que combina el mejor grano con la estética y la pureza de Japón. Nos inspiramos en la simplicidad, el minimalismo y la búsqueda constante de la perfección para diseñar espacios y experiencias únicas alrededor del café. Nuestro concepto “grab and go” apuesta por un servicio rápido, sencillo y de alta calidad. Cuidamos cada detalle del entorno, desde el diseño interior hasta la experiencia de la clientela. Buscamos personas creativas y apasionadas que quieran crecer con una marca en plena expansión internacional.

Descripción del puesto Como Diseñador/a de Interiores Junior en The Coffee, colaborarás en el diseño y desarrollo de nuestros espacios de cafetería, alineando cada proyecto con la identidad minimalista y funcional de la marca. En tu día a día apoyarás en la planificación de espacios, elaboración de propuestas conceptuales, selección de materiales y acabados, así como en la preparación de presentaciones visuales. Trabajarás junto al equipo de arquitectura y operaciones para adaptar los diseños a las normativas locales y a las necesidades de construcción. También darás apoyo en la coordinación con proveedores de mobiliario y FF&E, asegurando calidad y coherencia estética. Este es un puesto de tiempo completo, 100 % presencial, ubicado en Guadalajara, JAL.

Requisitos

Aptitudes en Interior Design y Space Planning, con capacidad para diseñar espacios funcionales, estéticos y alineados con la identidad de marca.
Conocimientos básicos de Architecture y manejo de planos, colaborando con equipos técnicos y de obra.
Experiencia o formación en Construction Drawings, elaboración de planos técnicos y detalles constructivos para ejecución en obra.
Aptitudes en selección y especificación de FF&E (mobiliario, iluminación, acabados y equipamiento) acordes al concepto minimalista de The Coffee.
Titulación o estudios en Diseño de Interiores, Arquitectura o similar; manejo de herramientas de diseño (por ejemplo, AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, software de renderizado); atención al detalle, creatividad, capacidad para trabajar en equipo y ganas de aprender en un entorno dinámico.

title: Growth Marketer
skills: Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.
Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience.
Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.
description:
About the job

Growth Marketer

Seneca Cost Segregation · Remote · Salary: $2000-$3000/month + Target based bounus




About Seneca

We help real estate investors keep more of their money. Cost segregation is a tax strategy that accelerates depreciation and puts cash back in our clients’ hands, often six figures in Year 1. We’ve performed over 10,200 studies and analyzed more than $1B in cost basis, and we’ve never lost an IRS audit.

We’re a lean, fast-growing team scaling toward $5–10M. That means real ownership, real budget, and real impact from day one. No layers, no politics, no waiting for permission.




The Role

We’re hiring a Growth Marketer to own the full marketing funnel, from first touch to qualified pipeline. You’ll build the nurture and conversion systems that turn leads into sales conversations, sharpen our paid channels, and create the reporting that tells us exactly what’s working.




This is a hands-on builder role, not a team-management role (yet). You’ll do the work, with the leverage to grow as we scale. If you think in systems instead of manual effort, use AI to multiply your own output, and want to see your work move the revenue number, this is for you.




What You’ll Own

Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.




Who You Are

Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience. 

 

This Probably Isn’t a Fit If…

Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.




Our Stack

GoHighLevel (CRM and automation), Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4 and Google Search Console, GTM, WordPress site, Claude AI and some Codex. You don’t need to be an expert in all of these on day one, but you should be the kind of person who gets fluent in a new tool fast and self-starts to hit your targets.




How to Apply

Send us a short note on a growth system you built and the result it drove. Include one example of a loop, agent, or automation you made to speed up your own work. We read every application that shows us something real.

description:
About the job

Executive Assistant to the CEO (Remote | US Time Zone)




Are you the type of person who sees a CEO's overflowing inbox and thinks "I can fix that in 20 minutes"? Do you thrive when you're juggling ten things at once — and none of them drop? Are you the person people describe as "the one who keeps everything together"?




If yes, keep reading.




GAB is a global marketing agency working with high-profile brands, creators, and businesses across entertainment, fashion, and international markets. We're a fast-growing company co-founded with deep roots in the NYC / Las Vegas entertainment industry and strong connections across Asia and beyond.




We're looking for a sharp, proactive Executive Assistant to work directly with our CEO and help keep everything running at a high level. This isn't a sit-back-and-wait-for-instructions kind of role — this is the person who makes everything around them run better.




You'd make a great fit for this role if...

You're good at:

Organizing all things in life — calendars, inboxes, projects, people
Moving fast with minimal to no errors
Technology and determined to learn new tools quickly
Being extremely adaptable and resourceful
Drafting communications that sound like the person you're writing for

Extra awesome if:

You have a never-say-never attitude
You catch even the smallest grammar mistakes
You can manage many projects at once and stay cool under pressure
You've worked with founders or executives in an agency, marketing, or entertainment environment
You have HR, project management, or marketing coordination experience




What you'll do

The daily responsibilities in this role include, but are not limited to:

Own the CEO's time. Process and manage emails, calendars, and daily priorities so nothing slips through the cracks.
Coordinate meetings across global time zones. We operate internationally — you make that seamless.
Draft and manage communications on behalf of the CEO. Emails, messages, follow-ups — you learn the voice and run with it.
Provide strategic project management support. You don't just track tasks — you chase them down, remove blockers, and close loops.
Support marketing operations. Research, content coordination, campaign support — you're in it.
Hire and manage freelancers and vendors. When we need someone, you find them, vet them, and keep them accountable.
Book travel, track expenses, and handle logistics — and if you find the best deals, even better.
Set up documents, initiate orders, and complete purchases to keep operations moving without friction.




What you'll need
Recent experience in administrative support, reporting directly to one or more executives
Experience in a rapidly growing environment — preferably in an agency, marketing, or entertainment setting
Highly proficient in Google Workspace and comfortable picking up new tools fast
A can-do attitude and natural ability to adapt in a dynamic environment
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills
Strong US time zone availability




Compensation

$600 base pay + $400 performance bonus monthly.




Why join us

Working at GAB INC. can accelerate your career and give you the opportunity to work alongside a global CEO building across entertainment, fashion, and international markets. We're a team that moves fast, thinks big, and values people who take ownership. Here's what comes with the role:

Fully remote with flexible work hours
Direct access to high-level strategy, deals, and partnerships
Opportunities to get involved in projects across marketing, entertainment, and global business
A role that grows as fast as you do — real career upside for the right person
Competitive compensation with room to expand




Up for the challenge?

Don't wait. Apply today.

To apply, send (to hr@thegabinc.com):

Your resume
A short video intro (2 minutes max) explaining why you're built for this role and a time you solved a problem before your boss even knew it existed

No video = no consideration. We need to see how you communicate.

description:
About the job

Descripción de la empresa Decidata es una empresa tecnológica que ayuda a otras empresas a conectar sus estrategias de marketing online y offline. Desarrollamos una tecnología propia capaz de detectar, monitorizar y analizar cada anuncio de TV, Tv de Paga, Radio, permitiendo sincronizarlos en tiempo real con campañas de marketing digital. Nuestro objetivo es avanzar hacia una integración digital completa en la compra y monitorización de campañas, incluyendo Programmatic TV y Digital Billboards. Trabajamos con clientes en múltiples mercados, incluyendo EE. UU., Canadá, México, Brasil, Argentina, Colombia, Perú, Ecuador y Chile. Si te interesa el cruce entre datos, multimedia y publicidad digital, Decidata ofrece un entorno innovador y en constante evolución.

Descripción del puesto En el puesto de Digital Sales en Decidata, te encargarás de identificar oportunidades de negocio, gestionar el ciclo completo de venta y mantener relaciones sólidas con clientes actuales y potenciales. En tu día a día, prospectarás cuentas, harás demostraciones de la solución, prepararás propuestas comerciales y darás seguimiento a leads cualificados junto con los equipos de marketing y producto. También tendrás que analizar resultados de campañas, detectar oportunidades de upselling y aportar feedback para mejorar la oferta de servicios. Este es un puesto de tiempo completo y se desempeña en modalidad remota, coordinándote con equipos internacionales en distintos husos horarios.

Requisitos

IMPORTANTE Experiencia con relaciòn en Agencias de Medios (Big5)
Aptitudes sólidas de comunicación y servicio al cliente para explicar soluciones complejas de forma clara y acompañar a las personas clave del cliente durante todo el proceso comercial.
Experiencia en ventas digitales y gestión de cuentas (Sales, Sales Management), idealmente en entornos de publicidad digital, martech o adtech.
Capacidad para impartir formación (Training) a clientes y equipos internos sobre el uso de la plataforma y las mejores prácticas en campañas.
Orientación a resultados, familiaridad con herramientas CRM, análisis básico de datos de campaña y manejo fluido de presentaciones comerciales.
Valorable experiencia internacional, buen nivel de inglés hablado y escrito, y interés por el marketing programático, TV conectada y publicidad basada en datos.

Excent Capital is a global, regulated financial group founded in 2021 and built by professionals with over a decade of experience in financial markets. We operate across London, Seychelles, Limassol, Mexico City, and Sao Paulo with 100% in-house technology, international licensing, and a leadership team that is hands-on, present, and committed to results.

We believe in people who want more. If you bring discipline, ambition, and ownership, we give you the structure, the tools, and the credibility to grow with no limits.




The Role

As a Business Development Executive, you will be part of our commercial engine, working closely with senior Business Development Managers and gaining hands-on experience across LATAM, Asia, the Middle East, and Africa.

If you are a recent graduate with 1 to 2 years of experience in sales or commercial roles involving direct client interaction, this might be the role for you.




What You'll Do

Prospect and hunt leads across multiple regions and markets
Execute multichannel outbound outreach and conduct discovery calls
Support the sales team with tailored commercial materials
Manage and update CRM data with discipline and precision
Collaborate closely with Sales and Customer Service to support closures and follow-ups




What We're Looking For

1 to 2 years of experience, internships or part-time roles are welcome
Recent graduates or final-year students in Business, Marketing, Economics, or related fields
Strong English communication skills, and will be evaluated during the process
Interest in sales, business development, and financial markets
High energy, disciplined, and eager to learn




What We Offer

Career growth: Clear career path and international business trips
Competitive package: Net monthly salary plus monthly commissions
Quarterly bonus: Performance-based bonus paid every quarter
Health insurance: Full medical coverage with no co-pay
Time off 22 days of paid time off per year
TotalPass: Full access to the TotalPass wellness platform
Apple equipment: Work with the best tools, fully equipped with Apple devices
Parking: Parking covered
Working hours: Monday to Thursday 9:00 to 17:30, short Fridays 9:00 to 13:00




This is not just another job.




Excent Capital is a group built by people who have lived the industry and want to do it better, with more speed, more clarity, and more results. If you are ready to take ownership and grow inside a serious global operation, we want to hear from you.

description:
About the job

En undertk studio estamos buscando a una persona técnica para sumarse a nuestro tech studio.

Buscamos a alguien con experiencia real trabajando con Shopify, Webflow y herramientas de AI aplicadas al trabajo técnico. Es un perfil específico, así que queremos explicarlo con claridad para que haga sentido de ambos lados.




Este rol es para una persona que disfrute construir, resolver y mejorar. Alguien que pueda tomar una necesidad técnica, entender el problema, proponer una solución práctica y ejecutarla con buen criterio.

El día a día puede incluir desarrollo y ajustes en sitios de Shopify y Webflow, implementación de mejoras, conexión de herramientas, automatizaciones, solución de bugs, optimización de procesos y uso de AI para trabajar de forma más eficiente.




No buscamos únicamente a alguien que “conozca” las plataformas. Buscamos a alguien que se sienta cómodo resolviendo problemas reales, aprendiendo rápido y usando tecnología con criterio.

Diseño visual es un plus, pero no es indispensable. Lo más importante es la parte técnica, la capacidad de ejecución, la curiosidad y el criterio para encontrar soluciones.




Sobre undertk studio

Somos una agencia moderna, orientada a objetivos y con una forma de trabajo práctica. Trabajamos con marcas de distintas industrias en proyectos de marketing, creatividad, performance, tecnología y crecimiento.




Nos gusta movernos rápido, trabajar con orden y cuidar el balance entre vida y trabajo. Creemos en equipos responsables, autónomos y con espacio para proponer.




Responsabilidades principales

Construir, ajustar y mantener sitios en Shopify y Webflow.
Implementar mejoras técnicas en sitios existentes.
Resolver bugs, errores de configuración y problemas técnicos.
Conectar herramientas, formularios, CRMs, automatizaciones y flujos de trabajo.
Usar herramientas de AI para acelerar procesos técnicos, prototipar, documentar y resolver problemas.
Detectar oportunidades de mejora en sitios, procesos y flujos digitales.
Colaborar con equipos creativos, de estrategia, contenido y performance.
Proponer soluciones prácticas, claras y accionables.




Requisitos indispensables

Experiencia real trabajando con Shopify.
Experiencia real trabajando con Webflow.
Uso avanzado de herramientas de AI aplicadas a desarrollo, automatización o procesos técnicos.
Capacidad para resolver problemas técnicos de forma autónoma.
Orden, responsabilidad y buena comunicación.
Criterio para priorizar, proponer y ejecutar.
Ganas de aprender y mejorar constantemente.




Sería un plus

Conocimiento de diseño web o UI.
Experiencia con herramientas no-code o low-code.
Experiencia conectando APIs, formularios, CRMs o plataformas de automatización.
Conocimiento básico de SEO técnico.
Experiencia trabajando con agencias o múltiples clientes/proyectos.




Modalidad y compensación

Modelo híbrido en Ciudad de México.
Compensación de acuerdo con aptitudes, experiencia y nivel de responsabilidad, por encima del mercado en CDMX.
Buen balance entre vida y trabajo.
Ambiente profesional, cercano y orientado a objetivos.




Para aplicar

Para que el proceso sea más claro y eficiente, te pedimos incluir una breve respuesta a estas preguntas:

¿Qué has construido o trabajado recientemente en Shopify?
¿Qué has construido o trabajado recientemente en Webflow?
¿Qué herramientas de AI usas en tu flujo técnico y para qué?
¿Qué automatización, integración o solución técnica has implementado recientemente?




Este rol puede ser ideal para alguien que combina desarrollo web, mentalidad medium/low-code, automatización y uso avanzado de AI para resolver problemas técnicos.




Si tienes este perfil, nos encantará conocerte.

description:
About the job

Remote | Full-Time | Orange Trail

Are you a commercially driven sales professional who wants to be rewarded based on performance?

Do you understand paid advertising, media buying, or the challenges businesses face with ad account restrictions?




Are you comfortable with outbound prospecting, networking, follow-up, and taking ownership of pipeline growth?

If yes, this role could be a strong fit.




About Orange Trail: 




Orange Trail is an advertising infrastructure agency helping direct advertisers and agencies scale with more stability across major advertising platforms.




We work with high-spending advertisers across industries such as fashion, technology, health & beauty, and other performance-driven niches. Our clients rely on us to help reduce disruption from platform restrictions, improve account stability, and support continued growth.




We are now hiring one Business Development Specialist to help us generate new opportunities, build relationships, and grow our client base globally.




The Role:




You will be responsible for finding, engaging, qualifying, and nurturing potential clients and partners for Orange Trail.




This is a hands-on business development role. You will be expected to actively prospect across channels, start conversations, identify opportunities, and help move qualified leads through the pipeline.




You will start by focusing on lead generation, outbound messaging, appointment setting, follow-up, and qualification. As you prove performance and gain deeper product knowledge, you may also begin taking closing calls.




This role requires a high level of autonomy. We will provide training, direction, and support, but you should be comfortable taking ownership of your work without needing constant supervision. You will be expected to manage your own pipeline, stay organized, follow up consistently, solve problems independently, and proactively find new opportunities.




Responsibilities:




Identify and prospect potential clients through Facebook groups, forums, LinkedIn, email, communities, networking, and other relevant channels
Reach out to qualified leads through outbound DMs, emails, and other direct channels
Book qualified sales calls for the team
Follow up with existing leads and nurture opportunities in the pipeline
Qualify prospects based on their business model, ad spend, advertising challenges, and fit for our services
Maintain clean and organized pipeline activity inside our HubSpot CRM
Build relationships with potential referral partners and agencies
Learn our offer deeply and understand the common advertising problems our prospects face
Support upsell and cross-sell opportunities where relevant
Take closing calls




What Are We Looking For:




Strong sales hunger and a performance-driven mindset
Excellent written and spoken English
Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally
Self-starter attitude with strong ownership over results
Highly autonomous and able to manage your own day without constant supervision
Organized, process-oriented, and consistent with follow-up
Comfortable doing high-volume outbound prospecting
Able to figure things out independently, ask smart questions when needed, and keep moving without waiting for step-by-step instructions
Curious about paid advertising, online business, and growth marketing
Willing to learn quickly and improve based on feedback
The mindset that with enough effort, thinking, and consistency, most problems can be solved




Preferred Experience:




Previous experience in sales, business development, appointment setting, or outbound prospecting
Experience with paid ads, media buying, affiliate marketing, e-commerce, agencies, or performance marketing
Familiarity with tools such as HubSpot, Notion, Slack, Google Docs, and similar platforms
Ability to recognize common advertising issues prospects may be facing
Experience upselling or cross-selling services is a plus




What You Get:




Base pay plus uncapped commission on deals you bring in
Remote work flexibility
Opportunity to grow into a larger sales
Direct exposure to high-level advertisers and agency owners
A meritocratic environment where performance is recognized and rewarded
Training, support, and a clear path to increase your responsibility over time




 Requirements: 




You must be available 30-40 hours per week
You must be able to communicate fluently in English
You must be able to show examples of previous sales, outreach, lead generation, or business development work
Paid advertising knowledge, experience or understanding is a must
Applications must be submitted in English




How to Apply: 

We are only hiring one person for this role right now.

To apply, include the word “Scaling” in your first message so we know you read the full description.

Please also include a short summary of your previous sales, outreach, or business development experience, along with any examples of previous work or results you can share.

description:

En CUADRANGULAR, firma internacional especializada en comunicación digital política,

Digitales. Esta posición será responsable de asegurar una ejecución táctica, eficiente y

alineada con la visión estratégica de la firma, liderando áreas clave con enfoque en resultados,

calidad operativa e innovación continua.




Objetivo del puesto:

iniciativas digitales, traduciendo la visión del CEO en acciones concretas que generen impacto

medible y sostenido.

Marketing y Contenido Digital

Procesos
Consultores Políticos




Será responsable de supervisar, alinear y potenciar estos equipos, garantizando estándares

de excelencia operativa y cumplimiento de metas organizacionales.




Perfil requerido:

Experiencia mínima de 8 años en dirección o gerencia operativa, preferentemente en
agencias digitales, consultoras, medios o campañas políticas.
Experiencia liderando equipos multidisciplinarios y proyectos simultáneos de alto nivel.
Capacidad para la toma de decisiones basada en indicadores clave de desempeño
(KPIs) y análisis de contexto político.
Habilidades comprobadas en resolución de crisis, estandarización de procesos y
mejora continua.




Formación académica:

Studio.

Lo que ofrecemos:

tangibles.

title: Especialista en marketing digital
skills: Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.
description:
About the job

Te frustra cuando una campaña se lanza y nadie sabe realmente si funcionó? 




A nosotros también.

Por eso estamos buscando un(a) Especialista en Marketing que vea más allá de los clics y las impresiones.

Alguien que entienda que detrás de cada campaña existe un negocio, un objetivo y una oportunidad de crecimiento.




Probablemente conectes con esta vacante si alguna vez has pensado:

💭 "¿Por qué estamos haciendo esto si nadie analizó los resultados anteriores?"

💭 "Hay mejores maneras de comunicar este mensaje."

💭 "Las métricas deberían servir para tomar decisiones, no para llenar reportes."

💭 "Me gustaría participar más en la estrategia y menos en la ejecución mecánica.




Lo que harás

Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.




Lo que valoramos

Más que años de experiencia, buscamos criterio.

Queremos personas que sepan hacer preguntas inteligentes, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones respaldadas por datos.

Porque para nosotros el marketing no se trata de lanzar anuncios.

Se trata de generar resultados.




📩 Si disfrutas combinar comunicación, estrategia y análisis, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

title: Head of People Operations
description:
About the job

Ubicación: Ciudad de México

Modalidad: Presencial

Experiencia requerida en el puesto: 10–15 años (indispensable)




En VKNG Group buscamos un Head of People Operations que lidere la evolución y consolidación de la operación de personas dentro de nuestro ecosistema.

Este rol es clave para asegurar que las personas, los procesos y las políticas del grupo continúen desarrollándose con claridad, consistencia y sentido de negocio, acompañando el crecimiento de VKNG sin perder la velocidad ni la cultura que nos caracteriza.

Buscamos a alguien con criterio, estructura y capacidad de ejecución, capaz de fortalecer y escalar los sistemas de People Operations que permiten que la organización crezca con orden, responsabilidad y claridad para todos los equipos. 




Por ello, la necesidad de experiencia comprobable.




✨ Ideal para ti si:




* Disfrutas acompañar organizaciones en crecimiento y fortalecer sus sistemas de operación interna

* Tienes mentalidad estructurada y te gusta dar claridad a procesos y dinámicas organizacionales

* Te sientes cómodo interactuando con líderes y C-Level con criterio y visión de negocio

* Sabes equilibrar cultura, operación y cumplimiento laboral

* Te motiva consolidar procesos que acompañen el crecimiento de equipos en expansión

* Tienes facilidad para traducir políticas y estructuras organizacionales en dinámicas claras para el equipo

* Disfrutas trabajar en entornos dinámicos donde la organización evoluciona constantemente




✨ Principales responsabilidades




* Liderar la evolución y consolidación del área de People Operations (RRHH) en VKNG Group

* Administrar y fortalecer el sistema central de gestión de personas de la organización

* Ejecutar y dar seguimiento a políticas internas (vacaciones, roles, reglamentos y lineamientos institucionales)

* Operar el proceso de Performance Review y seguimiento de desempeño

* Asegurar consistencia y claridad en los procesos relacionados con la experiencia del colaborador

* Impulsar iniciativas que refuercen la cultura organizacional de VKNG, promoviendo alineación, comunicación interna y sentido de equipo

* Desarrollar e impulsar programas de crecimiento profesional, incluyendo talleres, capacitaciones y espacios de aprendizaje que acompañen el desarrollo de carrera dentro de VKNG

* Acompañar a líderes y C-Level en decisiones relacionadas con personas, crecimiento y desempeño

* Mantener actualizada la documentación organizacional y las estructuras internas del grupo

* Coordinar con Finanzas y Legal para asegurar cumplimiento laboral y administrativo




✨ Requisitos




✔️ Experiencia liderando áreas de People Operations o HR Operations

✔️ Experiencia implementando o administrando HRIS o plataformas de gestión de RH (como BambooHR)

✔️ Experiencia gestionando procesos de desempeño, políticas internas y estructura organizacional

✔️ Experiencia impulsando iniciativas de cultura organizacional y desarrollo de talento

✔️ Capacidad para interactuar con líderes de negocio y acompañar decisiones organizacionales

✔️ Pensamiento estructurado y fuerte capacidad de ejecución

✔️ Experiencia en empresas dinámicas, startups o scaleups

✔️ Alta capacidad de organización, claridad y toma de decisiones




🌟 Lo que ofrecemos




Ser parte del grupo creativo digital más innovador de LATAM, participando en la evolución del sistema organizacional que acompaña el crecimiento de VKNG.

Remuneración competitiva y participación en proyectos estratégicos del grupo.

Trabajo directo con C-Level y líderes del negocio, con impacto real en la evolución de la organización.

Aprendizaje continuo dentro de un entorno creativo, dinámico y en crecimiento.

Hasta 30 días de vacaciones al año (vacaciones de ley + Victory Days ligados a desempeño).

Work hard, party hard!

 

Sobre VKNG




VKNG es el ecosistema creativo digital más innovador de LATAM, reconocido por su enfoque integral en social media marketing. Orgullosamente somos el único grupo mexicano reconocido como TikTok Creative Partner, TikTok Agency Partner y TikTok Shop Partner a nivel global, con el mayor número de casos de éxito en la región.

Nuestras especialidades:

⚡ Contenido Auténtico (UGC)

⚡ Influencer & Creator Marketing

⚡ Ads & Performance Campaigns

⚡ Accounts Management & Growth

⚡ Social Commerce & TikTok Shop

⚡ Livestreaming & Shoppertainment

⚡ Proyectos Especiales




Sector

Servicios de marketing




Tipo de empleo

Jornada completa

title: Coordinador de Marketing - General Medicines
skills: Coordinate the execution of marketing campaigns (digital and traditional).
Manage the content and campaign calendar.
Supervise external agencies and suppliers.
Analyze markets, performance metrics (KPIs), and generate/review reports.
Support strategic planning alongside the product and commercial team.
Collaborate with internal teams and the sales force.
Manage budgets and control campaign expenses.
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business Administration, or related fields.
Experience in marketing and elaboration of campaigns (omnichannel)
Intermediate-advanced English.
Intermediate-advanced Excel skills.
Strong collaboration with product/commercial areas.
description:
About the job

Business Introduction

GSK remains committed to achieving bold commercial ambitions for the future. By 2031, we aim to deliver £40 billion in annual sales, leveraging our existing strong performance momentum to significantly increase our positive impact on the health of billions of patients globally. Our Ahead Together strategy is centred on early intervention to prevent and alter the course of disease, thereby protecting people and supporting healthcare systems.

Our diverse portfolio consists of vaccines, specialty medicines, and general medicines.

Through continuous innovation and a dedicated focus on scientific and technical excellence, we strive to develop and launch new, groundbreaking treatments that address critical health challenges.

Position Summary

In this role we are looking to coordinate, execute, and monitor the company’s marketing strategies, working closely with the Brand Manager. Also, you will ensure the correct implementation of campaigns, execution of promotional events, materials, and the brand’s positioning across various channels.

Key Responsibilities: 


 Coordinate the execution of marketing campaigns (digital and traditional).
 Manage the content and campaign calendar.
 Supervise external agencies and suppliers.
 Analyze markets, performance metrics (KPIs), and generate/review reports.
 Support strategic planning alongside the product and commercial team.
 Collaborate with internal teams and the sales force.
 Manage budgets and control campaign expenses.


Requirements: 


 Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business Administration, or related fields.
 Experience in marketing and elaboration of campaigns (omnichannel)
 Intermediate-advanced English.
 Intermediate-advanced Excel skills.
 Strong collaboration with product/commercial areas.


Why GSK?

Uniting science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together.

GSK is a global biopharma company with a purpose to unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. We aim to positively impact the health of 2.5 billion people by the end of the decade, as a successful, growing company where people can thrive. We get ahead of disease by preventing and treating it with innovation in specialty medicines and vaccines. We focus on four therapeutic areas: respiratory, immunology and inflammation; oncology; HIV; and infectious diseases – to impact health at scale.

People and patients around the world count on the medicines and vaccines we make, so we’re committed to creating an environment where our people can thrive and focus on what matters most. Our culture of being ambitious for patients, accountable for impact and doing the right thing is the foundation for how, together, we deliver for patients, shareholders and our people.

If you require any type of accommodation and/or support during the selection process to better showcase your abilities (for example, access to ramps, accessible emergency exits, visual aids, etc.), please let us know when we contact you. We are here to support you.

Your application is voluntary; therefore, you understand and consent that GSK, located at Real Mayorazgo 130, Torre M, Piso 20, Col. Xoco, Benito Juárez, Mexico City, will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy in accordance with the candidate privacy notice, which can be consulted at Candidate Privacy Notice. Among the information you provide for this purpose, you may choose to give us personal data that will help ensure an inclusive selection process. Rest assured that your information will be treated with the utmost confidentiality, in compliance with applicable regulations, and will not be available to hiring managers or anyone outside the recruitment team. Help us maintain, together, an inclusive and welcoming environment. By submitting information, I confirm that I agree that it will be processed in accordance with the stated privacy notice.

Important notice to Employment businesses/ Agencies

GSK does not accept referrals from employment businesses and/or employment agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site. All employment businesses/agencies are required to contact GSK's commercial and general procurement/human resources department to obtain prior written authorization before referring any candidates to GSK. The obtaining of prior written authorization is a condition precedent to any agreement (verbal or written) between the employment business/ agency and GSK. In the absence of such written authorization being obtained any actions undertaken by the employment business/agency shall be deemed to have been performed without the consent or contractual agreement of GSK. GSK shall therefore not be liable for any fees arising from such actions or any fees arising from any referrals by employment businesses/agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site.

Find more about life at GSK at www.gsk.com

description:
About the job

Unilever está contratando “Sales strategic Coordinator”

Función: Sales strategic Coordinator

Scope: Local

Localidad: CDMX

Términos & Condiciones: Tiempo Completo

¿QUIÉNES SOMOS?

¿Quieres ser parte de una compañía que hace la diferencia alrededor del mundo? En Unilever, tenemos un propósito claro - hacer que la vida sostenible sea algo común. A través de nuestras 400 marcas que llegan a 2.5 mil millones de personas todos los días, nuestro objetivo es generar un impacto social positivo a nivel mundial y local.

G

PROPÓSITO DE LA POSICIÓN 

Unilever es el lugar donde puedes hacer realidad tu propósito con el trabajo que haces: crear un mejor negocio y un mundo mejor. Si buscas pertenecer a Helados Holanda, e impulsar su desarrollo a través del trabajo colaborativo con algunos de nuestros socios comerciales más representativos, ¡entonces este rol es sólo para ti!

PRINCIPALES RESPONSABILIDADES


Seguimiento al Plan de colocación nacional, identificando las áreas de oportunidad por región / agencia para lograr los objetivos mensuales / anuales. 
Seguimiento semanal con líder de ventas para identificar oportunidades y definir plan de acción de mejora 
Gestionar la pre-nómina de todo el personal encargado de la colocación, cambios y retiros de congeladores en mercado a nivel nacional 38 sitios, 130 recursos. 
Evaluar el desempeño de los cabinets en mercado, venta, rotación, correcta asignación. 
Seguimiento a las ventas de los congeladores colocados en mercado. 
Analizar en conjunto con el equipo de D&A la oportunidad por agencia para aterrizar la estrategia de colocación. 
Seguimiento al Budget mensual, para asegurar el correcto registro de los gastos – provisiones 


¿QUÉ NECESITAS PARA APLICAR A LA VACANTE?


Habilidades y Experiencia 
Manejo de Excel (Manejo de Tablas Dinámicas y Bases de Datos) 
PBI, Power Point 
Habilidades de negociación, liderazgo de equipo 
Capacidad para articular insights a partir de datos 
Habilidades Core 
Fuertes habilidades analíticas y de resolución de problemas 
Autogestión 
Capacidad para gestionar stakeholders multifuncionales 
Alta atención al detalle 
Capacidad de síntesis y visualización de datos 
Excelentes habilidades de comunicación 
Comodidad para trabajar en entornos dinámicos y de transformación 


Liderazgo

Purpose & Service – Trabaja con un propósito para el bien de los demás.


Tiene su propia brújula interna de propósito que inspira acciones 
Tiene humildad, entendiendo que el liderazgo es servicio a los demás, dentro y fuera de Unilever. 
Cree y contribuye al propósito de Unilever 


Personal Mastery- Siempre aporta lo mejor de sí mismo.


Desarrolla activamente su propio bienestar y resiliencia, así como el bienestar y condiciones adecuadas para un equipo de trabajo. 
Tiene inteligencia emocional para recibir comentario, gestionar el estado de ánimo y las motivaciones y generar empatía por los demás. 
Establece altos estándares para ellos mismos. 


Agility- Constantemente curioso y valiente


Explota el mundo que los rodea, aprendiendo y desarrollando continuamente sus habilidades. 
Flexiona sus planes y estilo de liderazgo para enfrentar la situación cambiante con urgencia. 
Aprende del pasado, visualiza el future y tiene una sana insatisfacción con el estatus quo. 


Business Acumen- Genera valor en canales y clientes


Crea nuevas oportunidades para un crecimiento rentable a través del núcleo y más allá. 
Crea un crecimiento sostenible con un propósito, involucrando a diferentes socios en todo el sistema para el cambio. 


Talent Catalyst- Desarrolla y magnifica el poder de las personas.


Crea un clima inclusive, empoderando a todos para que den lo mejor de sí mismos. 
Inspira un poderoso trabajo en equipo y colaboración, conectando a las personas para obtener mejores resultados. 


Consumer Love- Crea mejores futuros para nuestros consumidores, todos los días.


Invierte tiempo dentro y fuera para entender las necesidades de los consumidores. 
Cualquiera que sea su función, siempre busca mejores formas de servir a los consumidores. 


Passion for High Performance-Inspira la energía necesaria para ganar y crecer.


Genera intensidad y concentración para motivar a las personas a obtener resultados rápidamente. 
Tiene mentalidad de propietarios y utiliza datos y conocimiento para tomar decisiones. 
Asume responsabilidad personal y responsabilidad por la ejecución y los resultados. 


¿ESTÁS INTERESADO?

Presenta tu solicitud a través del Workday, ya que las solicitudes por correo electrónico no serán procesadas. Al postularse para este puesto, usted confirma que ha informado a su Line Manager y que se encuentra en un punto de su carrera en Unilever en el que es apropiado que postule para otros puestos.

¡Unilever abraza la diversidad y alienta a candidatos de todos los ámbitos de la vida! Esto significa dar consideración completa y justa a todos los solicitantes y el desarrollo continuo con todos los empleados independientemente de su edad, discapacidad, reasignación de género, raza, religión o creencias, sexo, orientación sexual, matrimonio y unión civil, embarazo y maternidad.

Unilever is an organisation committed to equity, inclusion and diversity to drive our business results and create a better future, every day, for our diverse employees, global consumers, partners, and communities. We believe a diverse workforce allows us to match our growth ambitions and drive inclusion across the business. At Unilever we are interested in every individual bringing their ‘Whole Self’ to work and this includes you! Thus if you require any support or access requirements, we encourage you to advise us at the time of your application so that we can support you through your recruitment journey.

title: Video Editor
description:
About the job

About Zenit Corp

Zenit Corp is a rapidly growing ecommerce group that owns and operates multiple direct-to-consumer brands across various international markets.

Our focus is on building category-leading brands with strong fundamentals, scalable systems, and long-term growth potential. We are not building a single ecommerce business, but a portfolio of brands designed to scale aggressively over the coming years.

We are looking for creative individuals who want more than just a job. We want people who are motivated to create, execute, improve, and grow alongside the company.

The Video Editor will be responsible for producing high-quality video content that strengthens our brands, improves audience engagement, and supports the growth of our ecommerce businesses across multiple platforms.

This role is ideal for someone creative, fast-paced, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with modern creative tools, including AI-assisted workflows, to produce better content in less time.

Role

The Video Editor is responsible for editing and producing video content across social media, marketing campaigns, ecommerce content, brand materials, and internal projects.

This role requires strong editing skills, creative judgment, understanding of platform-specific content formats, and basic experience with AI-assisted content creation tools.

The editor will collaborate closely with marketing, creative, content, and design teams to deliver videos that are engaging, brand-aligned, and optimized for each platform and audience.

Video Editor Responsibilities❖ Video Editing

➢ Edit short-form and long-form video content for social media, advertising campaigns, ecommerce assets, and internal use.

 ➢ Add motion graphics, transitions, subtitles, sound design, music, and visual enhancements when required.

 ➢ Transform raw footage, product material, AI-generated assets, and creative briefs into polished video content.

 ➢ Ensure all videos are visually engaging, well-paced, and aligned with brand identity.

❖ AI Content Creation

➢ Use AI tools to support video production, editing, enhancement, and optimization.

 ➢ Understand basic AI workflows including AI-generated visuals, voiceovers, captions, avatars, and editing tools.

 ➢ Identify opportunities to integrate AI to improve speed, scalability, and creative output.

❖ Content Optimization

➢ Optimize storytelling, hooks, pacing, structure, and formatting to improve audience retention.

 ➢ Produce multiple variations of video content for testing, campaigns, and different platforms.

❖ Creative Collaboration

➢ Work closely with the creative strategist and marketing team.

 ➢ Translate campaign objectives into engaging video content.

 ➢ Apply feedback quickly and accurately while maintaining quality.

 ➢ Manage multiple editing projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.

Role Objectives❖ Content Quality & Performance

➢ Produce high-quality, engaging video content across all platforms.

 ➢ Increase audience engagement and brand visibility through strong creative execution.

 ➢ Support marketing campaigns, product launches, and brand growth initiatives.

 ➢ Improve production efficiency through streamlined workflows and AI-assisted tools.

Requirements❖ Experience & Technical Skills

➢ Minimum of 2 years of experience in video editing or similar creative roles.

 ➢ Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or similar tools.

 ➢ Basic experience with AI content creation tools and workflows (mandatory).

 ➢ Strong portfolio demonstrating previous video editing work.

 ➢ Solid understanding of social media content, pacing, storytelling, and retention principles.

❖ Communication & Work Style

➢ B2 English level or higher.

 ➢ Strong communication skills in both English and Spanish.

 ➢ High attention to detail and strong creative sensibility.

 ➢ Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects at once.

 ➢ Strong organizational skills and clear communication.

What We Offer❖ Compensation & Growth

➢ Salary up to USD 10,000 per year.

 ➢ High-performance, fast-paced work environment.

 ➢ Direct impact on a rapidly scaling ecommerce group.

 ➢ Long-term collaboration opportunities.

 ➢ Opportunity to create content for multiple ecommerce brands.

 ➢ Exposure to modern creative tools, AI workflows, and performance-driven video production.

Required Equipment❖ Work Setup

➢ High-performance computer.

 ➢ Stable and reliable internet connection.

 ➢ Quiet, distraction-free workspace.

Candidate Profile❖ Ideal Candidate

➢ Creative, fast, structured, and reliable.

 ➢ Strong visual judgment and understanding of engaging content.

 ➢ Comfortable using AI tools to accelerate content creation.

 ➢ Able to manage multiple projects, deadlines, and feedback cycles.

 ➢ Ownership mindset with consistent delivery of polished video content.

title: Analista JR de Análisis de Datos Digital
skills: Analizar conversaciones, tendencias y métricas en redes sociales para generar insights accionables.
Realizar monitoreo digital y búsquedas especializadas (Boolean Search).
Desarrollar informes ejecutivos y dashboards con visualización clara y estratégica de resultados.
Identificar oportunidades, prevenir crisis y contribuir a la toma de decisiones comunicacionales.
Presentar hallazgos e informes ante clientes internos y externos.
Apoyar el desarrollo de líneas narrativas con base en el comportamiento y sentimiento de las audiencias.
Coordinarse con equipos de contenido, pauta y consultoría para alinear la estrategia digital.
Licenciatura concluida en Ciencias Políticas, Comunicación, Periodismo, Relaciones Internacionales, Sociología o afines.
Dominio de búsquedas booleanas y herramientas de Social Listening.
Conocimiento en estadística básica, interpretación de métricas y herramientas de marketing digital.
Manejo de herramientas como Meltwater, Google Analytics, Talkwalker, Sprinklr u otras equivalentes.
Inglés intermedio.
Alta capacidad analítica, pensamiento crítico y gusto por los retos estratégicos.
Manejo indispensable de excel avanzado.
Sueldo mensual: $18,000 a $23,000 MXN netos, según experiencia.
Modalidad híbrida (home office + oficinas cerca del Metro Sevilla, CDMX).
Horario laboral a tiempo completo.
Oportunidades reales de crecimiento profesional.
Ambiente de trabajo dinámico, colaborativo y con propósito.
description:

#VacanteDigital #AnalistaDeRedes #EscuchaSocial #SocialListening #AnálisisDeDatos #ComunicaciónPolítica #OportunidadLaboral #AgenciaDigital #TalentoCuadra #CUADRANGULAR




En CUADRANGULAR promovemos un entorno laboral inclusivo y respetuoso. Rechazamos cualquier forma de discriminación por sexo, edad, origen, raza, color, estado civil o cualquier otra condición protegida por la Ley Federal para Prevenir y Erradicar la Discriminación. title: Associate Retail Marketing Manager (Bilingual - English/Spanish)
skills: Job Title: Associate Retail Marketing Manager - Central & South America

Job Summary: Supports the Global Sales organization & Retail Marketing team to pitch and manage execution of retail activations in Central & South America. This individual will partner closely with internal stakeholders and external partners to create impactful consumer experiences where Pokémon products are sold.
FLSA Classification (US Only): Exempt
People Manager: No
Develop proposals with Central & South America TCG Sales team to secure incremental product placements and promotional opportunities at priority retail accounts.
Partner with Bellevue-based marketing teams, creative & brand services, legal, finance, and other internal departments to ensure in-market experiences adhere to TPCi global standards.
Identify new opportunities in the retail landscape for Pokémon that connect brand equity with local cultures.
Manage project execution, communicate status, and analyze performance with a focus on continuous improvement.
Three (3) to four (4) years of relevant professional experience or a demonstrated equivalent level of expertise.
Bachelor's degree in a related field or a demonstrated equivalent level of applicable experience.
Languages: Excellent verbal and communication skills in both English and Latin American Spanish, at near-native level.
Passion to create unique programs that combine Pokémon and partner goals
Experience working with external partners and able to communicate clearly and troubleshoot challenges diplomatically
Demonstrable ability to project manage, work cross functionally, and oversee multiple projects with various stakeholders
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office.

Passion for Pokémon: Develops an understanding of the Pokémon brand, the impact it has on our people, culture, business, fans, and communities, and applying that knowledge and passion to everything you do.

Challenging the Expected: Approaches challenges with curiosity and creativity, embracing the possibility of failure as an opportunity to learn something new, develop innovative ideas, solve complex problems and identify unique opportunities.

Integrity and Respect: Demonstrates integrity and respect by leading with empathy, listening to others, seeking out different perspectives, and taking personal responsibility for decisions, actions, and results.

Dedicated to Quality: Takes ownership to maintain and promote high standards, looks for new ways to learn and improve, and embraces a growth mindset to seek and apply feedback from others in an effort to continuously improve.
Building Relationships: Develops and strengthens relationships, adopting a “team first” mentality and working collaboratively to solve problems and meet shared goals.

Delighting Customers: Listens and understands the interests and needs of our customers and stakeholders, making them feel heard and important, and embracing these learnings to continue delivering a unique Pokémon experience.
An innovative culture driven by impact, delivering meaningful outcomes.
Company events that celebrate the spirit of Pokémon.
Competitive cash-based compensation programs.
100% employer-paid healthcare premiums for you.
Generous paid family leave.
Employer-paid life insurance.
Employer-paid long and short-term income protection insurance.
US Employees: 401k Employer Matching.
UK/IRE/MX Employees: Pension Employer Contributions.
Fitness reimbursement.
Commuter benefit.
LinkedIn learning.
Comprehensive relocation package for certain roles.
Hybrid work environment.
description:
About the job

Get To Know The Pokémon Company International

The Pokémon Company International manages the Pokémon property outside of Asia and is responsible for brand management, licensing and marketing, the Pokémon Trading Card Game, the animated TV series, home entertainment, and the official Pokémon website. Pokémon was launched in Japan in 1996 and today is one of the most popular children’s entertainment properties in the world.

Learn more online at corporate.pokemon.com and pokemon.com.

 

Note: Please include an English version of your resume with your application

Get to know the role


Job Title: Associate Retail Marketing Manager - Central & South America 
Job Summary: Supports the Global Sales organization & Retail Marketing team to pitch and manage execution of retail activations in Central & South America. This individual will partner closely with internal stakeholders and external partners to create impactful consumer experiences where Pokémon products are sold. 
FLSA Classification (US Only): Exempt 
People Manager: No 


What you’ll do


Develop proposals with Central & South America TCG Sales team to secure incremental product placements and promotional opportunities at priority retail accounts. 
Partner with Bellevue-based marketing teams, creative & brand services, legal, finance, and other internal departments to ensure in-market experiences adhere to TPCi global standards. 
Identify new opportunities in the retail landscape for Pokémon that connect brand equity with local cultures. 
Manage project execution, communicate status, and analyze performance with a focus on continuous improvement. 


What you’ll bring


Three (3) to four (4) years of relevant professional experience or a demonstrated equivalent level of expertise. 
Bachelor's degree in a related field or a demonstrated equivalent level of applicable experience. 
Languages: Excellent verbal and communication skills in both English and Latin American Spanish, at near-native level.
Passion to create unique programs that combine Pokémon and partner goals 
Experience working with external partners and able to communicate clearly and troubleshoot challenges diplomatically 
Demonstrable ability to project manage, work cross functionally, and oversee multiple projects with various stakeholders 
Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 
Proficiency in Microsoft Office. 


How You’ll Be Successful


Passion for Pokémon: Develops an understanding of the Pokémon brand, the impact it has on our people, culture, business, fans, and communities, and applying that knowledge and passion to everything you do.
Challenging the Expected: Approaches challenges with curiosity and creativity, embracing the possibility of failure as an opportunity to learn something new, develop innovative ideas, solve complex problems and identify unique opportunities. 
Integrity and Respect: Demonstrates integrity and respect by leading with empathy, listening to others, seeking out different perspectives, and taking personal responsibility for decisions, actions, and results.
Dedicated to Quality: Takes ownership to maintain and promote high standards, looks for new ways to learn and improve, and embraces a growth mindset to seek and apply feedback from others in an effort to continuously improve. 
Building Relationships: Develops and strengthens relationships, adopting a “team first” mentality and working collaboratively to solve problems and meet shared goals. 
Delighting Customers: Listens and understands the interests and needs of our customers and stakeholders, making them feel heard and important, and embracing these learnings to continue delivering a unique Pokémon experience.


What To Expect


An innovative culture driven by impact, delivering meaningful outcomes.
Company events that celebrate the spirit of Pokémon.
Competitive cash-based compensation programs.
100% employer-paid healthcare premiums for you.
Generous paid family leave.
Employer-paid life insurance.
Employer-paid long and short-term income protection insurance.
US Employees: 401k Employer Matching.
UK/IRE/MX Employees: Pension Employer Contributions.
Fitness reimbursement.
Commuter benefit.
LinkedIn learning.
Comprehensive relocation package for certain roles.
Hybrid work environment.


The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by people assigned to this role. They are not to be construed as an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, duties, and skills required. Employees may be required to perform duties outside of their normal responsibilities from time to time, as needed. For roles in the United Kingdom, candidates will need the right to work. In some cases, and for some roles, the Company may be able to arrange a visa. For roles in Ireland, this role requires candidates to have the right to live and work in the Republic of Ireland. However, we welcome applications from all nationalities and may consider supporting an employment permit application, in appropriate and suitable cases.

The Pokémon Company International is committed to the inclusion of all qualified applicants for consideration in our job application process. If you require reasonable accommodation to complete a job application, pre-employment testing, or a job interview, or to otherwise participate in the hiring process, please contact the Talent Acquisition team at accommodationrequest_ta@pokemon.com.

title: Marketing Data & Analytics Analyst

description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Responsibilities

Responsabilities:


Ensure data fidelity within ROIe and RTO solution by leveraging stakeholder management and data ecosystem expertise
Improve team efficiency through automation of reporting
Analyze campaign implementation and flag targeting or execution errors so the Marketing Science team can take corrective actions in partnership with the agency
Diagnose and proactively resolve data integrity questions, and QA support across internal and external media tracking tools
Identify opportunities to develop, test, and deploy data quality process enhancements and develop data controls
Work with large and complex custom, and syndicated, data sets to identify issues and determine actionable resolutions
Serve as a counterpart during weekly QA calls with teams to create streamlined solutions
Develop automated post-campaign analytic reporting
Work with cross-functional teams to fulfill ad-hoc reporting requests
Lead analytics projects around measurement, tracking, and planning to enhance data quality and usage across our partners
Leverage live digital media campaign tracking tools to monitor and diagnose brand business issues and identify information needs 


Qualifications

Qualifications:


Bachelor's Degree Required
Proven oral and written communication in English
2+ years of relevant experience working with data ecosystems
Data visualization experience with Excel required
Advanced PowerPoint and Excel skills
Excellent communication skills
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously under tight deadlines


What can you expect from us: 


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs. 
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning. 
Development programs according to Leadership skills. 
Specialized training according to the role. 
Learning experiences with internal and external providers. 
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others. 
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life. 
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle. 
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others. 


 

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

title: Desarrollador de Chatbot
description:
About the job

Allianz Partners

Is a world leader in B2B2C insurance and assistance, offering global solutions that span international health and life, travel insurance, automotive and assistance. Customer driven, our innovative experts are redefining insurance services by delivering future-ready, high-tech high-touch products and solutions that go beyond traditional insurance.

Our products are embedded seamlessly into our partners’ businesses or sold directly to customers and are available through four commercial brands: Allianz Assistance, Allianz Automotive, Allianz Travel and Allianz Care. Present in 75 countries, our 21,100 employees speak 70 languages, handle over 71 million cases each year, and are motivated to go the extra mile to offer peace of mind to our customers around the world.

We're looking for our new members!




This role is acting as global

AzP Conversational AI (CAI) Solution Engineer, located in the GCC Mexico.

Its mission is to help to develop and deploy effective Chatbots; Voicebots that meet the specific local needs.

This involves working closely with various internal and external stakeholders to understand the requirements, designing and building conversational AI systems that integrate with their existing technologies and core systems (e.g. CRM) and testing and optimizing the solution to ensure they deliver a high-quality user experience.




In order to be successful in this role, one will need:




Required Experience:




Knowledge of Chatbots, Conversational AI frameworks and technologies, such as STT (Speech-To-Text), TTS (Text-To-Speech), SSML (Speech Synthesis Markup Language) and NLP (Natural Language Processing), LLMs (Large Language Models).




Experience with Java Script, APIs, and other relevant technologies.




Understanding of the

principles of Conversational design and user experience (UX) for Conversational interfaces.




Expertise in programming languages such as JavaScript, Python, or similar

programming languages.




Understanding of

understanding of REST APIs and web services.




Knowledge of Agile methodology and experience in working with project management tools.




Experience in large-scale enterprise infrastructure and application landscape.




Advanced English level and Computer Science/Systems Engineering degree

is required.




Conversational AI Platform certification (Infobip, Cognigy etc.) is a plus.




Key Responsibilities:







Designing and developing chatbots, conversational flows, user interfaces and integration points/ extensions for Chat/Voicebots.




Developing and documenting processes and procedures for building and deploying Conversational AI solution.




Support Conversational AI operations projects with expertise.




Documenting technical changes, workflow related tasks and provide development status update where applicable.




Collaborating with other engineers and stakeholders to ensure that solutions are designed to be scalable, reliable, and maintainable.




Troubleshoot and resolve issues.




Continuously and self-independently drives asset enhancements and concept creation.




Providing technical guidance and support to AzP stakeholders during the development and deployment of their Conversational AI use cases.




Offer:




Direct hiring.




Remote work (must be based in Mexico City).




Full time

Monday - Friday schedule.




35-40k MXN Monthly salary (according to experience) + Food Coupons

+ Law benefits + Annual bonus + Health Insurance + Major Medical Expenses Insurance + Saving Fund.







Allianz Group is one of the most trusted insurance and asset management companies in the world. Caring for our employees, their ambitions, dreams and challenges, is what makes us a unique employer. Together we can build an environment where everyone feels empowered and has the confidence to explore, to grow and to shape a better future for our customers and the world around us.




We at Allianz believe in a diverse and inclusive workforce and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We encourage you to bring your whole self to work, no matter where you are from, what you look like, who you love or what you believe in. We therefore welcome applications regardless of ethnicity or cultural background, age, gender, nationality, religion, disability or sexual orientation. Great to have you on board. Let's care for tomorrow.

title: Diseñador de Interiores Junior
skills: Aptitudes en Interior Design y Space Planning, con capacidad para diseñar espacios funcionales, estéticos y alineados con la identidad de marca.
Conocimientos básicos de Architecture y manejo de planos, colaborando con equipos técnicos y de obra.
Experiencia o formación en Construction Drawings, elaboración de planos técnicos y detalles constructivos para ejecución en obra.
Aptitudes en selección y especificación de FF&E (mobiliario, iluminación, acabados y equipamiento) acordes al concepto minimalista de The Coffee.

Titulación o estudios en Diseño de Interiores, Arquitectura o similar; manejo de herramientas de diseño (por ejemplo, AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, software de renderizado); atención al detalle, creatividad, capacidad para trabajar en equipo y ganas de aprender en un entorno dinámico.
description:
About the job

Descripción de la empresa The Coffee es una empresa de cafeterías urbanas que combina el mejor grano con la estética y la pureza de Japón. Nos inspiramos en la simplicidad, el minimalismo y la búsqueda constante de la perfección para diseñar espacios y experiencias únicas alrededor del café. Nuestro concepto “grab and go” apuesta por un servicio rápido, sencillo y de alta calidad. Cuidamos cada detalle del entorno, desde el diseño interior hasta la experiencia de la clientela. Buscamos personas creativas y apasionadas que quieran crecer con una marca en plena expansión internacional.

Descripción del puesto Como Diseñador/a de Interiores Junior en The Coffee, colaborarás en el diseño y desarrollo de nuestros espacios de cafetería, alineando cada proyecto con la identidad minimalista y funcional de la marca. En tu día a día apoyarás en la planificación de espacios, elaboración de propuestas conceptuales, selección de materiales y acabados, así como en la preparación de presentaciones visuales. Trabajarás junto al equipo de arquitectura y operaciones para adaptar los diseños a las normativas locales y a las necesidades de construcción. También darás apoyo en la coordinación con proveedores de mobiliario y FF&E, asegurando calidad y coherencia estética. Este es un puesto de tiempo completo, 100 % presencial, ubicado en Guadalajara, JAL.

Requisitos

Aptitudes en Interior Design y Space Planning, con capacidad para diseñar espacios funcionales, estéticos y alineados con la identidad de marca.
Conocimientos básicos de Architecture y manejo de planos, colaborando con equipos técnicos y de obra.
Experiencia o formación en Construction Drawings, elaboración de planos técnicos y detalles constructivos para ejecución en obra.
Aptitudes en selección y especificación de FF&E (mobiliario, iluminación, acabados y equipamiento) acordes al concepto minimalista de The Coffee.
Titulación o estudios en Diseño de Interiores, Arquitectura o similar; manejo de herramientas de diseño (por ejemplo, AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, software de renderizado); atención al detalle, creatividad, capacidad para trabajar en equipo y ganas de aprender en un entorno dinámico.

title: Strategic Partnerships Lead
description:
About the job

Ubicación: Ciudad de México

Modalidad: Presencial

Experiencia requerida: 6–12 años




En VKNG Group buscamos un Strategic Partnerships Lead que nos ayude a fortalecer y expandir nuestro ecosistema de plataformas, agencias y aliados estratégicos desde VKNG LITE.

Este rol será clave para construir relaciones de largo plazo con partners como TikTok, YouTube, Meta, Amazon, Spotify, Netflix, agencias y otras plataformas relevantes, generando oportunidades comerciales, acceso a programas, beneficios estratégicos, productos beta, certificaciones e iniciativas que impulsen el crecimiento de VKNG.

Buscamos a una persona con visión estratégica, gran capacidad relacional, sensibilidad comercial y habilidad para convertir relaciones con plataformas y aliados en oportunidades reales para las distintas divisiones del grupo.




✨ Ideal para ti si:

• Disfrutas construir relaciones estratégicas con plataformas, agencias y aliados clave.

• Tienes facilidad para generar confianza con equipos de partnerships, representantes comerciales, plataformas y stakeholders relevantes.

• Te interesa el ecosistema digital, creator economy, social commerce, plataformas, contenido y nuevas oportunidades de negocio.

• Sabes identificar oportunidades antes que los demás y convertirlas en iniciativas claras.

• Tienes visión comercial, pero también sensibilidad para cuidar relaciones de largo plazo.

• Te gusta representar a una compañía en reuniones, eventos, programas especiales y espacios relevantes de la industria.

• Sabes conectar áreas internas para que una oportunidad se convierta en algo ejecutable.

• Te emociona abrir puertas, construir alianzas y generar crecimiento a partir de relaciones estratégicas.




✨ Principales responsabilidades




• Liderar relaciones estratégicas con plataformas, agencias y aliados clave para VKNG Group.

• Mantener comunicación activa con Strategic & Platform Partners, fortaleciendo relaciones de largo plazo.

• Identificar oportunidades de colaboración, programas, beneficios, productos beta, certificaciones y modelos de trabajo que impulsen crecimiento o diferenciación para VKNG.

• Desarrollar un pipeline claro de oportunidades derivadas de plataformas y aliados estratégicos.

• Dar seguimiento a iniciativas derivadas de partnerships, alineando expectativas entre partners y equipos internos.

• Representar a VKNG en reuniones, eventos, negociaciones, certificaciones, programas especiales y espacios de industria.

• Coordinar con áreas internas como Creative, Growth, Client Success, Creator Marketing, Social Commerce, Production y Finance & Administration para convertir oportunidades en iniciativas ejecutables.

• Documentar avances, oportunidades, próximos pasos, beneficios obtenidos y estado de cada partnership.




✨ Requisitos




✔ Experiencia en Strategic Partnerships, Business Development, Platform Partnerships, Growth, alianzas estratégicas, agencia, plataforma, medios digitales o roles similares.

✔ Experiencia desarrollando relaciones con plataformas, agencias, partners comerciales o aliados estratégicos.

✔ Capacidad para identificar oportunidades comerciales y traducirlas en iniciativas concretas.

✔ Excelente comunicación verbal y escrita.

✔ Habilidad para construir relaciones de confianza con perfiles senior, equipos comerciales, plataformas y stakeholders externos.

✔ Entendimiento del ecosistema digital, social media, creator economy, social commerce, content, ads o plataformas.

✔ Capacidad para dar seguimiento, documentar oportunidades y mantener visibilidad clara de avances.

✔ Criterio para coordinar equipos internos sin sustituir a las áreas responsables de ejecución.

✔ Mentalidad orientada a crecimiento, innovación, colaboración y generación de valor.

✔ Disponibilidad para reuniones presenciales, eventos de industria y espacios de relacionamiento con partners.

✔ Uso habitual de herramientas de IA para investigación, análisis y generación de oportunidades.




✨ Lo que ofrecemos




Ser parte del grupo creativo digital más innovador de LATAM y participar en la construcción de relaciones estratégicas que abren nuevas oportunidades para VKNG.

Trabajo directo con liderazgo y áreas clave del grupo, con impacto real en crecimiento, innovación y posicionamiento.

Participación en una unidad estratégica como VKNG LITE, con alto potencial para desarrollar nuevas oportunidades comerciales, programas, partnerships y modelos de colaboración.

Aprendizaje constante dentro de un entorno creativo, dinámico y en crecimiento.

Hasta 30 días de vacaciones al año (vacaciones de ley + VKNG Victory Days ligados a desempeño).

Work hard, party hard!




Sobre VKNG




VKNG es el ecosistema creativo digital más innovador de LATAM, reconocido por su enfoque integral en social media marketing y social commerce.

Orgullosamente somos el único grupo mexicano reconocido como TikTok Creative Partner, TikTok Agency Partner y TikTok Shop Partner a nivel global, con el mayor número de casos de éxito en la región.


Nuestras especialidades:




⚡ Contenido Auténtico (UGC)

⚡ Influencer & Creator Marketing

⚡ Ads & Performance

⚡ Account Management & Growth

⚡ Social Commerce, MRC & TikTok Shop

⚡ Livestreaming & Shoppertainment

⚡ Experiences & Special Projects
