description:
About the job

Executive Assistant to the CEO (Remote | US Time Zone)




Are you the type of person who sees a CEO's overflowing inbox and thinks "I can fix that in 20 minutes"? Do you thrive when you're juggling ten things at once — and none of them drop? Are you the person people describe as "the one who keeps everything together"?




If yes, keep reading.




GAB is a global marketing agency working with high-profile brands, creators, and businesses across entertainment, fashion, and international markets. We're a fast-growing company co-founded with deep roots in the NYC / Las Vegas entertainment industry and strong connections across Asia and beyond.




We're looking for a sharp, proactive Executive Assistant to work directly with our CEO and help keep everything running at a high level. This isn't a sit-back-and-wait-for-instructions kind of role — this is the person who makes everything around them run better.




You'd make a great fit for this role if...

You're good at:

Organizing all things in life — calendars, inboxes, projects, people
Moving fast with minimal to no errors
Technology and determined to learn new tools quickly
Being extremely adaptable and resourceful
Drafting communications that sound like the person you're writing for

Extra awesome if:

You have a never-say-never attitude
You catch even the smallest grammar mistakes
You can manage many projects at once and stay cool under pressure
You've worked with founders or executives in an agency, marketing, or entertainment environment
You have HR, project management, or marketing coordination experience




What you'll do

The daily responsibilities in this role include, but are not limited to:

Own the CEO's time. Process and manage emails, calendars, and daily priorities so nothing slips through the cracks.
Coordinate meetings across global time zones. We operate internationally — you make that seamless.
Draft and manage communications on behalf of the CEO. Emails, messages, follow-ups — you learn the voice and run with it.
Provide strategic project management support. You don't just track tasks — you chase them down, remove blockers, and close loops.
Support marketing operations. Research, content coordination, campaign support — you're in it.
Hire and manage freelancers and vendors. When we need someone, you find them, vet them, and keep them accountable.
Book travel, track expenses, and handle logistics — and if you find the best deals, even better.
Set up documents, initiate orders, and complete purchases to keep operations moving without friction.




What you'll need
Recent experience in administrative support, reporting directly to one or more executives
Experience in a rapidly growing environment — preferably in an agency, marketing, or entertainment setting
Highly proficient in Google Workspace and comfortable picking up new tools fast
A can-do attitude and natural ability to adapt in a dynamic environment
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills
Strong US time zone availability




Compensation

$600 base pay + $400 performance bonus monthly.




Why join us

Working at GAB INC. can accelerate your career and give you the opportunity to work alongside a global CEO building across entertainment, fashion, and international markets. We're a team that moves fast, thinks big, and values people who take ownership. Here's what comes with the role:

Fully remote with flexible work hours
Direct access to high-level strategy, deals, and partnerships
Opportunities to get involved in projects across marketing, entertainment, and global business
A role that grows as fast as you do — real career upside for the right person
Competitive compensation with room to expand




Up for the challenge?

Don't wait. Apply today.

To apply, send (to hr@thegabinc.com):

Your resume
A short video intro (2 minutes max) explaining why you're built for this role and a time you solved a problem before your boss even knew it existed

No video = no consideration. We need to see how you communicate.

title: Growth Marketer
skills: Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.
Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience.
Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.
description:
About the job

Growth Marketer

Seneca Cost Segregation · Remote · Salary: $2000-$3000/month + Target based bounus




About Seneca

We help real estate investors keep more of their money. Cost segregation is a tax strategy that accelerates depreciation and puts cash back in our clients’ hands, often six figures in Year 1. We’ve performed over 10,200 studies and analyzed more than $1B in cost basis, and we’ve never lost an IRS audit.

We’re a lean, fast-growing team scaling toward $5–10M. That means real ownership, real budget, and real impact from day one. No layers, no politics, no waiting for permission.




The Role

We’re hiring a Growth Marketer to own the full marketing funnel, from first touch to qualified pipeline. You’ll build the nurture and conversion systems that turn leads into sales conversations, sharpen our paid channels, and create the reporting that tells us exactly what’s working.




This is a hands-on builder role, not a team-management role (yet). You’ll do the work, with the leverage to grow as we scale. If you think in systems instead of manual effort, use AI to multiply your own output, and want to see your work move the revenue number, this is for you.




What You’ll Own

Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.




Who You Are

Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience. 

 

This Probably Isn’t a Fit If…

Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.




Our Stack

GoHighLevel (CRM and automation), Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4 and Google Search Console, GTM, WordPress site, Claude AI and some Codex. You don’t need to be an expert in all of these on day one, but you should be the kind of person who gets fluent in a new tool fast and self-starts to hit your targets.




How to Apply

Send us a short note on a growth system you built and the result it drove. Include one example of a loop, agent, or automation you made to speed up your own work. We read every application that shows us something real.

description:
About the job

Descripción de la empresa Decidata es una empresa tecnológica que ayuda a otras empresas a conectar sus estrategias de marketing online y offline. Desarrollamos una tecnología propia capaz de detectar, monitorizar y analizar cada anuncio de TV, Tv de Paga, Radio, permitiendo sincronizarlos en tiempo real con campañas de marketing digital. Nuestro objetivo es avanzar hacia una integración digital completa en la compra y monitorización de campañas, incluyendo Programmatic TV y Digital Billboards. Trabajamos con clientes en múltiples mercados, incluyendo EE. UU., Canadá, México, Brasil, Argentina, Colombia, Perú, Ecuador y Chile. Si te interesa el cruce entre datos, multimedia y publicidad digital, Decidata ofrece un entorno innovador y en constante evolución.

Descripción del puesto En el puesto de Digital Sales en Decidata, te encargarás de identificar oportunidades de negocio, gestionar el ciclo completo de venta y mantener relaciones sólidas con clientes actuales y potenciales. En tu día a día, prospectarás cuentas, harás demostraciones de la solución, prepararás propuestas comerciales y darás seguimiento a leads cualificados junto con los equipos de marketing y producto. También tendrás que analizar resultados de campañas, detectar oportunidades de upselling y aportar feedback para mejorar la oferta de servicios. Este es un puesto de tiempo completo y se desempeña en modalidad remota, coordinándote con equipos internacionales en distintos husos horarios.

Requisitos

IMPORTANTE Experiencia con relaciòn en Agencias de Medios (Big5)
Aptitudes sólidas de comunicación y servicio al cliente para explicar soluciones complejas de forma clara y acompañar a las personas clave del cliente durante todo el proceso comercial.
Experiencia en ventas digitales y gestión de cuentas (Sales, Sales Management), idealmente en entornos de publicidad digital, martech o adtech.
Capacidad para impartir formación (Training) a clientes y equipos internos sobre el uso de la plataforma y las mejores prácticas en campañas.
Orientación a resultados, familiaridad con herramientas CRM, análisis básico de datos de campaña y manejo fluido de presentaciones comerciales.
Valorable experiencia internacional, buen nivel de inglés hablado y escrito, y interés por el marketing programático, TV conectada y publicidad basada en datos.

title: Especialista en marketing digital
skills: Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.
description:
About the job

Te frustra cuando una campaña se lanza y nadie sabe realmente si funcionó? 




A nosotros también.

Por eso estamos buscando un(a) Especialista en Marketing que vea más allá de los clics y las impresiones.

Alguien que entienda que detrás de cada campaña existe un negocio, un objetivo y una oportunidad de crecimiento.




Probablemente conectes con esta vacante si alguna vez has pensado:

💭 "¿Por qué estamos haciendo esto si nadie analizó los resultados anteriores?"

💭 "Hay mejores maneras de comunicar este mensaje."

💭 "Las métricas deberían servir para tomar decisiones, no para llenar reportes."

💭 "Me gustaría participar más en la estrategia y menos en la ejecución mecánica.




Lo que harás

Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.




Lo que valoramos

Más que años de experiencia, buscamos criterio.

Queremos personas que sepan hacer preguntas inteligentes, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones respaldadas por datos.

Porque para nosotros el marketing no se trata de lanzar anuncios.

Se trata de generar resultados.




📩 Si disfrutas combinar comunicación, estrategia y análisis, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

description:
About the job

Vacante: Director(a) General de Operaciones Digitales

Modalidad híbrida | Ciudad de México

Inicio estimado: Junio 2026




En CUADRANGULAR, firma internacional especializada en comunicación digital política,

buscamos incorporar a nuestro equipo directivo a un(a) Director(a) General de Operaciones

Digitales. Esta posición será responsable de asegurar una ejecución táctica, eficiente y

alineada con la visión estratégica de la firma, liderando áreas clave con enfoque en resultados,

calidad operativa e innovación continua.




Objetivo del puesto:

Asegurar la operación estratégica, eficiente y articulada de nuestras campañas, proyectos e

iniciativas digitales, traduciendo la visión del CEO en acciones concretas que generen impacto

medible y sostenido.




Áreas bajo su responsabilidad directa:

Coordinación de Análisis e Inteligencia Digital
Marketing y Contenido Digital
Pauta y Trafficker
Procesos
Consultores Políticos




Será responsable de supervisar, alinear y potenciar estos equipos, garantizando estándares

de excelencia operativa y cumplimiento de metas organizacionales.




Perfil requerido:

Experiencia mínima de 8 años en dirección o gerencia operativa, preferentemente en
agencias digitales, consultoras, medios o campañas políticas.
Experiencia liderando equipos multidisciplinarios y proyectos simultáneos de alto nivel.
Capacidad para la toma de decisiones basada en indicadores clave de desempeño
(KPIs) y análisis de contexto político.
Habilidades comprobadas en resolución de crisis, estandarización de procesos y
mejora continua.




Formación académica:

Licenciatura en Administración, Comunicación, Ciencia Política, Ingeniería o afines.
Maestría deseable en MBA, Dirección de Operaciones o Comunicación Política.
Certificaciones en gestión de proyectos (PMI, Agile, Lean Six Sigma).
Conocimientos técnicos indispensables:
Manejo avanzado de plataformas de gestión y monitoreo: Asana, Trello, Notion, Looker
Studio.
Excel avanzado y herramientas de análisis de datos.




Lo que ofrecemos:

Sueldo competitivo acorde al nivel del puesto.
Contrato directo con la firma.
Desarrollo profesional en una firma de alto impacto estratégico.
Modalidad híbrida de trabajo con oficinas corporativas en CDMX (zona Sevilla).




¿Interesado(a)?

Envía tu CV actualizado al correo electrónico laura.rocha@cuadrangular.mx con el Asunto:

Postulación Director General de Operaciones Digitales – [Tu nombre completo]

Esta es una oportunidad única para liderar la operación de una firma que transforma la

comunicación política desde el ámbito digital con enfoque estratégico, innovación y resultados

tangibles.




#DirectorGeneralDeOperaciones #VacanteEjecutiva #ComunicaciónPolítica

#GestiónOperativa #AgenciaDigital #CUADRANGULAR




En CUADRANGULAR promovemos un entorno laboral inclusivo y respetuoso. Rechazamos

cualquier forma de discriminación por sexo, edad, origen, raza, color, estado civil o cualquier

otra condición protegida por la Ley Federal para Prevenir y Erradicar la Discriminación.

Invitamos a todas las personas calificadas a postularse, contribuyendo así a un ambiente

diverso y equitativo.

description:
About the job

Who we are

Excent Capital is a global, regulated financial group founded in 2021 and built by professionals with over a decade of experience in financial markets. We operate across London, Seychelles, Limassol, Mexico City, and Sao Paulo with 100% in-house technology, international licensing, and a leadership team that is hands-on, present, and committed to results.

We believe in people who want more. If you bring discipline, ambition, and ownership, we give you the structure, the tools, and the credibility to grow with no limits.




The Role

As a Business Development Executive, you will be part of our commercial engine, working closely with senior Business Development Managers and gaining hands-on experience across LATAM, Asia, the Middle East, and Africa.

If you are a recent graduate with 1 to 2 years of experience in sales or commercial roles involving direct client interaction, this might be the role for you.




What You'll Do

Prospect and hunt leads across multiple regions and markets
Execute multichannel outbound outreach and conduct discovery calls
Support the sales team with tailored commercial materials
Manage and update CRM data with discipline and precision
Collaborate closely with Sales and Customer Service to support closures and follow-ups




What We're Looking For

1 to 2 years of experience, internships or part-time roles are welcome
Recent graduates or final-year students in Business, Marketing, Economics, or related fields
Strong English communication skills, and will be evaluated during the process
Interest in sales, business development, and financial markets
High energy, disciplined, and eager to learn




What We Offer

Career growth: Clear career path and international business trips
Competitive package: Net monthly salary plus monthly commissions
Quarterly bonus: Performance-based bonus paid every quarter
Health insurance: Full medical coverage with no co-pay
Time off 22 days of paid time off per year
TotalPass: Full access to the TotalPass wellness platform
Apple equipment: Work with the best tools, fully equipped with Apple devices
Parking: Parking covered
Working hours: Monday to Thursday 9:00 to 17:30, short Fridays 9:00 to 13:00




This is not just another job.




Excent Capital is a group built by people who have lived the industry and want to do it better, with more speed, more clarity, and more results. If you are ready to take ownership and grow inside a serious global operation, we want to hear from you.

skills: Identify and prospect potential clients through Facebook groups, forums, LinkedIn, email, communities, networking, and other relevant channels
Reach out to qualified leads through outbound DMs, emails, and other direct channels
Book qualified sales calls for the team
Follow up with existing leads and nurture opportunities in the pipeline
Qualify prospects based on their business model, ad spend, advertising challenges, and fit for our services
Maintain clean and organized pipeline activity inside our HubSpot CRM
Build relationships with potential referral partners and agencies
Learn our offer deeply and understand the common advertising problems our prospects face
Support upsell and cross-sell opportunities where relevant
Take closing calls
Strong sales hunger and a performance-driven mindset
Excellent written and spoken English
Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally
Self-starter attitude with strong ownership over results
Highly autonomous and able to manage your own day without constant supervision
Organized, process-oriented, and consistent with follow-up
Comfortable doing high-volume outbound prospecting
Able to figure things out independently, ask smart questions when needed, and keep moving without waiting for step-by-step instructions
Curious about paid advertising, online business, and growth marketing
Willing to learn quickly and improve based on feedback
The mindset that with enough effort, thinking, and consistency, most problems can be solved
Previous experience in sales, business development, appointment setting, or outbound prospecting
Experience with paid ads, media buying, affiliate marketing, e-commerce, agencies, or performance marketing
Familiarity with tools such as HubSpot, Notion, Slack, Google Docs, and similar platforms
Ability to recognize common advertising issues prospects may be facing
Experience upselling or cross-selling services is a plus
Base pay plus uncapped commission on deals you bring in
Remote work flexibility
Opportunity to grow into a larger sales
Direct exposure to high-level advertisers and agency owners
A meritocratic environment where performance is recognized and rewarded
Training, support, and a clear path to increase your responsibility over time
You must be available 30-40 hours per week
You must be able to communicate fluently in English
You must be able to show examples of previous sales, outreach, lead generation, or business development work
Paid advertising knowledge, experience or understanding is a must
Applications must be submitted in English
description:
About the job

Remote | Full-Time | Orange Trail

Are you a commercially driven sales professional who wants to be rewarded based on performance?

Do you understand paid advertising, media buying, or the challenges businesses face with ad account restrictions?




Are you comfortable with outbound prospecting, networking, follow-up, and taking ownership of pipeline growth?

If yes, this role could be a strong fit.




About Orange Trail: 




Orange Trail is an advertising infrastructure agency helping direct advertisers and agencies scale with more stability across major advertising platforms.




We work with high-spending advertisers across industries such as fashion, technology, health & beauty, and other performance-driven niches. Our clients rely on us to help reduce disruption from platform restrictions, improve account stability, and support continued growth.




We are now hiring one Business Development Specialist to help us generate new opportunities, build relationships, and grow our client base globally.




The Role:




You will be responsible for finding, engaging, qualifying, and nurturing potential clients and partners for Orange Trail.




This is a hands-on business development role. You will be expected to actively prospect across channels, start conversations, identify opportunities, and help move qualified leads through the pipeline.




You will start by focusing on lead generation, outbound messaging, appointment setting, follow-up, and qualification. As you prove performance and gain deeper product knowledge, you may also begin taking closing calls.




This role requires a high level of autonomy. We will provide training, direction, and support, but you should be comfortable taking ownership of your work without needing constant supervision. You will be expected to manage your own pipeline, stay organized, follow up consistently, solve problems independently, and proactively find new opportunities.




Responsibilities:




Identify and prospect potential clients through Facebook groups, forums, LinkedIn, email, communities, networking, and other relevant channels
Reach out to qualified leads through outbound DMs, emails, and other direct channels
Book qualified sales calls for the team
Follow up with existing leads and nurture opportunities in the pipeline
Qualify prospects based on their business model, ad spend, advertising challenges, and fit for our services
Maintain clean and organized pipeline activity inside our HubSpot CRM
Build relationships with potential referral partners and agencies
Learn our offer deeply and understand the common advertising problems our prospects face
Support upsell and cross-sell opportunities where relevant
Take closing calls




What Are We Looking For:




Strong sales hunger and a performance-driven mindset
Excellent written and spoken English
Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally
Self-starter attitude with strong ownership over results
Highly autonomous and able to manage your own day without constant supervision
Organized, process-oriented, and consistent with follow-up
Comfortable doing high-volume outbound prospecting
Able to figure things out independently, ask smart questions when needed, and keep moving without waiting for step-by-step instructions
Curious about paid advertising, online business, and growth marketing
Willing to learn quickly and improve based on feedback
The mindset that with enough effort, thinking, and consistency, most problems can be solved




Preferred Experience:




Previous experience in sales, business development, appointment setting, or outbound prospecting
Experience with paid ads, media buying, affiliate marketing, e-commerce, agencies, or performance marketing
Familiarity with tools such as HubSpot, Notion, Slack, Google Docs, and similar platforms
Ability to recognize common advertising issues prospects may be facing
Experience upselling or cross-selling services is a plus




What You Get:




Base pay plus uncapped commission on deals you bring in
Remote work flexibility
Opportunity to grow into a larger sales
Direct exposure to high-level advertisers and agency owners
A meritocratic environment where performance is recognized and rewarded
Training, support, and a clear path to increase your responsibility over time




 Requirements: 




You must be available 30-40 hours per week
You must be able to communicate fluently in English
You must be able to show examples of previous sales, outreach, lead generation, or business development work
Paid advertising knowledge, experience or understanding is a must
Applications must be submitted in English




How to Apply: 

We are only hiring one person for this role right now.

To apply, include the word “Scaling” in your first message so we know you read the full description.

Please also include a short summary of your previous sales, outreach, or business development experience, along with any examples of previous work or results you can share.

description:
About the job

SOBRE LAYER7




En Layer7 estamos construyendo tecnología en hiperescala, donde cada decisión de ingeniería impacta a millones de usuarios y a las operaciones críticas de bancos, retailers y grandes empresas. 




Somos más de 100 profesionales apasionados enfrentando problemas de alta complejidad técnica: desde sistemas distribuidos resilientes hasta plataformas capaces de procesar miles de millones de interacciones al año.

Aquí cultivamos una cultura de alto rendimiento, curiosidad técnica y camaradería real, con espacio para crecer, aprender y mantener un balance sano entre vida personal y profesional. 




Si disfrutas resolver problemas difíciles, diseñar sistemas que escalan sin límites y atreverte a innovar con impacto, este es tu lugar.




Objetivo del puesto

Apoyo al área comercial para seguimiento en la contratación de servicios a nuestros a clientes. 




Si eres una persona organizada, que le gusta la atención al cliente y capaz de dar seguimiento puntual a procesos ágiles; tienes la fortaleza emocional necesaria para superar los obstáculos que puedas enfrentar; además, estás motivado por alcanzar metas y estás dispuesto a hacer el esfuerzo adicional necesario para lograrlo.




¡Queremos que formes parte de nuestro talentoso y ambicioso equipo de profesionales!




Responsabilidades: 




Solicitar al cliente la documentación necesaria para su contratación.
Revisión y análisis de contrato, compartidos a cliente. 
Gestionar el pago de las primeras facturas de consumo del cliente.
Dar seguimiento a la contratación del cliente (firma de contrato).
Administrar el avance de cada uno de los clientes nuevos.
Brindar apoyo al cliente en su proceso de contratación.




Requerimientos: 




1 - 3 años de experiencia en atención al cliente
Lic. Administración o afin 
Conocimiento básico de contratos de prestación de servicios 
Fuertes habilidades de comunicación
Conocimiento y manejo de herramientas de CRM (por ejemplo, PipeDrive Salesforce, HubSpot)
Conocimiento de Papelería Office y Monday. 
Capacidad para trabajar de manera autónoma y en equipo.
Fuertes habilidades de organización y gestión del tiempo.




Beneficios: 




Prestaciones de Ley
Prestaciones Superiores 
Modalidad de trabajo híbrido

title: Head of People Operations
description:
About the job

Ubicación: Ciudad de México

Modalidad: Presencial

Experiencia requerida en el puesto: 10–15 años (indispensable)




En VKNG Group buscamos un Head of People Operations que lidere la evolución y consolidación de la operación de personas dentro de nuestro ecosistema.

Este rol es clave para asegurar que las personas, los procesos y las políticas del grupo continúen desarrollándose con claridad, consistencia y sentido de negocio, acompañando el crecimiento de VKNG sin perder la velocidad ni la cultura que nos caracteriza.

Buscamos a alguien con criterio, estructura y capacidad de ejecución, capaz de fortalecer y escalar los sistemas de People Operations que permiten que la organización crezca con orden, responsabilidad y claridad para todos los equipos. 




Por ello, la necesidad de experiencia comprobable.




✨ Ideal para ti si:




* Disfrutas acompañar organizaciones en crecimiento y fortalecer sus sistemas de operación interna

* Tienes mentalidad estructurada y te gusta dar claridad a procesos y dinámicas organizacionales

* Te sientes cómodo interactuando con líderes y C-Level con criterio y visión de negocio

* Sabes equilibrar cultura, operación y cumplimiento laboral

* Te motiva consolidar procesos que acompañen el crecimiento de equipos en expansión

* Tienes facilidad para traducir políticas y estructuras organizacionales en dinámicas claras para el equipo

* Disfrutas trabajar en entornos dinámicos donde la organización evoluciona constantemente




✨ Principales responsabilidades




* Liderar la evolución y consolidación del área de People Operations (RRHH) en VKNG Group

* Administrar y fortalecer el sistema central de gestión de personas de la organización

* Ejecutar y dar seguimiento a políticas internas (vacaciones, roles, reglamentos y lineamientos institucionales)

* Operar el proceso de Performance Review y seguimiento de desempeño

* Asegurar consistencia y claridad en los procesos relacionados con la experiencia del colaborador

* Impulsar iniciativas que refuercen la cultura organizacional de VKNG, promoviendo alineación, comunicación interna y sentido de equipo

* Desarrollar e impulsar programas de crecimiento profesional, incluyendo talleres, capacitaciones y espacios de aprendizaje que acompañen el desarrollo de carrera dentro de VKNG

* Acompañar a líderes y C-Level en decisiones relacionadas con personas, crecimiento y desempeño

* Mantener actualizada la documentación organizacional y las estructuras internas del grupo

* Coordinar con Finanzas y Legal para asegurar cumplimiento laboral y administrativo




✨ Requisitos




✔️ Experiencia liderando áreas de People Operations o HR Operations

✔️ Experiencia implementando o administrando HRIS o plataformas de gestión de RH (como BambooHR)

✔️ Experiencia gestionando procesos de desempeño, políticas internas y estructura organizacional

✔️ Experiencia impulsando iniciativas de cultura organizacional y desarrollo de talento

✔️ Capacidad para interactuar con líderes de negocio y acompañar decisiones organizacionales

✔️ Pensamiento estructurado y fuerte capacidad de ejecución

✔️ Experiencia en empresas dinámicas, startups o scaleups

✔️ Alta capacidad de organización, claridad y toma de decisiones




🌟 Lo que ofrecemos




Ser parte del grupo creativo digital más innovador de LATAM, participando en la evolución del sistema organizacional que acompaña el crecimiento de VKNG.

Remuneración competitiva y participación en proyectos estratégicos del grupo.

Trabajo directo con C-Level y líderes del negocio, con impacto real en la evolución de la organización.

Aprendizaje continuo dentro de un entorno creativo, dinámico y en crecimiento.

Hasta 30 días de vacaciones al año (vacaciones de ley + Victory Days ligados a desempeño).

Work hard, party hard!

 

Sobre VKNG




VKNG es el ecosistema creativo digital más innovador de LATAM, reconocido por su enfoque integral en social media marketing. title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the job

About Zenit Corp

Zenit Corp is a rapidly growing ecommerce group that owns and operates multiple direct-to-consumer brands across different international markets.

Our focus is on building category-leading brands with strong fundamentals, scalable systems, and long-term growth potential. We are not building a single ecommerce business, but a portfolio of brands designed to scale aggressively over the coming years.

We are looking for creative individuals who want more than just a job. We want people who are eager to create, execute, improve, and grow alongside the company.

The Graphic Designer will be responsible for producing high-quality visual assets that strengthen our brands, support marketing initiatives, enhance communication, and help drive growth across multiple ecommerce channels.

This role is ideal for someone creative, detail-oriented, organized, and capable of translating brand direction, marketing goals, and AI-generated concepts into strong and polished visual content.

Role

The Graphic Designer is responsible for developing visual content across social media, websites, advertising campaigns, ecommerce assets, presentations, banners, and promotional materials.

This role requires strong design skills, excellent visual judgment, an understanding of branding, experience working with AI-generated imagery, and the ability to adapt creative assets across multiple formats and platforms.

The designer will collaborate closely with marketing, content, creative, and leadership teams to ensure all visual materials are consistent, engaging, brand-aligned, and execution-ready.

Graphic Designer Responsibilities❖ Graphic Design

➢ Design visual assets for social media, websites, landing pages, advertising campaigns, and ecommerce platforms.

 ➢ Create banners, presentations, promotional materials, and brand communication assets.

 ➢ Develop visually appealing and brand-consistent designs.

 ➢ Translate creative direction and campaign requirements into production-ready visuals.

❖ AI Image Generation

➢ Use AI-based image generation tools to create, enhance, and adapt visuals for campaigns, content, and ecommerce assets.

 ➢ Understand basic AI workflows such as prompting, refinement, upscaling, background creation, and variations.

 ➢ Combine AI-generated visuals with traditional design tools to produce high-quality final outputs.

 ➢ Identify opportunities to leverage AI to speed up production and improve creative output.

❖ Brand & Visual Consistency

➢ Maintain visual consistency across all brands and marketing channels.

 ➢ Apply branding principles such as typography, color systems, layout, composition, and visual hierarchy.

 ➢ Organize design files, templates, and visual resources in a structured way.

 ➢ Contribute to improving scalable design systems for multi-brand use.

❖ Creative Collaboration

➢ Work closely with the creative strategist and marketing team.

 ➢ Translate campaign objectives into effective visual executions.

 ➢ Contribute ideas for visual concepts, campaigns, and brand development.

❖ Content Optimization

➢ Adapt designs for different platforms, formats, and use cases.

 ➢ Create multiple variations of assets for testing and performance optimization.

 ➢ Refine designs based on feedback, performance data, and creative direction.

Role Objectives❖ Creative Quality & Impact

➢ Produce high-quality visual content aligned with brand identity.

 ➢ Support marketing initiatives with strong and effective creative assets.

 ➢ Improve engagement through visually compelling design.

 ➢ Strengthen consistency across all brand touchpoints.

 ➢ Improve production speed and efficiency through AI tools and optimized workflows.

Requirements❖ Experience & Technical Skills

➢ Minimum of 2 years of experience in graphic design.

 ➢ Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite or similar design tools.

 ➢ Basic experience with AI image generation tools and workflows (mandatory).

 ➢ Strong portfolio demonstrating previous design work.

 ➢ Solid understanding of layout, typography, composition, branding, and digital design principles.

 ➢ Ability to create assets for ads, social media, websites, presentations, and campaigns.

❖ Communication & Work Style

➢ B2 English level or higher.

 ➢ Strong communication skills in English and Spanish.

 ➢ High attention to detail and strong organizational habits.

 ➢ Ability to work independently as well as in a team.

 ➢ Open to feedback and able to iterate quickly.

 ➢ Strong ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines.

What We Offer❖ Compensation & Growth

➢ Salary up to USD 10,000 per year.

 ➢ High-performance, fast-paced work environment.

 ➢ Direct impact on a rapidly scaling ecommerce group.

 ➢ Long-term collaboration opportunities.

 ➢ Exposure to multiple ecommerce brands and creative challenges.

 ➢ Experience working with AI-powered design workflows and modern creative tools.

Required Equipment❖ Work Setup

➢ High-performance computer.

 ➢ Stable and fast internet connection.

 ➢ Distraction-free workspace.

Candidate Profile❖ Ideal Candidate

➢ Creative, detail-oriented, structured, and reliable.

 ➢ Strong visual judgment and understanding of brand consistency.

 ➢ Comfortable using AI tools to improve speed and quality of design output.

 ➢ Able to manage multiple projects, deadlines, and feedback cycles.

 ➢ Ownership mindset with consistent delivery of high-quality work.

 ➢ Excited to work in a fast-paced environment where design directly impacts business growth.

title: Analista JR de Análisis de Datos Digital

Ambiente de trabajo dinámico, colaborativo y con propósito.
description:

title: Freelance Technical Consultant
skills: Act as the primary technical point of contact for customers across technical and executive stakeholders.
Lead discovery conversations to deeply understand client goals, problems and quality criteria.
Translate client needs into clear, actionable solution designs and delivery plans.
Advise customers on best practices in data collection, data quality, evaluation, and model training workflows.
Set expectations proactively, communicate progress regularly, and manage risks and trade-offs transparently.
Identify expansion opportunities and additional ways Toloka can create value through data and AI solutions.
Design end-to-end data solutions using Toloka’s platform, selecting appropriate components, workflows, and quality controls.

Configure data labeling components and quality controls, develop user interfaces and AI-driven tooling (e.g. agentic systems, RAGs, synthetic data generation), and integrate them into end-to-end automated pipelines for AI training and evaluation.
Run experiments and pilots to validate quality, throughput, and cost assumptions.
Lead technical execution during delivery, coordinating internal teams and external stakeholders as needed.
Ensure solutions meet agreed quality, performance, and scalability requirements.
Own delivery outcomes holistically - including technical performance, quality, timelines, and financial efficiency.
Monitor key KPIs (e.g. throughput, quality metrics, Gross Margin, Contribution Margin) and act on deviations.
Prioritize work based on customer impact and business value.
Analyze data to identify failure modes, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.
Continuously optimize solutions through iteration, automation, and adoption of new technologies.
Troubleshoot delivery, process, or technical issues in collaboration with support, infrastructure, and product teams.
Drive solutions toward stable operation with minimal ongoing maintenance.
Experience as a Solution Engineer, Technical Solutions Engineer, Data Scientist, Data/Systems Analyst, or Technical Project Manager.
Proven experience owning projects end-to-end, including scoping, delivery, and stakeholder management.
Direct experience working with external customers on technical projects (requirements gathering, delivery, iteration).
Strong Python skills for data manipulation (e.g. NumPy, pandas), natural language processing (e.g. NLTK, spaCy), and building lightweight web services or tools (e.g. FastAPI, Flask).
Solid understanding of ML concepts and data workflows; familiarity with LLMs and prompt engineering is a strong plus.
Experience designing multi-stage pipelines and complex systems.
Understanding of software development fundamentals: version control, testing, MVPs, iterative development etc..
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, ML/AI, Software Engineering, or a related quantitative field such as Physics or Applied Mathematics, with strong analytical foundations.
Ability to reason about trade-offs between quality, speed, cost, and scalability.
Excellent English communication skills (B2+), with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
Confidence working with data engineers, ML engineers, and researchers from leading tech companies.
Strong ownership mindset: comfortable being accountable for outcomes, not just tasks.
Ability to manage multiple projects in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.
Experience with crowdsourcing, expert workflows, or large-scale data labeling.
Experience working on ML training, evaluation, or agentic systems.
Familiarity with quality frameworks, audits, or data validation pipelines.
Freelance collaboration via the Ontop freelance platform.
Flexible, fully remote work schedule.
You’ll have the opportunity to work on highly innovative projects at the leading edge of AI development, together with a genuinely dedicated and dynamic team of experts.
You’ll also be working on projects with customers that are AI industry leaders and well-known household names.
Friendly community.
description:
About the job

Company Intro




At Toloka AI we create data that powers leading GenAI models and innovations. We work with frontier labs, big tech, renowned AI startups, enterprises and non-profit research organizations worldwide. We use a combination of Experts + Crowd + Tech Platform to teach AI models to reason and evaluate their efficacy and safety. We have experts in more than 50 different domains—from doctors and lawyers to physicists and engineers—and boast one of the most diverse global crowds, representing over 100 countries and speaking 40+ languages. We are a well-funded startup with an enviable portfolio of clients including Anthropic, Amazon, Microsoft, Poolside, Recraft, and Shopify.




Recently, we secured strategic investment led by Bezos Expeditions and Nebius Group with participation from Mikhail Parakhin, CTO of Shopify and board advisor to leading GenAI companies, who now serves as our Chairman of the Board. Our remote-first team is globally distributed around the world: USA, UK, the Netherlands, Israel, Czech Republic, Serbia, and more.




About the Role




Technical consultants play a key role in our company, ensuring top-level delivery of our product, its correct configuration, and the deployment of tailored AI data solutions that meet our customers’ needs and deliver an exceptional experience working with us.




As part of this role, you will not only design and implement data labeling pipelines but also act as a trusted technical advisor for our customers - helping them understand their data needs, discover new opportunities, and build scalable AI solutions.




We are looking for a person with more than 3 years of solid technical background, who feels comfortable working in technical environments, solving data-related tasks using Python and AI, and communicating directly with customers. You should be a confident communicator able to engage with both technical and executive stakeholders and collaborate closely with our commercial team.




Responsibilities




1. Client Ownership & Communication




Act as the primary technical point of contact for customers across technical and executive stakeholders.
Lead discovery conversations to deeply understand client goals, problems and quality criteria.
Translate client needs into clear, actionable solution designs and delivery plans.
Advise customers on best practices in data collection, data quality, evaluation, and model training workflows.
Set expectations proactively, communicate progress regularly, and manage risks and trade-offs transparently.
Identify expansion opportunities and additional ways Toloka can create value through data and AI solutions.




2. Solution Design & Delivery




Design end-to-end data solutions using Toloka’s platform, selecting appropriate components, workflows, and quality controls.
Configure data labeling components and quality controls, develop user interfaces and AI-driven tooling (e.g. agentic systems, RAGs, synthetic data generation), and integrate them into end-to-end automated pipelines for AI training and evaluation.
Run experiments and pilots to validate quality, throughput, and cost assumptions.
Lead technical execution during delivery, coordinating internal teams and external stakeholders as needed.
Ensure solutions meet agreed quality, performance, and scalability requirements.




3. End-to-End Ownership & Project Management




Own delivery outcomes holistically - including technical performance, quality, timelines, and financial efficiency.
Monitor key KPIs (e.g. throughput, quality metrics, Gross Margin, Contribution Margin) and act on deviations.
Prioritize work based on customer impact and business value.
Analyze data to identify failure modes, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.
Continuously optimize solutions through iteration, automation, and adoption of new technologies.
Troubleshoot delivery, process, or technical issues in collaboration with support, infrastructure, and product teams.
Drive solutions toward stable operation with minimal ongoing maintenance.




Requirements




Core Experience




Experience as a Solution Engineer, Technical Solutions Engineer, Data Scientist, Data/Systems Analyst, or Technical Project Manager.
Proven experience owning projects end-to-end, including scoping, delivery, and stakeholder management.
Direct experience working with external customers on technical projects (requirements gathering, delivery, iteration).




Technical Skills




Strong Python skills for data manipulation (e.g. NumPy, pandas), natural language processing (e.g. NLTK, spaCy), and building lightweight web services or tools (e.g. FastAPI, Flask).
Solid understanding of ML concepts and data workflows; familiarity with LLMs and prompt engineering is a strong plus.
Experience designing multi-stage pipelines and complex systems.
Understanding of software development fundamentals: version control, testing, MVPs, iterative development etc..
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, ML/AI, Software Engineering, or a related quantitative field such as Physics or Applied Mathematics, with strong analytical foundations.
Ability to reason about trade-offs between quality, speed, cost, and scalability.




Communication & Ownership




Excellent English communication skills (B2+), with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
Confidence working with data engineers, ML engineers, and researchers from leading tech companies.
Strong ownership mindset: comfortable being accountable for outcomes, not just tasks.
Ability to manage multiple projects in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.




Nice to have




Experience with crowdsourcing, expert workflows, or large-scale data labeling.
Experience working on ML training, evaluation, or agentic systems.
Familiarity with quality frameworks, audits, or data validation pipelines.




What we can offer




Freelance collaboration via the Ontop freelance platform.
Flexible, fully remote work schedule.
You’ll have the opportunity to work on highly innovative projects at the leading edge of AI development, together with a genuinely dedicated and dynamic team of experts.
You’ll also be working on projects with customers that are AI industry leaders and well-known household names.
Friendly community.

About the Company

Somos un equipo de cultura cercana y flexible. Tenemos un trato bastante relajado e informal pero sin bajar las expectativas ni exigencias. Trabajamos mucho el bienestar del equipo porque para nosotros es importante cuidarnos.
description:
About the job

CLOSER DE VENTA

Estamos buscando un closer de ventas de alto Valor para trabajar en Edume Global, somos una empresa digital que escala negocios de Coaching y Mentoría, así que debes conocer el mundo digital.

Descripción del Cargo:

Encargado de reuniones vía videollamada con potenciales clientes para cerrar nuestras Ofertas de Alto Valor.

Perfil Requerido:

Closer de Ventas, Licenciada en Administración de Empresas, Finanzas, Marketing Digital o Carreras Afines. 

REQUERIMIENTOS:

Tienes que trabajar en exclusiva con nosotros. No puedes tener proyectos/negocios en paralelo. Trabajaremos para que alcances tus metas financieras dentro de la empresa.
Debes tener 8-10 horas disponibles en calendario al día y tener disposición a trabajar sábados. 
Tener Buena Conexión a Internet y un Computador con Web Cam (no negociable).
Necesitas tener experiencia demostrable en cierre de ventas y negocios online. 
Ser altamente proactiva, analítica, recursiva, que trabaje bajo presión y aprenda rápido.
Conocimiento del mundo de negocios digitales
Compromiso y visión a largo plazo con nosotros (Buscamos alguien que se quede AL MENOS 2-3 años).
Manejo de reportes

ALGUNAS RESPONSABILIDADES:

Convertir la mayor cantidad de leads a ventas al mayor ticket posible
Realizar un seguimiento a las personas que no asisten o no compran en la llamada hasta que respondan o bloquen.
Comunicarse con el cliente de forma semanal y apoyar al área de servicio para la obtención de upsells y referidos.
Mantener el estado de cada lead al día, y registrar cada conversación en el CRM o los sheets correspondientes.
Mantener al día el cobro de cuotas y estado de deudas.
Responder a solicitudes y dudas de prospectos para apoyarlos a tomar una decisión.
Realizar y grabar sesiones de ventas para obtener feedback y mejorar.
Implementar y optimizar el proceso de ventas
Mantener al día los términos y condiciones, o contratos correspondientes.
Asistir a las reuniones correspondientes del área en tiempo y forma y con proactividad.
Actualizar y optimizar las objeciones frecuentes y cómo resolverlas.
Mantener al día los guiones y explicaciones de las ofertas.
Implementar y optimizar los guiones y procesos de venta y seguimiento.
Mantener al día los KPIs y reportes del área.
Brindar feedback al equipo de marketing
Registar y proveer respuestas de la llamada de ventas al equipo de marketing.
Comunicar feedback de razón y origen de los clientes que mas compran y a tickets mas altos.

SOBRE NOSOTROS:

En Edume Global ayudamos a Coaches, Mentores y Consultores a escalar sus Negocios Online a 6 cifras, con Impacto, Libertad y Trascendencia mediante nuestro método Escalling™
Tenemos decenas de Casos de Éxitos de personas a quienes les hemos cambiado la vida por ayudarlos a facturar más con su negocio e impactar con su mensaje. Esto hará que puedas sentirte cómodo/a vendiendo algo que sabes que cambia la vida de las personas.
Somos una empresa motivada, ambiciosa y de rápido crecimiento, por lo que tu potencial de crecimiento también es muy alto.
Nuestro propósito es Impactar a 1 BILLÓN de personas.
Nuestra visión es Ser la Empresa #1 en escalamiento de Negocios Online de Formación desde el SER en Habla Hispana.
Somos un equipo de cultura cercana y flexible. Tenemos un trato bastante relajado e informal pero sin bajar las expectativas ni exigencias. Trabajamos mucho el bienestar del equipo porque para nosotros es importante cuidarnos.

description:
About the job

Fecha límite para apuntarse:

2026-06-24

¿Quieres desarrollar tu carrera profesional? 

BBVA es una empresa global con más de 160 años de historia que opera en más de 25 países en los que damos servicio a más de 80 millones de clientes. Somos más de 121.000 profesionales que trabajamos en equipos multidisciplinares y de perfiles tan diversos como financieros, expertos jurídicos, científicos de datos, desarrolladores, ingenieros o diseñadores.

¿Qué estamos buscando?

Buscamos a una persona experimentada en la gestión de proyectos de implementación de software. Como Product Owner Associate, tendrás la responsabilidad de liderar proyectos de envergadura limitada por su tamaño o criticidad y de desarrollar la visión y ruta de desarrollo de la solución, asegurando que se cumplan los objetivos del área. Si cuentas con la experiencia gestionando únicamente proyectos de implementación de software, ¡esta oportunidad es para ti!.

Principales Responsabilidades


Llevar la gestión de proyectos propios de R&CI de principio a fin (punta a punta).
Coordinar, planificar y priorizar las actividades y tareas relacionadas con el proyecto que se dirige.
Identificar y entender las necesidades e intereses de las partes interesadas (stakeholders) en el desarrollo del proyecto.
Desarrollar la visión, la ruta de desarrollo del proyecto y realizar su lanzamiento.
Estimar el presupuesto, gasto y/o inversión del proyecto.
Gestionar los recursos para conformar el equipo y entender sus necesidades: equipamiento, formación, etc..
Contribuir a definir y dar seguimiento a los KPI's del proyecto, contrastándolos con el Program Manager.


Retos del Puesto

El principal desafío de esta posición radica en tener la capacidad de llevar múltiples proyectos en simultáneo, gestionando equipos grandes (aproximadamente de 10 a 20 recursos) en la implementación de software. Esto requiere un manejo efectivo del trabajo bajo presión y la habilidad para interactuar directamente con partes interesadas (stakeholders) a nivel directivo.

Requisitos

Conocimientos y Experiencia

Conocimientos Obligatorios:


Experiencia mínima de 2 años liderando proyectos de implementación de software.
Conocimiento de la SDA (Estrategia de Desarrollo de Aplicaciones).
Manejo de JIRA.
Conocimiento de Ceremonias Agile.
Creación de KPI's.


Escolaridad:


Ingeniería Industrial o Ingeniería en Sistemas Computacionales, Licenciatura en rama Económico - Administrativa


Experiencia:


Experiencia en la gestión de proyectos con capacidad para coordinar, planificar y priorizar las actividades.


Competencias Clave


Compromiso con las responsabilidades
Comunicación efectiva
Foco en la ejecución


En caso de requerir algún ajuste razonable(1) en tu proceso de selección, comunícalo al reclutador/a en el primer contacto.

En BBVA creemos que contar con un equipo diverso, nos hace ser un mejor banco. Por este motivo apoyamos activamente la diversidad, la inclusión y la igualdad de oportunidades, sin importar cual sea su origen étnico o nacional, sexo, edad, religión, discapacidad, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género, la condición social, la condición de salud, las opiniones, el estado civil o cualquier otra que atente contra la dignidad humana y tenga por objeto anular o menoscabar los derechos y libertades de las personas. Estamos seguros que cultivando un ambiente de trabajo colaborativo e inclusivo podremos mostrar lo mejor de nosotros mismos.


Los ajustes razonables comprenden las modificaciones y/o adaptaciones que podrá hacer la empresa , durante tu proceso de selección, con la finalidad de que puedas llevar a cabo dicho proceso de forma adecuada.


BBVA: Transformando sueños en oportunidades ¿Listo(a) para crear juntos?

description:
About the job

This role is open to candidates based in LATAM, Africa, and Eastern Europe. Please note that as this role supports U.S.-based clients, candidates must be available to work during U.S. business hours aligned with the client’s time zone.

Client Overview

Our client is a rapidly growing restoration and construction services company dedicated to delivering exceptional service to homeowners, property managers, and commercial clients. As the company continues to expand its presence in local markets, they are investing in brand awareness, community engagement, and organic audience growth through social media. They are seeking a Social Media & Content Specialist to help strengthen their digital presence by creating engaging content, building audience relationships, and maintaining a consistent brand voice across multiple social media platforms.

Role Overview

The Social Media & Content Specialist will be responsible for managing the company’s social media presence, creating and repurposing content, increasing organic engagement, growing brand awareness, and supporting content strategy initiatives across multiple platforms. The Social Media & Content Specialist will own day-to-day social media execution while contributing creative ideas, editing content, monitoring performance, and helping build meaningful connections with local audiences. This role is ideal for a creative and organized content professional who enjoys storytelling, audience engagement, and helping brands grow organically through compelling content.

Location

Fully Remote | 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST

Key Responsibilities

Social Media Management


Manage day-to-day activity across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and other relevant social platforms.
Maintain a consistent posting schedule aligned with company objectives.
Monitor comments, direct messages, and engagement opportunities.
Ensure brand consistency across all social media channels.
Support ongoing audience engagement and platform growth efforts.


Content Creation & Repurposing


Edit and repurpose existing photos, videos, project updates, and company content.
Create engaging social media posts, reels, stories, and short-form video content.
Develop content that feels authentic and aligns with brand messaging.
Create content that encourages audience engagement and trust.
Adapt content formats for multiple social platforms and audiences.


Organic Growth & Community Engagement


Implement strategies that increase followers, engagement, and brand visibility.
Engage with industry-related accounts, local businesses, and potential customers.
Build awareness through community interaction and strategic networking.
Identify opportunities to strengthen the company’s online presence.
Foster meaningful engagement with target audiences.


Content Planning & Strategy


Maintain and manage a content calendar.
Identify content opportunities based on projects, company updates, and ongoing activities.
Support content planning aligned with marketing objectives.
Track content performance and recommend improvements.
Contribute creative ideas to improve content effectiveness and engagement.


Reporting & Analytics


Monitor social media performance across platforms.
Provide recurring reporting on follower growth, engagement, reach, and content performance.
Analyze performance trends and identify optimization opportunities.
Recommend content improvements based on engagement metrics and audience behavior.
Support data-driven decision-making for social media initiatives.


Qualifications Experience


2+ years of experience managing social media accounts for businesses.
Experience creating and editing short-form video content.
Experience developing content for business social media channels.
Experience managing multiple social media platforms simultaneously.
Portfolio demonstrating social media growth and content creation results.
Experience supporting audience engagement and organic growth initiatives.
Experience tracking and analyzing social media performance metrics.


Qualifications Skills


Strong copywriting and storytelling abilities.
Proficiency with Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar content creation tools.
Strong understanding of social media best practices and platform algorithms.
Strong content creation and content repurposing capabilities.
Ability to create engaging short-form content across multiple formats.
Ability to manage multiple social media channels simultaneously.
Strong attention to detail and content quality.
Highly organized and deadline-oriented.
Creative mindset with the ability to generate content ideas independently.
Ability to analyze performance data and recommend improvements.
Passion for building brands through content and community engagement.


What Success Looks Like


Social media channels maintain a consistent and professional presence.
Organic follower growth and engagement continue to increase.
High-quality content is published consistently and on schedule.
Audience interaction and community engagement remain strong.
Brand awareness and visibility improve across target markets.
Social media performance data is used to optimize future content strategies.
Content contributes to the company's overall growth and brand recognition.


Opportunity

This is an opportunity to take ownership of a growing company’s social media presence and help shape its digital identity. The Social Media & Content Specialist will have the creative freedom to develop engaging content, build audience relationships, and directly contribute to brand awareness and business growth. This role offers meaningful ownership, creative influence, and the opportunity to make a measurable impact on a growing organization.

Application Process

To be considered for this role these steps need to be followed:


Fill in the application form
Record a video showcasing your skill sets

description:
About the job

✨ IMPORTANT ✨

WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED:

https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED. THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR ENTIRE SHIFT.

PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH




Advanced Agent Marketing Client Success Support Specialist

🆔 Job ID: TIMDEE2

🏢 Industry: Financial and Advisory Services

🌎 Location: LATAM

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

⏰ Work Schedule: The Client Success Support Specialist must be available during Eastern Standard Time business hours, especially during the hours when clients are actively taking apps, attending appointments, and submitting support requests. (9:00am to 5:00pm EST)

💰 Salary: This role pays approximately $10/hour, depending on experience and fit.

🚀 Target Start Date: asap




ROLE OVERVIEW




We are looking for a Client Success Support Specialist to support our Customer Success Managers with client communication, technical questions, CRM updates, app/order tracking, refund and credit-back requests, and basic conflict resolution.

This role is ideal for someone who is tech-savvy, highly organized, strong in written English, and comfortable helping clients work through process or technology-related questions. The right person will be able to communicate clearly, keep accurate records, follow up consistently, and make good decisions without needing step-by-step direction for every situation.




Key Responsibilities




The Client Success Support Specialist will assist the Customer Success team by answering client tech questions, helping clients understand apps and internal processes, and making sure client information is accurately updated in the CRM. This person will help monitor client availability, check integrations, track app/order status, and make sure clients understand how many apps they have remaining in their order.

This role will also help quality-check disposition calls, confirm that clients are following the correct appointment process, and make sure clients complete required Google Sheets or tracking forms after calls. The specialist will communicate with internal team members about apps that have been requested for credit-back, refund review, or additional follow-up.

In addition, this person will support offboarding, document client concerns, and help de-escalate frustrated clients in a professional manner. Common client situations may include refund requests, app credit-back requests, clients saying they were not looking for an annuity, did not want a specific state, had a poor call experience, did not want to join Zoom, or are already working with another advisor.




Core Responsibilities




Client Support

Answer client questions, provide written support, and help resolve basic client issues.

Technical Assistance

Help clients with app-related questions, tool access, integrations, and process confusion.

CRM Updates

Update client records, track availability, document issues, and maintain clean client data.

App & Order Tracking

Make sure clients receive apps on time and understand how many apps remain in their order.

Credit-Back & Refund Support

Track requests, communicate status internally, and gather context needed for review.

Process Follow-Up

Ensure clients follow the appointment process and complete required Google Sheets after calls.

Conflict Resolution

Help diffuse client frustration and escalate issues appropriately when needed.

Offboarding Support

Assist with client offboarding, documentation, and final communication steps.

Required Skills and Experience

The ideal candidate must be comfortable working across multiple systems and communicating quickly with both clients and internal team members. Experience with GoHighLevel/GHL and Slack is required. Strong written English is also important because this role involves client communication, internal updates, and accurate documentation.

We are not looking for someone who is simply “point and shoot.” This person needs to understand the situation, use good judgment, and decide when to resolve an issue directly versus when to escalate it to a Customer Success Manager or backend closer.

description:
About the job

Sobre nosotros

En Koltin, estamos rediseñando la forma en que cuidamos a nuestros papás, mamás, abuelos y abuelas, con el objetivo de ayudarles a mantenerse saludables, activos e independientes durante el mayor tiempo posible. Lo hacemos a través de nuestras membresías de salud, que integran:

Atención clínica enfocada en la prevención
Cobertura médica de gastos mayores
Programas de bienestar y comunidad

Somos la primera empresa en México que protege a personas adultas mayores, desde los 50 hasta los 84 años. Estamos creciendo rápidamente en todo el país, con un propósito claro: transformar la experiencia de salud para las Grandes Personas, haciéndola más humana, accesible y digna.




Sobre el Puesto

Koltin tiene miles de leads que ya conocen el producto, mostraron interés y no compraron. Ese backlog es el activo más eficiente del negocio — el costo de adquisición ya fue pagado. Hoy está subutilizado. Tu trabajo es convertirlo en ventas reales con un sistema data-driven.

Tu meta en septiembre: 860 leads del backlog convertidos en venta — el 56% del total de ventas de Koltin. El rol es 100% data-driven: cada decisión se toma con números. Si construís el sistema y lo hacés escalar, el rol crece con vos.




Responsabilidades

Diseñar la estrategia de reactivación del backlog: segmentación, scoring, mensajes y timing
Construir y mantener el modelo de conversión: analizar variables que predicen quién va a comprar y cuando
Definir las metas de conversión mensuales, medir el funnel end-to-end y reportar a la VP de Growth
Diseñar y optimizar flujos de CRM en HubSpot — automatizaciones, triggers, secuencias — con foco en D+30+
Explorar e implementar herramientas de AI para escalar el contacto sin perder personalización (AI SDR, scoring automatico, generación de mensajes)
Construir dashboards de conversión que le den visibilidad al equipo en tiempo real
Gestionar al ejecutor de CRM: asignar prioridades, revisar calidad de ejecución, dar feedback
Trabajar con el equipo de ventas para asegurar que los leads que pasan estén listos para cerrar
Construir el playbook de lifecycle — documentado y automatizado — que escale sin depender de vos




Eres un buen fit si eres una persona que tiene

3+ años en CRM, lifecycle o growth con foco en conversión
Experiencia construyendo flujos de nurturing y automatizaciones desde cero
Manejo avanzado de HubSpot u otra herramienta de CRM
Sólido en análisis de datos: sabes leer un funnel, identificar dónde se cae la conversión y actuar sobre eso
SQL o Python para análisis propio — no dependes de un analista para cada pregunta
Experiencia con herramientas de BI (Metabase, Looker, Power BI o similar)
Conocimiento o curiosidad real en AI aplicada a CRM: scoring automático, AI SDR, generación de mensajes
Experiencia liderando equipos pequeños o coordinando colaboradores
Mentalidad de dueño: te importa el resultado, no la actividad
Deseable: experiencia en salud, seguros o productos de alto ticket




Que te ofrecemos

Rol con impacto directo en el negocio — tus decisiones se ven en los números la semana siguiente
Equipo chico, decisión rápida, sin burocracia
Crecimiento real: este rol tiene proyección clara hacia liderazgo de toda el área de Lifecycle
Remoto 100% — trabajo asíncrono con reuniones sincrónicas focalizadas
Sueldo competitivo + variable por meta de conversión




Cómo medimos tu éxito

Leads del backlog convertidos en venta (meta mensual creciente)
Tasa de conversión D+30+ mes a mes
Calidad de los modelos y dashboards que construir — el equipo toma decisiones con tus datos
Adopción de automatizaciones y AI que escalan el contacto sin aumentar headcount
Autonomía y calidad del equipo que desarrollas




Beneficios residiendo en México

🎓 Acceso a herramientas y beneficios para tu crecimiento profesional, como cursos, talleres, libros, etc.
💊 Asistencia médica privada por videollamada (médico general, nutriólogo y psicólogo) ilimitado para ti y 3 familiares

title: Customer Support Specialist
skills: Answering all incoming customer calls professionally — guiding sellers through the vehicle listing and auction process using approved scripts and resources.
Quickly locating customer accounts in the CRM during live calls — navigating seller information in real time to provide accurate, context-aware support.
Monitoring and responding to customer support emails throughout the day — routing complex requests to the appropriate Listing Representative when needed.
Documenting every customer interaction in the CRM — adding detailed notes, updating records, and keeping all information organized and current.
Communicating with Listing Representatives about conversations requiring follow-up — providing complete context so handoffs are always seamless.
Escalating complex situations with clarity and precision — knowing when to resolve independently and when to hand off.
Excellent verbal and written English — confident, clear, and professional on every call and in every email.
Friendly, patient, and genuinely customer-focused personality — you enjoy helping people and it shows.
Comfortable with high volumes of incoming calls — composed and consistent even during busy periods.
Strong CRM proficiency or proven ability to learn new platforms quickly — navigating systems efficiently during live calls.
Ability to multitask between calls, emails, and CRM documentation without losing accuracy or quality.
Ability to follow scripts while maintaining a natural, conversational tone throughout every interaction.
Previous experience in customer service, call center, virtual assistant, or sales support preferred.
Full availability for the required schedule: Monday through Saturday, 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM Pacific Time.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.
💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
🚗 A stable, high-growth environment inside a fast-moving online vehicle sales platform.
🤝 A collaborative, supportive culture through Veta Virtual and our client where your communication skills are valued from day one.
description:
About the job

Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual! 🚀




💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 🚗 Online Vehicle Sales Industry | 🤝 Customer-Facing Support Role




🕘 Schedule: Monday through Saturday — 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM Pacific Time (7 hours/day).




Veta Virtual is hiring a Customer Support Specialist for a high-growth client in the online vehicle sales and automotive marketplace industry. This is a customer-first role for someone who is friendly, professional, and energized by guiding people through a process with clarity and confidence.




🔑 Your Role:




You will be the first point of contact for vehicle sellers — answering calls and emails, guiding customers through the listing process, and coordinating with the internal Listing Team for seamless follow-up. Your day-to-day will involve:




Answering all incoming customer calls professionally — guiding sellers through the vehicle listing and auction process using approved scripts and resources.
Quickly locating customer accounts in the CRM during live calls — navigating seller information in real time to provide accurate, context-aware support.
Monitoring and responding to customer support emails throughout the day — routing complex requests to the appropriate Listing Representative when needed.
Documenting every customer interaction in the CRM — adding detailed notes, updating records, and keeping all information organized and current.
Communicating with Listing Representatives about conversations requiring follow-up — providing complete context so handoffs are always seamless.
Escalating complex situations with clarity and precision — knowing when to resolve independently and when to hand off.




✅ What You'll Need:




Excellent verbal and written English — confident, clear, and professional on every call and in every email.
Friendly, patient, and genuinely customer-focused personality — you enjoy helping people and it shows.
Comfortable with high volumes of incoming calls — composed and consistent even during busy periods.
Strong CRM proficiency or proven ability to learn new platforms quickly — navigating systems efficiently during live calls.
Ability to multitask between calls, emails, and CRM documentation without losing accuracy or quality.
Ability to follow scripts while maintaining a natural, conversational tone throughout every interaction.
Previous experience in customer service, call center, virtual assistant, or sales support preferred.
Full availability for the required schedule: Monday through Saturday, 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM Pacific Time.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:




💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
🚗 A stable, high-growth environment inside a fast-moving online vehicle sales platform.
🤝 A collaborative, supportive culture through Veta Virtual and our client where your communication skills are valued from day one.




Ready to Apply?




If you are ready to be the voice that guides customers through the vehicle selling process and grow with a fast-moving team in the online automotive space — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual. 




Once you apply, you will complete a short 2-minute video question as your first chance to show us your communication style and energy. We can't wait to meet you!

description:
About the job

Job Title: Zoho Automation Specialist

Location: Remote (LATAM)

Salary Range: Up to $2,500 USD/month

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST




We are seeking a Zoho Automation Specialist to own workflow automation, CRM optimization, and business process improvement initiatives across multiple business units. This role is responsible for designing, building, and deploying scalable solutions using Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, and Zoho Flow to improve operational efficiency and support business growth.




The ideal candidate has hands-on experience implementing Zoho-based solutions, gathering business requirements, automating workflows, and training end users. This is a highly autonomous role for someone who can independently identify opportunities, execute solutions, and drive adoption across teams.




Key Responsibilities

Own workflow analysis and process improvement initiatives across multiple business units.
Design and implement automation solutions using Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, and Zoho Flow.
Gather business requirements through stakeholder interviews and process discovery sessions.
Translate operational needs into scalable technical solutions.
Build, test, deploy, and optimize automation workflows and system integrations.
Create documentation, SOPs, and training materials for implemented solutions.
Train end users and support adoption of new workflows and systems.
Monitor automation performance and identify opportunities for continuous improvement.

About the job

Job Summary

Responsible for supporting all channel customers by providing exemplary proactive order management support. Responsibilities may be, but not limited to: order entry, simple to difficult order and project management, intake of all customer inquiries and resolution ownership of any task, regardless of domain. Candidate should continually seek opportunities to broaden customer relationships by ensuring customer requirements and expectations are exceeded. Candidate should expect to become an expert capable of training and teaching others. Expect to be responsible for documenting knowledge and process.




Key Tasks & Responsibilities (Essential Functions)

Provide standard target pricing when requested; Provide guidance and support when non-standard pricing is required
Provide internal and external crossover support when requested
