description:
About the job

Are you a highly motivated person ready to excel in sales while helping change a million lives?

Do you aim for excellence, professional growth, and continuous improvement every day?

If your answer is a resounding YES!!! — then this opportunity is for you!

About Us

In Mangone Law Firm, excellence is intentional, quality is uncompromised, and going above and beyond is part of who we are.

Mangone Law Firm, LLC is a New Jersey-based immigration law firm that has been dedicated since 2012 to helping new Americans obtain legal status in the U.S. We proudly represent immigrants nationwide and are fully committed to excellence in customer service — deeply understanding our clients' challenges and genuinely caring about their outcomes. We're fueled by a strong corporate culture and clear core values. We're prepared for a bright future and we're looking for talented people who want to grow professionally and never settle for stagnation.

🌟 We're an Inc. 5000 Honoree! 🌟

Mangone Law Firm is proud to be recognized on the 2025 Inc. 5000 list of America's fastest-growing private companies! This honor celebrates our team's resilience, innovation, and dedication to delivering outstanding results for our clients — even in the most challenging times.

When you join Mangone Law Firm, you become part of a thriving, forward-moving team that's committed to growth, excellence, and making an impact every single day. If you're driven, proactive, and ready to grow with a company that's nationally recognized for its success — we invite you to apply and build your career with us!

We're looking for enthusiastic and talented Sales Team Member to join our dynamic team!

Requirements


 Bilingual (English - Spanish) 
 At least 6 months of proven experience selling products or services. Experience with intangible offerings — like consulting, insurance, or telecommunications — is a big plus! 
 Strong negotiation and closing skills, with a focus on building trust and long-term client relationships through personalized solutions. 
 Results-driven with a strong focus on achieving and exceeding monthly performance goals, consistently aligning daily execution with strategic targets and measurable outcomes
 Excellent communication and customer service skills — you know how to build genuine connections and convey clear, persuasive messages in writing and in person, tailored to different audiences. 
 Availability: Flexible schedule — you're willing to work various shifts as needed. 


In this role, you will:


 Support our sales team in capturing and following up on leads. 
 Provide exceptional customer service, answering questions and delivering accurate information. 
 Build long-lasting relationships with potential and existing customers. 
 Learn about the immigration process and the services we proudly offer. 


Benefits

What we offer you:


 Competitive compensation: Base hourly pay between $5-$7 USD/hour
 Ongoing professional development to keep growing your skills and advancing your career. 
 A dynamic, challenging work environment where your talent will be recognized and rewarded. 
 The chance to make a meaningful difference — helping people achieve their dreams of a better life in the United States. 
 Paid Time Off after twelve months. 
Complete Remote work

About the Role

We are looking for fluent language professionals to help train and evaluate AI language models. This is a flexible, part-time contract role you can do entirely from home, on your own schedule. If you work with language professionally - as a writer, teacher, translator, tutor, linguist, or language specialist - this role is a strong fit.

Read and evaluate AI-generated text for quality, accuracy, and fluency

💼 We’re Hiring: Customer Service

📋 Job Information

Job Title: Customer Service

Job ID: VR800

Location: MX

Work Schedule & Shift Assignment:

Our business operates 7 days a week, and we offer multiple shift schedules to meet client demands. Available shifts include (all times in PST):

5:00 AM – 2:00 PM

7:00 AM – 4:00 PM

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

11:00 AM – 8:00 PM




Rest Day/Days Off:

Vary depending on client need

Common rest days include: Mon–Sun, Tue–Wed, Thu–Fri

Sat–Sun off is a possibility depending on the schedule required by the client

Compensation: $750

Target Start Date: ASAP




🧩 Job Description

Handle inbound calls for U.S.-based home services businesses such as cleaning companies, electricians, plumbers, landscapers, etc.

Represent the client as if you are part of their office team, answering calls pleasantly with a smile and using the client’s standard greeting

Take detailed call summary notes during each conversation, including customer contact information, reason for inquiry, and any other relevant information

Send complete and accurate call summary notes to the client after each call

Maintain high attention to detail to avoid typos or missing information

Training will be provided on answering questions and booking appointments using the client’s CRM/scheduling platform

Internet speed of at least 40 Mbps with low latency

Computer with at least 6 cores, 12 threads, and 8 GB RAM

Working Qualifications:

Previous BPO or call center experience preferred

Ability to multitask: handle calls, take detailed notes, and send follow-up messages or emails

Confident in communicating directly with U.S.-based clients to confirm directions or receive feedback.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in all tasks

Motivated, hard-working, and eager to add value

Willingness to learn and adapt to client processes

Experience working from home is a plus but not required

Submit your application today and take the first step toward your next great opportunity!

title: Customer Support and Sales Specialist
skills: When selecting the position during your application, please choose “Brand Concierge” from the list of available roles.
In the application form, you’ll be asked for an application code – please enter CSSS in that field.
Customer Success & Retention (Support Focus)
Expert Problem Solving: Serve as the primary point of contact for complex customer inquiries, providing timely and accurate solutions via chat, email, and phone.
Service Excellence: Maintain high customer satisfaction (CSAT) scores by troubleshooting product issues, guiding users through features, and ensuring rapid resolution.
Proactive Support: Identify potential churn risks and implement proactive communication strategies to retain customers and drive long-term loyalty.
Revenue Generation & Expansion (Sales Focus)
Opportunity Identification: Actively listen to customer needs and pain points to identify and present upsell or cross-sell opportunities for premium features, services, and expanded contracts.
Negotiation & Closure: Manage the end-to-end sales process for qualified expansion leads, leading product demonstrations, negotiating terms, and closing deals to hit monthly revenue targets.
Product Education: Become a product expert, effectively articulating the ROI and value proposition of our solutions to help customers see the path to greater success.
Hybrid Experience: 1+ years of proven, hands-on experience in a combined Customer Support, Customer Success, or Inside Sales role, ideally within a SaaS or E-commerce environment.
Communication Mastery: Exceptional professional verbal and written communication skills with the ability to maintain composure under pressure and clearly articulate value.
Tech Proficiency: Familiarity with CRM (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce) and Helpdesk software (e.g., Zendesk, Intercom).
Metrics Driven: Motivation to meet and exceed KPIs related to both service quality (CSAT, Resolution Time) and sales revenue (Expansion Quota).
E-commerce Acumen: Understanding of e-commerce business operations, common challenges, and the importance of customer service in the digital retail ecosystem.
Incentive Pay: Competitive base salary plus an aggressive commission structure and bonuses tied directly to expansion and retention revenue.
Work Flexibility: 100% permanent work-from-home setup—zero commute required.
Benefits: Comprehensive health coverage (HMO or monthly stipend) and generous paid time off.
Growth: Clear paths for career advancement into Customer Success Management, Account Management, or Senior Sales roles.
A reliable personal computer or laptop (i5 processor or modern equivalent).
A stable, high-speed, and reliable wired internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps download and upload speed) for crystal-clear video calls.
A quiet, professional workspace suitable for conducting clear, uninterrupted customer interactions.

About the job

Customer Support and Sales Specialist | Remote (E-commerce Success Specialist)

Be the Strategic Face of the Brand: Support, Retain, and Grow Revenue.

TalentPop App is the strategic partner to high-growth e-commerce brands, helping them optimize every customer interaction. We are looking for a hybrid, results-driven Customer Support and Sales Specialist—a role where you own the customer experience from initial contact through retention and expansion.

This is a vital, dual-focus position for a professional who is equally adept at solving complex problems (Support) and identifying commercial opportunities (Sales). If you are motivated by providing world-class service while actively contributing to measurable revenue growth through upselling, cross-selling, and retention, we want you on our team.

IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: APPLICATION FAST-TRACK!

To ensure your application is reviewed by the **Recruitment Team**, you must follow these critical steps exactly. **Applications that do not choose 'Brand Concierge' and enter the correct code WILL NOT be reviewed.**


When selecting the position during your application, please choose “Brand Concierge” from the list of available roles.
In the application form, you’ll be asked for an application code – please enter CSSS in that field.


Your Dual-Impact Responsibilities: Support and Sales Growth

You will bridge the gap between service and sales, directly influencing customer loyalty and revenue expansion.


 Customer Success & Retention (Support Focus)
Expert Problem Solving: Serve as the primary point of contact for complex customer inquiries, providing timely and accurate solutions via chat, email, and phone.
Service Excellence: Maintain high customer satisfaction (CSAT) scores by troubleshooting product issues, guiding users through features, and ensuring rapid resolution.

 Revenue Generation & Expansion (Sales Focus)

Negotiation & Closure: Manage the end-to-end sales process for qualified expansion leads, leading product demonstrations, negotiating terms, and closing deals to hit monthly revenue targets.
Product Education: Become a product expert, effectively articulating the ROI and value proposition of our solutions to help customers see the path to greater success.


What You Bring: The Service-to-Sales Skillset

We are seeking a professional with a proven background in high-touch customer interaction and a clear sales orientation.


Hybrid Experience: 1+ years of proven, hands-on experience in a combined Customer Support, Customer Success, or Inside Sales role, ideally within a SaaS or E-commerce environment.
Communication Mastery: Exceptional professional verbal and written communication skills with the ability to maintain composure under pressure and clearly articulate value.
Tech Proficiency: Familiarity with CRM (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce) and Helpdesk software (e.g., Zendesk, Intercom).
Metrics Driven: Motivation to meet and exceed KPIs related to both service quality (CSAT, Resolution Time) and sales revenue (Expansion Quota).
E-commerce Acumen: Understanding of e-commerce business operations, common challenges, and the importance of customer service in the digital retail ecosystem.


Our Commitment to You: Rewards and Flexibility

We invest in specialists who are key to our customer and revenue growth.


Incentive Pay: Competitive base salary plus an aggressive commission structure and bonuses tied directly to expansion and retention revenue.
Work Flexibility: 100% permanent work-from-home setup—zero commute required.
Benefits: Comprehensive health coverage (HMO or monthly stipend) and generous paid time off.
Growth: Clear paths for career advancement into Customer Success Management, Account Management, or Senior Sales roles.


Technical Setup Requirements (Remote)


A reliable personal computer or laptop (i5 processor or modern equivalent).
A stable, high-speed, and reliable wired internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps download and upload speed) for crystal-clear video calls.
A quiet, professional workspace suitable for conducting clear, uninterrupted customer interactions.

About the job

🌟 Operations & Customer Support Specialist

🆔 Job ID: ALERIC1

🏢 Industry: Product Development, Manufacturing & Supply Chain Management

🌎 Location: LATAM (Spanish Required)

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

💰 Salary: $8 - $9 per hour

🚀 Target Start Date: ASAP







Role Overview 📌

About the Client

The client is a premier global product development, manufacturing, and supply chain management firm with over 25 years of experience delivering high-quality product solutions worldwide. While we specialize heavily as a top-tier manufacturer and distributor of air purification systems, our broader expertise lies in empowering businesses by streamlining the entire product lifecyle—from identifying the right global manufacturers and overseeing production to managing complex international shipping, importing, and final delivery.

About the Role

This isn’t a rigid, repetitive call-center gig. As our Operations and Customer Support Specialist, you will serve as the operational backbone of a lean, entrepreneurial team. You’ll be the warm, professional voice that US distributors trust over the phone and the detail-oriented partner managing daily financial transactions and orders in QuickBooks.

We are specifically looking for an active contributor, not a bystander. Because we operate as a tight team, you won’t just be following a script. We believe every team member should bring their brain to the table to help solve problems, build efficient processes, and directly impact our day-to-day operations. If you thrive in a collaborative, close-knit environment where your voice actually matters, you will love it here.

Key Responsibilities ✅

B2B Customer Service

Answer incoming phone calls from US-based distributors.
Assist distributors with order placement, product inquiries, and general support.
Build and maintain strong, professional relationships across our business network.

Operations & QuickBooks Management

Process and manage incoming orders accurately through QuickBooks.
Handle daily financial maintenance tasks, including processing payments.
Collaborate directly with ownership on a daily task list to keep business workflows moving smoothly.
Proactively look for ways to streamline workflows and suggest process improvements.

Reactive Digital Support

Perform basic, occasional website updates or maintenance if needed (no coding or development required).
Monitor inbound messages on social media channels (like Facebook) to ensure client inquiries are answered promptly. (Note: You will not be responsible for content creation, marketing, or running social media campaigns).

Qualifications & Skills 🎯

Experience

3–5+ years of experience in customer service, operations, or administrative support.

Bilingual Mastery

Flawless written and spoken English and Spanish (essential for communicating with our US customer base).

Tech Savvy

Proficient with QuickBooks (or similar accounting/ERP software) and comfortable picking up basic digital tools.

B2B Dynamics

Comfortable navigating business-to-business customer service and distributor environments.

Experience working with Medium Voltage (MV) and Low Voltage (LV) products and quotations is required.
Highly adept in SAP, Salesforce (or similar CRM platforms), and Microsoft Excel.
You are passionate about customer satisfaction, proactive communication, organization, collaboration, and problem-solving.
Degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Electromechanical Engineering, or Industrial Engineering.
You are at ease communicating in English and Spanish, with advanced English proficiency.
You must be legally authorized to work in Mexico and be based in Mexico City (CDMX). No relocation support is available for this position.
description:
About the job

En ABB, ayudamos a las industrias a funcionar de forma más eficiente y limpia, y cada una de las personas que trabajan aquí lo hace posible. Estarás capacitado para liderar, apoyado para crecer y orgulloso del impacto que creamos juntos. Únete a nosotros y ayuda a que funcione lo que hace funcionar el mundo.

Este Puesto Reporta a

Service Sales Support Manager

__

Your Role And Responsibilities

In this role, you will have the opportunity to provide technical, order, and payment-related assistance/support to the internal and external customers. Each day, you will coordinate with relevant stakeholders to obtain complete case ownership. You will also showcase your expertise by improving customer satisfaction.

The work model for the role is: #L-hybrid  (3 days in office) – Mexico City, Mexico.

This role is contributing to the Electrification Business in Mexico. Main stakeholders are Sales, Operations, Supply Chain Management, Credit & Collections, After-Sales Service, Spare Parts teams, and customers.

You Will Be Mainly Accountable For


Ensuring the resolution of customer issues by coordinating with Sales, Operations, Supply Chain Management, and other internal and/or external teams.
Recommending appropriate solution for customer requests and coordinating with the related teams to ensure end-to-end handling of the request (e.g., production capability and scheduling, resourcing, quotes, price lists, invoice, etc.) is in place.
Keeping the customers proactively informed on the issue status based on the inputs received and clarifying their doubts.
Preparing and analyzing regular statistics (e.g., forecast) using available tools and collecting additional relevant information and tracking regular sales performance against the target and sharing insights with the management.


Our team dynamics

You will join a dynamic, collaborative, and customer-focused team, where you will have the opportunity to work cross-functionally, build strong stakeholder relationships, and contribute to business growth while delivering an exceptional customer experience.

Qualifications For The Role


You are highly skilled in quotation management, customer service, sales support, and post-sales operations within the electrical equipment and industrial solutions market.
You have 3+ years of experience in customer support, quotations, sales operations, or post-sales service.
Experience working with Medium Voltage (MV) and Low Voltage (LV) products and quotations is required.
Highly adept in SAP, Salesforce (or similar CRM platforms), and Microsoft Excel.
You are passionate about customer satisfaction, proactive communication, organization, collaboration, and problem-solving.
Degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Electromechanical Engineering, or Industrial Engineering.
You are at ease communicating in English and Spanish, with advanced English proficiency.
You must be legally authorized to work in Mexico and be based in Mexico City (CDMX). No relocation support is available for this position.


Construir un futuro más limpio e inteligente requiere todo tipo de mentes: las curiosas, las valientes y las creativas. Por eso acogemos a personas de todos los orígenes y experiencias.

¿Listo para causar impacto?

Presenta tu candidatura hoy mismo o visita https://www.abb.com para saber más sobre el impacto de nuestras soluciones en todo el mundo.

description:
About the job

Partner with the best

Baker Hughes es una empresa global de tecnología energética que presta servicios al sector del petróleo y el gas en más de 120 países. La organización Comercial y de Ventas impulsa el crecimiento mediante la creación de sólidas alianzas con los clientes, la comercialización de hidrocarburos y la oferta de soluciones integradas de equipos y servicios. Centrándose en la transformación digital y la transición energética, el equipo aprovecha los conocimientos basados en datos para optimizar el rendimiento de las ventas y maximizar el valor para el cliente.

Fuel your passion

El responsable del servicio de soluciones integradas dirige y coordina todo el trabajo de Baker Hughes en el pozo. Es el punto de contacto de Baker Hughes para el cliente y dirige todos los elementos de los productos, servicios y contratistas de Baker Hughes en el pozo. El objetivo principal es impulsar y garantizar un desempeño impecable en materia de salud, seguridad y medio ambiente, la entrega puntual y la excelencia constante en la prestación de servicios.

Responsabilidades esenciales:



 Dirige las operaciones integradas de Baker Hughes en la plataforma en estrecha colaboración con el operador, el contratista de la plataforma y cualquier otro tercero. Supervisa las operaciones de acuerdo con el programa de actividades del pozo.
 Coordina y capacita a todo el personal de Baker Hughes en las actividades de HSE (Salud, Seguridad y Medio Ambiente) de la plataforma, la planificación operativa y la ejecución de los trabajos. Es la primera línea de apoyo y referencia técnica para el personal de Baker Hughes en alta mar que realiza las tareas en el sitio del pozo.
 Se asegura de que el proyecto se ejecute de manera segura, conforme a las normas y eficiente.
 Es el punto de contacto de Baker Hughes para el cliente en el sitio del pozo. Participa en revisiones de operaciones, reuniones de seguridad y de operaciones matutinas, etc.
 Ingresa puntualmente en Job-Center las actividades de Soluciones Integradas y aporta información oportuna para los informes DBR, la evaluación de KPI y los planes de mejora.
 Es responsable de la demanda, planificación y coordinación del personal en alta mar/en tierra (cuando corresponda).
 Optimiza la utilización de los recursos humanos de Baker Hughes en alta mar/en tierra (cuando corresponda).
 Utiliza de manera eficiente el centro de operaciones remotas durante las operaciones (si corresponde).
 Dirige las investigaciones sobre fallas en los equipos de Baker Hughes en alta mar, elabora informes y los comunica según corresponda.
 Se asegura de que se recopilen y se implementen las lecciones aprendidas y las mejores prácticas.



Requisitos y cualificaciones:



 Título de licenciatura/Ingenieria en Mécanica, Petrolera o en un campo afín. (Una amplia experiencia puede compensar la falta de formación académica.)
 Más de 8 años de experiencia relevante en la industria del petróleo y el gas.
 Más de 8 años de experiencia Onshore y Offshore
 Experiencia como jefe de equipo
 Boletas y/o referencias de los últimos años de experiencia laboral
 Conocimiento exhaustivo de las operaciones de servicio de campo, instalación y mantenimiento.
 Competencia para planificar, resolver problemas, organizar, dirigir y controlar operaciones complejas.
 Buenas habilidades de comunicación.
 Buenas habilidades organizativas.
 Maneja el inglés escrito y oral como idioma de trabajo.
 Promueve una cultura de colaboración y trabajo en equipo entre múltiples líneas de productos, funciones, regiones y partes externas.



Características y habilidades deseadas:



 Sólidas habilidades de liderazgo situacional.
 Buenos conocimientos de informática.
 Buenas habilidades de presentación.
 Estructurado.



Work in a way that works for you

Reconocemos que cada persona es diferente y que la forma en que cada uno quiere trabajar y dar lo mejor de sí también varía de una persona a otra. En este puesto, podemos ofrecerte los siguientes modelos de trabajo flexibles:

Working with us

Nuestra gente es el corazón de lo que hacemos en Baker Hughes. Sabemos que somos mejores cuando todo nuestro personal se desarrolla, se involucra y puede ser él mismo en el trabajo. Invertimos en la salud y el bienestar de nuestra fuerza laboral, capacitamos y recompensamos el talento, y desarrollamos líderes en todos los niveles para sacar lo mejor de cada uno.

Working for you

Nuestras innovaciones han revolucionado el sector energético durante más de un siglo. Pero para seguir avanzando en el futuro, sabemos que hoy debemos superar los límites. Priorizamos recompensar a quienes abrazan el cambio con un paquete que refleja cuánto valoramos su aporte. Únete a nosotros y podrás contar con:



 Políticas modernas de equilibrio entre el trabajo y la vida personal, y actividades de bienestar
 Opciones integrales de atención médica privada
 Red de seguridad con seguros de vida y programas de discapacidad
 Programas financieros personalizados
 Beneficios adicionales opcionales o voluntarios



About Us

Con operaciones en más de 120 países, ofrecemos mejores soluciones a nuestros clientes y mayores oportunidades a nuestra gente. Como socio líder del sector energético, estamos comprometidos a alcanzar emisiones netas de carbono cero para el 2050 y siempre estamos buscando a las personas adecuadas que nos ayuden a lograrlo. Personas que compartan nuestra misma pasión por hacer que la energía sea más segura, más limpia y más eficiente.

Join Us

¿Estás buscando una oportunidad para marcar una diferencia real en una empresa con alcance global y servicios y clientes interesantes? ¡Únete a nosotros y crece junto a un equipo de personas que te motivarán e inspirarán!

The Baker Hughes internal title for this role is: Service Pusher II - Integrated Solutions

About Us:

We are an energy technology company that provides solutions to energy and industrial customers worldwide. Built on a century of experience and conducting business in over 120 countries, our innovative technologies and services are taking energy forward – making it safer, cleaner and more efficient for people and the planet.

Join Us:

Are you seeking an opportunity to make a real difference in a company that values innovation and progress? Join us and become part of a team of people who will challenge and inspire you! Let’s come together and take energy forward.

Baker Hughes Company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.

description:
About the job

Syntax is a leading Managed Cloud Provider for Mission Critical Enterprise Applications and has been providing comprehensive technology solutions to businesses of all sizes since 1972. Syntax has undisputed strength to implement and manage ERP deployments (Oracle, SAP) in a secure and resilient private, public or hybrid cloud. With strong technical and functional consulting services, and world-class monitoring and automation, Syntax serves some of North America’s largest corporations across a diverse range of industries. Syntax has offices worldwide, and partners with Oracle, SAP, AWS, Microsoft, IBM and other global technology leaders.

Customer Support Specialist

Position Summary

The Customer Support Specialist is responsible for providing exceptional support to customers by addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring a positive customer experience. This role serves as a primary point of contact for customers and works closely with internal teams to deliver timely and effective solutions.

Key Responsibilities


Respond to customer inquiries via phone, email, chat, and support ticketing systems.
Troubleshoot and resolve customer issues in a timely and professional manner.
Document customer interactions, issues, and resolutions accurately.
Escalate complex issues to appropriate internal teams when necessary.
Monitor and manage support tickets to ensure service level agreements (SLAs) are met.
Educate customers on products, services, features, and best practices.
Identify recurring issues and provide feedback to improve products, services, and processes.
Maintain a high level of customer satisfaction and professionalism in all interactions.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Sales, Operations, Product, and Technical Support.
Contribute to the development and maintenance of knowledge base articles and support documentation.


Required Qualifications


Bachelor's degree or equivalent work experience.
1–3 years of experience in Customer Service, Customer Support, Help Desk, or a related role.
Strong verbal and written communication skills.
Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting abilities.
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.
Proficiency with Microsoft Office and CRM/ticketing platforms.


Preferred Qualifications


Experience with Salesforce, Zendesk, ServiceNow, Freshdesk, or similar support tools.
Experience supporting SaaS, technology, telecommunications, financial services, or professional services customers.
Bilingual skills (English required; additional languages are a plus).
Experience working in a customer-centric environment with defined service metrics and SLAs.


Why Syntax?

Become a part of our success story and work in a company with exciting innovation projects that are causing a stir across the industry. We recently launched one of the world's most advanced manufacturing facilities based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud for Execution - for Smart Press Shop, a pioneering joint venture between Porsche and forming specialist Schuler.


Competitive, above-average compensation
Global tourist: With us, you can also work from abroad from time to time
Flexible working time models, home office
Attractive benefits, e.g. company pension scheme or various health offers
A modern environment in which the "you" is part of it
Open feedback culture, flat hierarchies and a motivated team
Individual career planning with continuous training and coaching on the job


You see a personal challenge in this responsible task? Apply now - and become part of the SYNTAX team!

Job Summary

We are seeking a seasoned finance professional with strong experience in business partnering, strategic financial support, and long-term planning. This role will play a critical part in guiding business strategy and supporting the organization’s transformation toward Software, Services, and SaaS-based business models.

 Impacts large functions and leads large, cross-division functional teams or projects.

title: Customer Service Wholesale
location: Cuajimalpa de Morelos, Mexico City, Mexico (Hybrid)
description:
About the job

¡Te invitamos a unirte a un equipo dinámico!




Somos una marca líder en el mundo deportivo que inspira a atletas y entusiastas a alcanzar su máximo potencial. Si compartes nuestra pasión por la excelencia, la innovación y el deseo de superar límites, esta es tu oportunidad para unirte a un equipo dinámico y lleno de energía.

 

Estamos buscando “CUSTOMER SERVICE JUNIOR PARA CANAL DE VENTA WHOLESALE”




 El objetivo principal del rol es garantizar una atención clara, oportuna y eficiente, fungiendo como el principal punto de contacto para resolver dudas, incidencias y requerimientos de las cuentas actuales de Wholesale, Sporting Goods y Tactical, así como de futuras cuentas que puedan integrarse al negocio.




Experiencia: Un año de experiencia en atención a clientes de venta mayoreo. Seguimiento a pedidos y devoluciones. Carga de órdenes de compra en portales, verificación de stock, coordinación de entregas, aclaración de facturas, solución a incidencias de retrasos. 




Conocimientos:

· Manejo de Excel intermedio-avanzado.

· Manejo de ERP (SAP, Oracle o similar).

· Conocimiento de procesos logísticos, inventarios y facturación.

· Manejo de portales de clientes y carga de órdenes de compra.

· Inglés avanzado.

 

Actividades:

Atención y servicio al cliente

· Dar seguimiento a pedidos, devoluciones, aclaraciones de facturación y solicitudes especiales.

· Mantener comunicación constante con clientes, tiendas y plataformas digitales, brindando información clara y actualizada.

· Asegurar una experiencia de servicio alineada con los estándares de la marca.

· Fungir como punto de contacto principal para resolver dudas e incidencias de las cuentas asignadas.

2.Gestión y seguimiento operativo

· Monitorear el flujo completo del pedido desde su colocación hasta la entrega.

· Resolver de manera proactiva incidencias relacionadas con retrasos logísticos, diferencias de inventario, cambios de producto y problemas de entrega.

· Dar seguimiento a órdenes pendientes y asegurar su cierre oportuno.

· Registrar en sistema toda la información relevante relacionada con pedidos, comunicaciones y soluciones implementadas.

· Cargar órdenes de compra en portales y sistemas internos.

· Realizar revisiones de inventario disponible y apoyar en la asignación de producto.

3.Coordinación interna

· Trabajar en conjunto con las áreas de Logística, Finanzas, Marketing, Ventas y Supply Chain para asegurar respuestas ágiles y efectivas.

· Escalar oportunamente riesgos o situaciones críticas que puedan impactar el nivel de servicio.

· Dar seguimiento a procesos de crédito, facturación y documentación requerida por los clientes.

4.Soporte comercial

· Apoyar al equipo comercial en actividades administrativas y operativas.

· Dar seguimiento a lanzamientos, promociones y proyectos especiales con clientes.

· Elaborar y actualizar reportes de ventas, inventarios y estatus de pedidos.

· Identificar oportunidades de mejora en procesos y proponer acciones para incrementar la eficiencia operativa.

· Contribuir al cumplimiento de los niveles de servicio (SLA) y los objetivos comerciales del canal.

 

Ofrecemos: 

Sueldo competitivo

Prestaciones Superiores y de ley

Fondo de ahorro 

Vales de despensa 

Vales de alimentos 

Seguro de Vida

Gastos médicos mayores 

Contratación directa por la empresa

 

Zona de trabajo: Santa Fe, modalidad de trabajo híbrido.

Responsabilidades

title: Growth Marketer
skills: Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.
Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience.
Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.
description:
About the job

Growth Marketer

Seneca Cost Segregation · Remote · Salary: $2000-$3000/month + Target based bounus




About Seneca

We help real estate investors keep more of their money. Cost segregation is a tax strategy that accelerates depreciation and puts cash back in our clients’ hands, often six figures in Year 1. We’ve performed over 10,200 studies and analyzed more than $1B in cost basis, and we’ve never lost an IRS audit.

We’re a lean, fast-growing team scaling toward $5–10M. That means real ownership, real budget, and real impact from day one. No layers, no politics, no waiting for permission.




The Role

We’re hiring a Growth Marketer to own the full marketing funnel, from first touch to qualified pipeline. You’ll build the nurture and conversion systems that turn leads into sales conversations, sharpen our paid channels, and create the reporting that tells us exactly what’s working.




This is a hands-on builder role, not a team-management role (yet). You’ll do the work, with the leverage to grow as we scale. If you think in systems instead of manual effort, use AI to multiply your own output, and want to see your work move the revenue number, this is for you.




What You’ll Own

Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.




Who You Are

Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience. 

 

This Probably Isn’t a Fit If…

Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.




Our Stack

GoHighLevel (CRM and automation), Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4 and Google Search Console, GTM, WordPress site, Claude AI and some Codex. You don’t need to be an expert in all of these on day one, but you should be the kind of person who gets fluent in a new tool fast and self-starts to hit your targets.




How to Apply

Send us a short note on a growth system you built and the result it drove. Include one example of a loop, agent, or automation you made to speed up your own work. We read every application that shows us something real.

description:
About the job

Remote | Full-Time | Orange Trail

Are you a commercially driven sales professional who wants to be rewarded based on performance?

Do you understand paid advertising, media buying, or the challenges businesses face with ad account restrictions?




Are you comfortable with outbound prospecting, networking, follow-up, and taking ownership of pipeline growth?

If yes, this role could be a strong fit.




About Orange Trail: 




Orange Trail is an advertising infrastructure agency helping direct advertisers and agencies scale with more stability across major advertising platforms.




We work with high-spending advertisers across industries such as fashion, technology, health & beauty, and other performance-driven niches. Our clients rely on us to help reduce disruption from platform restrictions, improve account stability, and support continued growth.




We are now hiring one Business Development Specialist to help us generate new opportunities, build relationships, and grow our client base globally.




The Role:




You will be responsible for finding, engaging, qualifying, and nurturing potential clients and partners for Orange Trail.




This is a hands-on business development role. You will be expected to actively prospect across channels, start conversations, identify opportunities, and help move qualified leads through the pipeline.




You will start by focusing on lead generation, outbound messaging, appointment setting, follow-up, and qualification. As you prove performance and gain deeper product knowledge, you may also begin taking closing calls.




This role requires a high level of autonomy. We will provide training, direction, and support, but you should be comfortable taking ownership of your work without needing constant supervision. You will be expected to manage your own pipeline, stay organized, follow up consistently, solve problems independently, and proactively find new opportunities.




Responsibilities:




Identify and prospect potential clients through Facebook groups, forums, LinkedIn, email, communities, networking, and other relevant channels
Reach out to qualified leads through outbound DMs, emails, and other direct channels
Book qualified sales calls for the team
Follow up with existing leads and nurture opportunities in the pipeline
Qualify prospects based on their business model, ad spend, advertising challenges, and fit for our services
Maintain clean and organized pipeline activity inside our HubSpot CRM
Build relationships with potential referral partners and agencies
Learn our offer deeply and understand the common advertising problems our prospects face
Support upsell and cross-sell opportunities where relevant
Take closing calls




What Are We Looking For:




Strong sales hunger and a performance-driven mindset
Excellent written and spoken English
Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally
Self-starter attitude with strong ownership over results
Highly autonomous and able to manage your own day without constant supervision
Organized, process-oriented, and consistent with follow-up
Comfortable doing high-volume outbound prospecting
Able to figure things out independently, ask smart questions when needed, and keep moving without waiting for step-by-step instructions
Curious about paid advertising, online business, and growth marketing
Willing to learn quickly and improve based on feedback
The mindset that with enough effort, thinking, and consistency, most problems can be solved




Preferred Experience:




Previous experience in sales, business development, appointment setting, or outbound prospecting
Experience with paid ads, media buying, affiliate marketing, e-commerce, agencies, or performance marketing
Familiarity with tools such as HubSpot, Notion, Slack, Google Docs, and similar platforms
Ability to recognize common advertising issues prospects may be facing
Experience upselling or cross-selling services is a plus




What You Get:




Base pay plus uncapped commission on deals you bring in
Remote work flexibility
Opportunity to grow into a larger sales
Direct exposure to high-level advertisers and agency owners
A meritocratic environment where performance is recognized and rewarded
Training, support, and a clear path to increase your responsibility over time




 Requirements: 




You must be available 30-40 hours per week
You must be able to communicate fluently in English
You must be able to show examples of previous sales, outreach, lead generation, or business development work
Paid advertising knowledge, experience or understanding is a must
Applications must be submitted in English




How to Apply: 

We are only hiring one person for this role right now.

To apply, include the word “Scaling” in your first message so we know you read the full description.

Please also include a short summary of your previous sales, outreach, or business development experience, along with any examples of previous work or results you can share.

title: Especialista en marketing digital
skills: Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.
description:
About the job

Te frustra cuando una campaña se lanza y nadie sabe realmente si funcionó? 




A nosotros también.

Por eso estamos buscando un(a) Especialista en Marketing que vea más allá de los clics y las impresiones.

Alguien que entienda que detrás de cada campaña existe un negocio, un objetivo y una oportunidad de crecimiento.




Probablemente conectes con esta vacante si alguna vez has pensado:

💭 "¿Por qué estamos haciendo esto si nadie analizó los resultados anteriores?"

💭 "Hay mejores maneras de comunicar este mensaje."

💭 "Las métricas deberían servir para tomar decisiones, no para llenar reportes."

💭 "Me gustaría participar más en la estrategia y menos en la ejecución mecánica.




Lo que harás

Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.




Lo que valoramos

Más que años de experiencia, buscamos criterio.

Queremos personas que sepan hacer preguntas inteligentes, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones respaldadas por datos.

Porque para nosotros el marketing no se trata de lanzar anuncios.

Se trata de generar resultados.




📩 Si disfrutas combinar comunicación, estrategia y análisis, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

description:
About the job

About Puig




At Puig, we are a family-owned company with a long-term commitment to creativity, innovation, and people development. Through our Graduate Program, we are looking for exceptional young talent ready to begin their professional journey in a dynamic, international, and purpose-driven environment.




This is a unique opportunity to accelerate your career, gain exposure to a leading global organization, and contribute to the growth of prestigious dermatological brands that improve people's quality of life through science-backed skincare solutions.




Your Mission




As a Marketing Graduate (Entry Level) within our Derma Division, you will support the Marketing team in the development and execution of brand strategies, product launches, and commercial initiatives while gaining hands-on experience across multiple areas of the business.




You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Medical Affairs, Sales, Trade Marketing, Digital, and Finance, contributing to projects that have a direct impact on business performance and patient outcomes.




What You'll Do




• Support the planning, execution, and optimization of digital marketing campaigns across social media platforms, with a strong focus on TikTok and emerging digital channels.

• Assist in the creation, coordination, and publishing of engaging content aligned with brand strategies, consumer trends, and business objectives.

• Collaborate closely with the Digital & Marketing team to manage community engagement, monitor social conversations, and identify opportunities to increase brand relevance and reach.

• Support influencer and content creator initiatives, including campaign coordination, performance tracking, and reporting.

• Monitor digital KPIs and campaign performance, providing insights and recommendations to improve engagement, visibility, and business impact.

• Contribute to the development and management of a dedicated social media project aimed at healthcare professionals, helping create educational and scientifically relevant content for derma brands.

• Coordinate with Medical Visit and cross-functional teams to ensure content accuracy, compliance, and alignment with brand objectives.

• Assist in the preparation of presentations, reports, and business reviews related to digital performance, marketing initiatives, and key projects.

• Participate in local and global marketing projects, gaining exposure to brand management, consumer engagement, and omnichannel strategies.

• Provide support on ad hoc marketing initiatives, product launches, events, and special projects across the Derma division.




Who You Are

Recent graduate (Bachelor's degree completed within the last 1–2 years) in Marketing, Business Administration, Communication, Pharmaceutical Business, or related fields.
Previous internship, trainee, student leadership, or extracurricular experience is highly valued.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
Curious, proactive, and eager to learn.
Collaborative mindset and ability to work in diverse teams.
Passion for marketing, healthcare, skincare, and consumer behavior.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.




Requirements

Bachelor's degree completed by the start date.
Intermediate English proficiency (written and spoken).
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel and PowerPoint preferred).
Availability to work full-time.
Authorization to work in Mexico.




What We Offer

Participation in a global Graduate Program designed to accelerate your development.
Exposure to senior leaders and international projects.
Structured learning and development opportunities.
Mentorship and career guidance.
A collaborative, inclusive, and innovative culture.
Opportunity to build a long-term career within Puig.




Our Commitment

At Puig, we believe that diversity, equity, and inclusion drive innovation and creativity. We are committed to creating an environment where everyone can thrive, contribute, and grow.

Join us and help shape the future of dermatological skincare through science, innovation, and purpose. ✨

 About Us:


P&G serves consumers worldwide with a strong portfolio of trusted brands, including Always®, Ariel®, Crest®, Gillette®, Pampers®, and Tide®. Our community operates in approximately 70 countries. For more information about us and our brands, please visit www.pg.com.


 Important Note for Candidates:


Before submitting your application, we encourage you to review our Hiring Process and Assessment Information. Familiarizing yourself with this content will help you prepare for online assessments and enhance your chances of success.

TalentPop is a fast-growing e-commerce company committed to offering a diverse range of products through our Shopify store and other marketplaces. As we continue to grow, we’re on the lookout for a skilled and motivated E-Commerce Listings & Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team. What You’ll Do:


Keep our product listings up-to-date and engaging on Shopify and other marketplaces.

Leverage AI to streamline content creation and identify effective messaging.

Assist in enhancing our SEO strategies and support our digital marketing efforts to increase visibility and drive traffic.
Manage and maintain a wide range of product lines and brands, ensuring consistency across all listings.

Excellent writing skills for crafting and editing product descriptions.

Paid Time Off
Holiday Bonus
Recognition and performance incentives
We're growing fast, which means more chances of advancement!


Technical Requirements:


Stable DSL, Cable, or Fiber internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps, LAN required)

Important: To be considered for this position, please make sure to include the following application code in your submission: DMS25. This code helps us quickly identify applicants for the Listings and Digital Marketing Specialist role. Applications submitted without this code may experience delays in processing. Be sure to highlight it clearly when you apply so our recruitment team knows you’ve carefully read the job posting.

Ready to Join Us?

Become a part of TalentPop and help us drive our e-commerce success to new heights! We're excited to see what you’ll bring to the table.

Job Information:

Job Title: Account Manager
Job ID: ILYMIC1
Industry: Digital Marketing Agency
Location: LATAM Only
Job Status: Part Time (20 hours per week)
Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, business hours CST, 4 hours per day
Compensation: $8 - $10 per hour
Target Start Date: ASAP







Role Overview: 




About the Client:




 The client is a healthcare marketing agency dedicated to helping physicians and medical practices grow through strategic digital marketing solutions. Their services include website development, SEO, content marketing, social media management, and performance reporting, all designed to strengthen their clients’ online presence and business growth. With a strong emphasis on long term relationships and personalized service, the client is looking for someone who can confidently represent the company and become a trusted point of contact for its physician partners.




About the Role:




 The Client Success Account Manager will serve as the primary client-facing representative, leading monthly performance meetings, maintaining strong relationships with healthcare clients, and identifying opportunities to expand services based on each client's needs. This role requires someone who is confident presenting data, highly organized, adaptable, and naturally personable. While technical marketing expertise can be taught, success in this position depends on professionalism, excellent communication, and the ability to build trust with clients while ensuring an outstanding experience.




Key Responsibilities

Client Relationship Management
Serve as the primary point of contact for assigned client accounts.
Build and maintain strong, long term relationships with healthcare professionals.
Respond promptly to client inquiries and scheduling requests.
Ensure clients receive exceptional service and support throughout their engagement.
Performance Reporting & Presentations
Lead monthly client meetings to review website performance, SEO results, lead generation, and other marketing KPIs.
Present prepared reports and explain metrics in a clear, confident, and professional manner.
Answer client questions and provide guidance based on campaign performance.
Make minor adjustments to presentations when necessary.
Account Growth & Client Succes
Identify opportunities to recommend additional marketing services that align with each client's goals.
Educate clients on available solutions such as blogs, social media management, website enhancements, or other marketing initiatives
Collaborate with internal teams to ensure recommendations are properly executed.
Support client retention by proactively helping clients maximize the value of the agency's services.
Scheduling & Coordination
Coordinate meetings and follow up with clients regarding schedule changes or availability.
Manage calendar adjustments professionally and efficiently.
Adapt quickly to changing priorities and urgent client requests.
Cross Functional Collaboration
Work closely with the Operations Manager and internal marketing team to stay informed on project updates.
Learn the agency's service offerings and confidently communicate them to clients.
Contribute ideas to improve client presentations and overall customer experience.







Qualifications & Skills must have:

Previous experience in Account Management, Client Success, Customer Success, or another client facing role
Outstanding verbal and written English communication skills.
Strong presentation and public speaking abilities.
Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport naturally.
Professional appearance and demeanor during video meetings.
Ability to confidently explain data and performance metrics.
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
Ability to adapt quickly and handle changing priorities.
Experience working with US based clients or companies.
Comfortable working within US Central Time business hours for approximately 20 hours per week.




Preferred

Experience working with healthcare providers or physician practices.
Background in digital marketing, marketing agencies, or advertising.
Sales or consultative experience with upselling or identifying client opportunities.
Familiarity with Canva, Zoom, Google Meet, Calendly, HubSpot, HighLevel, or WordPress.
Experience reviewing marketing KPIs such as website traffic, SEO performance, or lead generation metrics.




Personality Traits

Naturally outgoing and personable.
Confident and comfortable leading client conversations.
Highly coachable and eager to learn.
Reliable with exceptional work ethic and punctuality.
Professional under pressure and able to pivot when priorities change.
Proactive problem solver with strong initiative.
Empathetic and patient when working with busy professionals.
Positive attitude with a genuine desire to help clients succeed.

description:
About the job

No Relocation Assistance Offered

Job Number #174335 - Del.Miguel Hidalgo, Mexico City, Mexico

Who We Are

Colgate-Palmolive Company is a global consumer products company operating in over 200 countries specialising in Oral Care, Personal Care, Home Care, Skin Care, and Pet Nutrition. Our products are trusted in more households than any other brand in the world, making us a household name!

Join Colgate-Palmolive, a caring, innovative growth company reimagining a healthier future for people, their pets, and our planet. Guided by our core values—Caring, Inclusive, and Courageous—we foster a culture that inspires our people to achieve common goals. Together, let's build a brighter, healthier future for all.

Role Summary: 

The Science Diet Brand Manager is responsible for the development and execution of marketing strategies across commercial operations to achieve the financial and market share objectives. They lead the go-to-market planning behind innovation launches, promotional activations, traditional and digital media and 6P strategies for omni-channel customers. They ensure consistent and effective brand messaging to the veterinary profession/ consumer, and consistent consideration of retail environment specific needs/tactics. They are critical in creating and driving the execution of revenue growth management and simplification opportunities for the brand.

Responsibilities:


Strategic Growth & Omni-Channel Execution: Align and implement omni-channel marketing, communication, and media strategies across traditional and digital platforms, using insights and analytics to capture key growth opportunities. 
Go-To-Market & Innovation Leadership: Lead the strategic planning, market alignment, and launch execution for new products, re-launches, and quarterly tentpole marketing activations. 
Strategic 6P Planning & Metrics: Develop and align measurable 6P marketing plans, identifying key performance indicators (KPIs) to track campaign effectiveness and business health. 
Portfolio & Revenue Management: Drive product portfolio management and identify revenue growth management and simplification opportunities across therapeutic nutrition categories. 
Financial & Budget Accountability: Manage the allocated A&P budget and support overall P&L management to maximize return on marketing investments. 
Commercial & Field Enablement: Design, produce, and hand over high-impact promotional materials to Sales Operations, ensuring field teams and veterinary conference strategies are fully equipped to win in the retail clinic environment. 


Required Qualifications:


Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration or a related field 
3+ years of experience in brand marketing, retail marketing, trade marketing or related fields
Proven experience executing digital and eCommerce marketing campaigns (including paid search, digital display, and social media)
Advanced English level


Preferred Qualifications:


Strong analytical skills and capability to uncover measurable insights in large datasets 
Excellent project management skills, with the ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment
Critical thinking and problem solving


Our Commitment to Inclusion

Our journey begins with our people—developing strong talent with diverse backgrounds and perspectives to best serve our consumers around the world and fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels a true sense of belonging. We are dedicated to ensuring that each individual can be their authentic self, is treated with respect, and is empowered by leadership to contribute meaningfully to our business.

Equal Opportunity Employer

Colgate is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, ethnicity, age, disability, marital status, veteran status (United States positions), or any other characteristic protected by law.

Reasonable accommodation during the application process is available for persons with disabilities. Please complete this request form should you require accommodation.

description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

Being part of the Operations team gives you a unique opportunity to help drive growth at one of the fastest-growing companies in the region. This data-driven role requires a rare combination of analytical thinking, consumer empathy, operational excellence, and strong interpersonal skills.

You will work closely with a high-performing team to launch, scale, and optimize DiDi’s business across Latin America. Be prepared for a fast-paced, dynamic, and highly challenging environment. There is never a dull moment!

In this role, you will constantly seek scalable solutions while overseeing critical growth initiatives across the business. Your analyses, processes, and projects will directly contribute to DiDi’s expansion and success in LATAM.

We believe in giving our team members a level of ownership and responsibility that is above and beyond the norm. From day one, you will have the autonomy to make an impact, contribute ideas, and drive strategic decisions that shape the future of the business.

In this role, you'll be... 


Taking ownership of DiDi's growth in your region.
Build deep insights and understanding of the business and product features trough project management, stakeholder management, and be data driven ALWAYS.
Design and implement initiatives to improve business and product indicators, being able to leverage data for the decision-making process. 
Optimize processes and strategies to improve efficiency and scalability.
Support the execution of high-impact growth initiatives across multiple markets.
Ensure collaboration with multiple stakeholders to improve operational productivity & user experience.
Partner cross-functionally with Strategy, Marketing, Product, and Data teams.
Balance attention to detail with swift execution - we need to do things quickly, and we need to do them well.
Balancing those can be challenging, but this should be our strength.

We're eager to be in touch because you have...

Currently enrolled Industrial Engineering, Economics, Business, Administation, Mathematic or such related field

Proficiency with Excel

Experience with data analysis tools such as Python, SQL (it's a plus)

Data driven decision making and strong analytical thinking.

Studies with data-based decision-making, exercising good judgment in ambiguous circumstances, and effectively communicating across a diverse team.

Abilities to have optimal communication with all stakeholders, follow up on the project, and deliver results.

Creative approaches to solve complex issues and use data driven thinking to back those ideas.

Proficiency in English & Spanish.

You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

description:
About the job

Join Our Team at TalentPop App as an Influencer Marketing Specialist!

At TalentPop App, we're on a mission to transform the digital landscape through impactful influencer partnerships. We're looking for an innovative and strategic Influencer Marketing Specialist with strong marketing experience to help shape the future of e-commerce. If you're passionate about influencer marketing, skilled in executing high-impact campaigns, and eager to make a real impact, this is the perfect opportunity for you!

Why You'll Love This Role

You’ll be at the forefront of developing and executing marketing strategies that leverage influencers to build brand awareness, drive engagement, and boost conversions. As part of our team, your creativity, strategic thinking, and results-driven approach will directly contribute to our growth and success.

What You'll Do


Develop Strategies: Create influencer marketing plans that align with overall marketing objectives, brand goals, and measurable KPIs.
Source Talent: Identify and engage influencers who resonate with our brand, target audience, and campaign goals.
Build Partnerships: Cultivate and maintain strong, professional relationships with influencers, agencies, and brand partners.
Oversee Campaigns: Manage campaign timelines, content creation, and deliverables in collaboration with influencers and the marketing team.
Ensure Quality: Provide creative direction and review influencer content to ensure it aligns with brand identity and campaign messaging.
Analyze & Report: Use analytics tools to measure performance, generate reports, and optimize future marketing initiatives.
Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with social media, content, and paid marketing teams to ensure campaigns integrate seamlessly into broader marketing efforts.


What We're Looking For


At least 1 year of proven experience in influencer marketing, with a solid background in broader marketing campaigns.
Exceptional relationship-building, negotiation, and communication skills.
In-depth understanding of social media platforms, influencer trends, digital marketing strategies, and audience engagement tactics.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret performance data and translate insights into actionable strategies.
A creative and passionate mindset for digital marketing, brand storytelling, and campaign innovation.


Tech Requirements


Personally owned PC or laptop with sufficient processing power.
Reliable internet connection with a minimum of 25 Mbps for both upload and download speed.


Perks And Benefits


Permanent remote work setup, giving you the flexibility to work from anywhere.
HMO coverage or a health stipend to support your health and well-being.
Performance bonuses to reward your hard work and success.
Generous Paid Time Off (PTO) to rest and recharge.
Opportunities for professional growth and development within a dynamic and supportive environment at TalentPop App.


Special Instruction

For us to prioritize your application for the Influencer Marketing Specialist role, please enter code INFL26 when asked.

At TalentPop App, we’re not just hiring; we’re building a team of passionate, innovative individuals who will drive the future of e-commerce. If you’re ready to make a real impact and take your marketing career to the next level, apply now!

The Marketing Specialist I will play a key role in executing trade shows and events, digital marketing campaigns, marketing automation programs, lead management activities, and content localization efforts that support customer engagement, demand generation, and business growth. title: Especialista de Marketing Estratégico
skills: Colaborar en la construcción del proceso de cálculo de potenciales de mercado siendo un asesor para los equipos de marketing y participando activamente en el proceso de creación de potenciales para comprender sus metodologías y documentarlas Con el objetivo de crear el repositorio de potenciales de la región simplificando la visión de nuevas oportunidades, así como de riesgos y/o amenazas.

Crear iniciativas de optimización del portafolio que potencialicen el crecimiento de la región, así como analizar productos que no estén rotando en los mercados recabando y analizando información de los clientes y competencia, así como data interna para asegurar que los esfuerzos de la compañía estén enfocados en las soluciones y productos priorizados y estratégicos definidos por los negocios.

Dar seguimiento a investigaciones de mercado a través de los lineamientos definidos en conjunto con el negocio, así como el desarrollo a los procesos administrativos internos y externos participando activamente con los equipos de marketing locales y regionales en los proyectos de nuevas oportunidades y potenciales para ayudar a desarrollar nuevos negocios o audiencias targets que permitan aumentar el revenue de los negocios

Impulsar el uso del showroom físico y digital con equipos internos y externos, así como administrar las visitas y accesos ejecutando los cambios, actualizaciones y políticas de estos con los equipos de marketing, ventas y clínicos con el objetivo de mostrar nuestras soluciones y productos facilitando a los negocios la influencia con clientes que impulsen nuevos negocios, así como capacitaciones internas para nuestros asociados a través de experiencias interactivas y presenciales.
Ingeniería Industrial, Licenciatura Económico – Administrativa (Actuaria, Administración, Finanzas, Contabilidad, Mercadotecnia o a fin) Titulado

description:
About the job

We Are The People Who Give Possibilities Purpose

BD is one of the largest global medical technology companies in the world. Advancing the world of health™ is our Purpose, and it’s no small feat. It takes the imagination and passion of all of us—from design and engineering to the manufacturing and marketing of our billions of MedTech products per year—to look at the impossible and find transformative solutions that turn dreams into possibilities.

Job Description

Servicios de Tecnología Globales (TGS - Technology & Global Services)

BD cuenta con Centros de Servicios alrededor del mundo, los TGS utilizan

plataformas y herramientas para procesar la información de manera

estandarizada con una mejora continua y compartiendo las mejores

prácticas. De esta manera permite organizar las actividades, con el

objetivo de proporcionar condiciones a cada entidad local para focalizar

sus recursos en las operaciones que la empresa necesita en esta nueva

etapa de crecimiento.

Especialista de Marketing Estratégico

Es responsable de colaborar en la interpretación del comportamiento del mercado de dispositivos médicos analizando auditorías de mercado e información comercial para ser un asesor con los equipos de marketing, ventas y acceso de la Unidades de Negocio, generando ideas, conclusiones y recomendaciones basada en insights que faciliten la toma de decisiones, así como de analizar tendencias y comportamientos para aumentar la competitividad y el crecimiento de productos estratégicos.

Funciones


Colaborar en la construcción del proceso de cálculo de potenciales de mercado siendo un asesor para los equipos de marketing y participando activamente en el proceso de creación de potenciales para comprender sus metodologías y documentarlas Con el objetivo de crear el repositorio de potenciales de la región simplificando la visión de nuevas oportunidades, así como de riesgos y/o amenazas.
Crear iniciativas de optimización del portafolio que potencialicen el crecimiento de la región, así como analizar productos que no estén rotando en los mercados recabando y analizando información de los clientes y competencia, así como data interna para asegurar que los esfuerzos de la compañía estén enfocados en las soluciones y productos priorizados y estratégicos definidos por los negocios.
Dar seguimiento a investigaciones de mercado a través de los lineamientos definidos en conjunto con el negocio, así como el desarrollo a los procesos administrativos internos y externos participando activamente con los equipos de marketing locales y regionales en los proyectos de nuevas oportunidades y potenciales para ayudar a desarrollar nuevos negocios o audiencias targets que permitan aumentar el revenue de los negocios
Impulsar el uso del showroom físico y digital con equipos internos y externos, así como administrar las visitas y accesos ejecutando los cambios, actualizaciones y políticas de estos con los equipos de marketing, ventas y clínicos con el objetivo de mostrar nuestras soluciones y productos facilitando a los negocios la influencia con clientes que impulsen nuevos negocios, así como capacitaciones internas para nuestros asociados a través de experiencias interactivas y presenciales.


Requisitos


Ingeniería Industrial, Licenciatura Económico – Administrativa (Actuaria, Administración, Finanzas, Contabilidad, Mercadotecnia o a fin) Titulado
Manejo de inglés intermedio
Habilidad analítica y comunicación asertiva
Experiencia previa: 3 a 5 años en Marketing
Office avanzado (Excel, Power Point); SFDC, Marketo & Showpad
Experiencia en industria de dispositivos médico o farmacéutica


Why Join Us?

To find purpose in the possibilities, we need people who can see the bigger picture, who understand the human story that underpins everything we do. We welcome people with the imagination and drive to help us reinvent the future of healthcare. At BD, you’ll discover a culture in which you can learn, grow and thrive.

We believe that when people connect in person, we learn faster, collaborate more deeply, and build a stronger culture. Join us and enjoy a culture where face-to-face collaboration supports your learning, your progress, and your success.

To learn more about BD visit https://bd.com/careers.

Becton, Dickinson, and Company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We evaluate applicants without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, creed, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, marital or domestic or civil union status, familial status, affectional or sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetics, disability, military eligibility or veteran status, and other legally protected characteristics.

Required Skills
