title: Especialista en marketing digital
skills: Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.
description:
About the job

Te frustra cuando una campaña se lanza y nadie sabe realmente si funcionó? 




A nosotros también.

Por eso estamos buscando un(a) Especialista en Marketing que vea más allá de los clics y las impresiones.

Alguien que entienda que detrás de cada campaña existe un negocio, un objetivo y una oportunidad de crecimiento.




Probablemente conectes con esta vacante si alguna vez has pensado:

💭 "¿Por qué estamos haciendo esto si nadie analizó los resultados anteriores?"

💭 "Hay mejores maneras de comunicar este mensaje."

💭 "Las métricas deberían servir para tomar decisiones, no para llenar reportes."

💭 "Me gustaría participar más en la estrategia y menos en la ejecución mecánica.




Lo que harás

Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.




Lo que valoramos

Más que años de experiencia, buscamos criterio.

Queremos personas que sepan hacer preguntas inteligentes, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones respaldadas por datos.

Porque para nosotros el marketing no se trata de lanzar anuncios.

Se trata de generar resultados.




📩 Si disfrutas combinar comunicación, estrategia y análisis, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

description:
About the job

🚨 Senior SEO / AEO Specialist with Shopify & Web Development Experience 🚨




💻 Remote

💰 $10.00/hour

⏰ Full-Time | 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

🕒 40 Hours per Week




About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled and forward-thinking Senior SEO / AEO Specialist with Shopify and Web Development experience to join our team full-time.

This is primarily an SEO-driven role, not a traditional web development position. We are looking for someone who is highly proficient in Full SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and can also perform website development and optimization tasks as needed.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience executing and implementing SEO strategies, not just conducting audits, creating recommendations, or building SEO plans. This person should understand how search engines, AI-driven search platforms, and answer engines surface content and know how to optimize websites to increase rankings, visibility, traffic, and conversions.

If you enjoy staying ahead of industry trends, solving complex SEO challenges, and delivering measurable business results, we'd love to hear from you.




Key Responsibilities

Full SEO Execution & Optimization (Primary Responsibility)

Execute and implement advanced SEO strategies across multiple websites
Perform technical SEO, on-page SEO, off-page SEO, and content optimization
Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and content gap analysis
Optimize metadata, site architecture, internal linking, and structured data
Improve website crawlability, indexing, Core Web Vitals, and page speed
Implement schema markup and entity-based SEO strategies
Monitor rankings, traffic, conversions, and SEO performance metrics
Stay current with Google algorithm updates and emerging search trends


AEO & GEO (AI Search Optimization)

Optimize websites for AI search platforms and answer engines
Implement AEO strategies for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and other AI-driven search experiences
Develop FAQ structures, schema markup, semantic content, and conversational search optimization
Apply GEO strategies to improve AI visibility and entity recognition
Create content structures designed to increase visibility across answer engines and generative search platforms


Website Management & Development

Manage, optimize, and maintain Shopify and WordPress websites
Implement website updates and troubleshoot front-end issues
Improve website structure, usability, page speed, and technical performance
Make basic to intermediate HTML, CSS, and front-end edits
Support website enhancements and conversion-focused improvements


Funnels, Landing Pages & Conversion Optimization

Work within HighLevel to manage funnels, landing pages, automations, and website assets
Improve user experience and conversion rates
Optimize landing pages for lead generation and sales performance
Analyze user behavior and implement CRO recommendations


Strategy & Performance

Analyze website performance and identify opportunities for growth
Provide strategic recommendations based on data and analytics
Bring new ideas and insights related to SEO, AI search, and conversion optimization
Continuously research and implement modern digital marketing strategies




Required Experience

✔ Minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience in SEO, website management, and digital optimization

✔ Extensive hands-on experience executing Full SEO strategies

✔ Strong experience in Technical SEO, On-Page SEO, and Off-Page SEO

✔ Hands-on experience with AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)

✔ Experience with GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

✔ Experience optimizing for AI search platforms and answer engines

✔ Expert-level Shopify experience

✔ Strong WordPress experience

✔ Experience using HighLevel

✔ Basic to intermediate HTML, CSS, and front-end coding knowledge

✔ Strong understanding of website architecture, structured data, and schema markup

✔ Ability to independently execute SEO initiatives and deliver measurable results

✔ Strong analytical, strategic, and problem-solving skills




Preferred Experience

⭐ Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

⭐ Landing page and funnel optimization

⭐ Google Analytics and Google Search Console

⭐ Heatmaps and user behavior tracking tools

⭐ Page speed optimization tools

⭐ SEO reporting platforms

⭐ Experience with service-based businesses, eCommerce brands, or lead generation websites

⭐ Experience optimizing content for AI Overviews and conversational search


Technical Skills

Required

Full SEO (Technical, On-Page & Off-Page)
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
Shopify
WordPress
HighLevel
HTML & CSS
Google Analytics
Google Search Console

Technical SEO
Landing Page Optimization
Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)


Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who:

Is highly proficient in Full SEO and AEO implementation
Has hands-on experience executing SEO strategies, not just performing audits or creating plans
Understands where AI-driven search and digital marketing are headed
Thinks strategically and proactively identifies opportunities for improvement
Can work independently with minimal supervision
Brings recommendations and new ideas to the table

Takes ownership of projects and delivers measurable business results




Hiring Process

2. Completion of Requirements

4. Final Endorsement & Offer

Client selection and final endorsement.

5. Start Date & Onboarding

Confirmation of start date and onboarding instructions.

title: Email Marketing Account Manager
skills: You are proficient in Shopify, Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics.
You are a novice in Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent
Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Shopify, Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics.
You are a novice in Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Shopify, Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Notion, Figma, Slack

title: Practicante de Marketing
description:
About the job

Oportunidad de Prácticas Profesionales | Marketing




Se busca estudiante universitario(a) para integrarse como Practicante de Marketing y brindar apoyo al área en actividades operativas, analíticas y de seguimiento dentro de la industria farmacéutica.




Objetivo del puesto

Brindar soporte operativo, analítico y creativo al equipo de Marketing, colaborando en la implementación de estrategias de comunicación, promoción y posicionamiento de productos.




Responsabilidades

• Apoyar en la ejecución de campañas promocionales y actividades de marketing.

• Recopilar y analizar información de mercado, tendencias y competencia.

• Dar soporte en la organización y logística de eventos, lanzamientos y capacitaciones.

• Elaborar reportes y presentaciones para el área.

• Dar seguimiento a proyectos y estrategias de marketing.

• Apoyar en el control y seguimiento de presupuestos y órdenes de compra.

• Coordinar actividades con proveedores externos.




Requisitos

• Estudiante activo(a) de Mercadotecnia, Administración o carrera afín.

• Contar con 1.5 a 2 años para concluir la licenciatura.

• Manejo de Excel intermedio (indispensable).

• Inglés intermedio.

• Conocimiento de herramientas de análisis de datos (deseable).

• Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.

• Proactividad, actitud de servicio y sentido de urgencia.




Condiciones

• Duración inicial de 6 meses, con posibilidad de renovación.

• Esquema híbrido.

• Horario: Lunes a viernes de 8:00 a 14:00 hrs.

• Ubicación: Polanco, Ciudad de México.

Opportunities for professional growth and development within a dynamic and supportive environment at TalentPop App.
description:
About the job

Join Our Team at TalentPop App as an Influencer Marketing Specialist!

At TalentPop App, we're on a mission to transform the digital landscape through impactful influencer partnerships. We're looking for an innovative and strategic Influencer Marketing Specialist with strong marketing experience to help shape the future of e-commerce. If you're passionate about influencer marketing, skilled in executing high-impact campaigns, and eager to make a real impact, this is the perfect opportunity for you!

Why You'll Love This Role

You’ll be at the forefront of developing and executing marketing strategies that leverage influencers to build brand awareness, drive engagement, and boost conversions. As part of our team, your creativity, strategic thinking, and results-driven approach will directly contribute to our growth and success.

What You'll Do


Develop Strategies: Create influencer marketing plans that align with overall marketing objectives, brand goals, and measurable KPIs.
Source Talent: Identify and engage influencers who resonate with our brand, target audience, and campaign goals.
Build Partnerships: Cultivate and maintain strong, professional relationships with influencers, agencies, and brand partners.
Oversee Campaigns: Manage campaign timelines, content creation, and deliverables in collaboration with influencers and the marketing team.
Ensure Quality: Provide creative direction and review influencer content to ensure it aligns with brand identity and campaign messaging.
Analyze & Report: Use analytics tools to measure performance, generate reports, and optimize future marketing initiatives.
Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with social media, content, and paid marketing teams to ensure campaigns integrate seamlessly into broader marketing efforts.


What We're Looking For


At least 1 year of proven experience in influencer marketing, with a solid background in broader marketing campaigns.
Exceptional relationship-building, negotiation, and communication skills.
In-depth understanding of social media platforms, influencer trends, digital marketing strategies, and audience engagement tactics.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret performance data and translate insights into actionable strategies.
A creative and passionate mindset for digital marketing, brand storytelling, and campaign innovation.


Tech Requirements


Personally owned PC or laptop with sufficient processing power.
Reliable internet connection with a minimum of 25 Mbps for both upload and download speed.


Perks And Benefits


Permanent remote work setup, giving you the flexibility to work from anywhere.
HMO coverage or a health stipend to support your health and well-being.
Performance bonuses to reward your hard work and success.
Generous Paid Time Off (PTO) to rest and recharge.
Opportunities for professional growth and development within a dynamic and supportive environment at TalentPop App.


Special Instruction

For us to prioritize your application for the Influencer Marketing Specialist role, please enter code INFL26 when asked.

At TalentPop App, we’re not just hiring; we’re building a team of passionate, innovative individuals who will drive the future of e-commerce. If you’re ready to make a real impact and take your marketing career to the next level, apply now!

title: Paid Media Specialist
skills: Manage performance across paid channels. Manage and improve paid search and paid social programs (always-on and campaigns), including keyword / audience strategy, bidding, budgets, and ad structure.

Run a disciplined testing roadmap. Launch structured experiments across creative, messaging, landing pages, audience segments, bidding strategies, and offers – documenting insights and scaling winners.
Increased conversion rate through a full funnel journey. Partner with the web/UX and content teams to improve landing page relevance, speed, form performance, and post-click experience.
Build repeatable governance. Build campaign QA, naming conventions, change logs, budgets, pacing, and weekly performance reviews; surface risks/opportunities.

Partner in planning. Support quarterly and monthly planning – forecasting performance, proposing budget allocations, and aligning channel strategy to GTM priorities (segments, regions, products, and verticals)
Bachelor's Degree in relevant field
Advanced English
You have 5+ years of experience.
Experience developing, delivering, and enabling product marketing programs cross-functionally
Understanding of marketing at all stages of the B2B customer journey and SaaS product lifecycle
A collaborative self- starter who is comfortable being hands-on with implementation of programs
Product oriented - with the ability and curiosity to understand and learn about features and a technology platform.
Discipline to follow established standards and processes
Comprehensive mindfulness programs with a premium membership to Calm
Volunteer Paid Time off available after 6 months of employment for eligible employees
Company volunteer and donation matching program – We match your volunteer hours or personal cash donations to an eligible charity with a charitable donation.
Employee Assistance Program

On-demand digital course library for professional development.
description:
About the job

Rockwell Automation is a global technology leader focused on helping the world’s manufacturers be more productive, sustainable, and agile. With more than 28,000 employees who make the world better every day, we know we have something special. Behind our customers - amazing companies that help feed the world, provide life-saving medicine on a global scale, and focus on clean water and green mobility - our people are energized problem solvers that take pride in how the work we do changes the world for the better.

We welcome all makers, forward thinkers, and problem solvers who are looking for a place to do their best work. And if that’s you we would love to have you join us!

Job Description

Fiix is looking for a Paid Media Specialist to join our marketing team and help scale efficient, measurable pipeline through the best paid acquisition. Reporting into the demand generation function, you will manage daily execution and optimization of our paid programs across search and social. You will partner with multiple teams, including Marketing Ops, Analytics, Content/Creative, Web, Sales Development, and Revenue Ops. The goal of these efforts is to ensure our campaigns guide the right conversions, and those conversions are measured through to pipeline and ARR.

You will report to the Senior Manager, Marketing.

Main Responsabilities


Manage performance across paid channels. Manage and improve paid search and paid social programs (always-on and campaigns), including keyword / audience strategy, bidding, budgets, and ad structure.
Increase revenue outcomes, not just leads. Align conversion strategy to funnel stages (MQLs, SQLs, SAOs and pipeline), partnering with stakeholders including sales and marketing to improve quality and acceptance rules.
Run a disciplined testing roadmap. Launch structured experiments across creative, messaging, landing pages, audience segments, bidding strategies, and offers – documenting insights and scaling winners.
Increased conversion rate through a full funnel journey. Partner with the web/UX and content teams to improve landing page relevance, speed, form performance, and post-click experience.
Build repeatable governance. Build campaign QA, naming conventions, change logs, budgets, pacing, and weekly performance reviews; surface risks/opportunities.
Product clear performance insights. Deliver weekly / monthly reporting with applicable insights for marketing leadership and team members.
Partner in planning. Support quarterly and monthly planning – forecasting performance, proposing budget allocations, and aligning channel strategy to GTM priorities (segments, regions, products, and verticals)


The Essentials – You Will Have


Bachelor's Degree in relevant field
Advanced English


The Preferred – You Might Also Have


You have 5+ years of experience.
Experience developing, delivering, and enabling product marketing programs cross-functionally
Understanding of marketing at all stages of the B2B customer journey and SaaS product lifecycle
A collaborative self- starter who is comfortable being hands-on with implementation of programs
Product oriented - with the ability and curiosity to understand and learn about features and a technology platform.
Discipline to follow established standards and processes


What We Offer


Comprehensive mindfulness programs with a premium membership to Calm
Volunteer Paid Time off available after 6 months of employment for eligible employees
Company volunteer and donation matching program – We match your volunteer hours or personal cash donations to an eligible charity with a charitable donation.
Employee Assistance Program
Personalized wellbeing programs through our OnTrack program
On-demand digital course library for professional development.


We believe that employee diversity is an important element of our common future. We provide opportunities for talent growth with the entire organization. We support equality by celebrating the individuality of every person, regardless of their origin and identity. We appreciate the unique cultural pattern and variety of experiences in each of us. We invite all who want to join and change the world of our organization.

Rockwell Automation’s hybrid policy aligns that employees are expected to work at a Rockwell location at least Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays unless they have a business obligation out of the office.

title: Email Marketing Operations Specialist
skills: Competitive salary in USD
Remote-first flexibility. Work from anywhere
PTO and paid U.S. holidays

Build and format emails and SMS campaigns inside Klaviyo using provided creative assets, copy, and brand guidelines, and configure and deploy automated flows with triggers, splits, filters, delays, and conditional logic.

QA all campaigns and flows for accuracy before deployment, testing mobile and desktop rendering across devices and inboxes, and ensuring links, tracking, personalization, and dynamic content function properly.
Configure dynamic content blocks, product feeds, and personalized content, while building, maintaining, and troubleshooting audience segments and lists.
Schedule and deploy campaigns and flows accurately and on time, implementing hide/show logic and conditional content within emails as needed.
Collaborate closely with Lifecycle Marketing Strategists and Specialists to execute campaigns and automations across multiple ecommerce client accounts.
Maintain clear organization and documentation across multiple accounts and deliverables.
3+ years of hands-on experience working in Klaviyo, including experience supporting ecommerce and DTC brands.
Experience building both campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo, Attentive, or other ESPs, including SMS marketing execution.

Deep understanding of Klaviyo flow logic and automation structure, including conditional splits, trigger filters, dynamic product feeds, segmentation, hide/show logic, and dynamic variables and personalization.
Strong knowledge of email rendering best practices and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues independently.
Familiarity with HTML/CSS for email and experience with Shopify integrations are strong pluses.
Strong English communication skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously in a fast-paced agency environment.
description:
About the job

Floowi connects top LATAM professionals with leading U.S. companies through remote talent solutions. Our mission is to make LATAM the world's premier hub for growth and excellence.




🌟 About our Client:

Our client is a multi-channel eCommerce agency specializing in lifecycle marketing, site redesign and replatforming, conversion rate optimization, and branding for direct-to-consumer brands. They work with a wide range of consumer brands across beauty, wellness, fashion, and home goods, helping them build automated email and SMS programs, improve customer retention, and grow revenue through data-driven strategies.




✍ Short Description:

The Email Marketing Operations Specialist will support the agency's Lifecycle Marketing team by handling the technical execution, QA, scheduling, and deployment of email and SMS marketing initiatives across multiple ecommerce client accounts. This is a hands-on, execution-focused role centered on building accurate, polished, and error-free campaigns and automations inside Klaviyo, working closely with Strategists, Specialists, and Designers rather than owning strategy or copywriting. The ideal candidate takes pride in clean, technically sound execution and can consistently deliver high-quality work across multiple accounts with minimal oversight.




🌎 Location: 100% Remote (LATAM only)

🗣 Language Requirements: Advanced English (C1+)

⏰ Schedule: Full-time, aligned with EST

😀 Start Date: ASAP




💰 Compensation & Benefits:

Competitive salary in USD
Remote-first flexibility. Work from anywhere
PTO and paid U.S. holidays




💼 Responsibilities:

Build and format emails and SMS campaigns inside Klaviyo using provided creative assets, copy, and brand guidelines, and configure and deploy automated flows with triggers, splits, filters, delays, and conditional logic.
QA all campaigns and flows for accuracy before deployment, testing mobile and desktop rendering across devices and inboxes, and ensuring links, tracking, personalization, and dynamic content function properly.
Configure dynamic content blocks, product feeds, and personalized content, while building, maintaining, and troubleshooting audience segments and lists.
Schedule and deploy campaigns and flows accurately and on time, implementing hide/show logic and conditional content within emails as needed.
Collaborate closely with Lifecycle Marketing Strategists and Specialists to execute campaigns and automations across multiple ecommerce client accounts.
Maintain clear organization and documentation across multiple accounts and deliverables.




💡 Qualifications:

3+ years of hands-on experience working in Klaviyo, including experience supporting ecommerce and DTC brands.
Experience building both campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo, Attentive, or other ESPs, including SMS marketing execution.
Deep understanding of Klaviyo flow logic and automation structure, including conditional splits, trigger filters, dynamic product feeds, segmentation, hide/show logic, and dynamic variables and personalization.
Strong knowledge of email rendering best practices and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues independently.
Familiarity with HTML/CSS for email and experience with Shopify integrations are strong pluses.
Strong English communication skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously in a fast-paced agency environment.




📩 If you meet the experience outlined above, we'd love to hear from you. Please apply—our team is excited about your application and will be in touch as soon as possible.

title: ESTUDIANTES DE MERCADOTECNIA, COMUNICACIONES Y ADMINISTRACION DE EMPRESAS
company: LumiQ - Gabinete de Negocios en México
skills: 2. Llenar una ficha de participación.
description:
About the job

¿Eres una persona convencida de que el aporte profesionales establece base para el crecimiento y desarrollo empresarial? 

¿Estás dispuesto(a) a participar con nosotros para encontrar formas creativas y positivas de inspirar a otros a mejorar? 

Si es así ¡te estamos buscando!!







Deseamos estudiantes curiosos, proactivos y comprometidos, que reconozcan que el éxito de los demás es su éxito y sobre todo que busquen vivenciar lo que están aprendiendo.







NUESTRA LABOR BUSCA:




1. Reconectar a las nuevas generaciones con la empresa, de una forma distinta.

2. Brindar herramientas a los participantes para que descubran y ejerzan su poder como agentes de mejora ante el sector empresarial.







¿EN QUÉ CONSISTE EL VOLUNTARIADO EMPRESARIAL INTERNACIONAL?




Se entiende por ello, el conjunto de actividades desarrolladas SIN FINES DE LUCRO, EN FORMA GRATUITA Y SIN VÍNCULO NI RESPONSABILIDAD CONTRACTUAL, POR UN GRUPO DE ESTUDIANTES DE BUENA VOLUNTAD, DISPUESTOS A APOYAR DESINTERESADAMENTE en la búsqueda de mejoras de los sistemas de gestión en las empresas.







¿ES UNA LABOR A TIEMPO COMPLETO?




NO...La realizas de acuerdo a tu disponibilidad (No hay imposición de horarios)




¿ES PRESENCIAL?




No…Las labores se ejecutan por medio de la plataforma de zoom y las coordinaciones por medio del WhatsApp. 




¿CUÁL ES LA FUNCIÓN QUE DEBO CUMPLIR?




1. Compartir los conocimientos que más te apasionan con quienes lo requieren (Empresarios y emprendedores de Latinoamérica y el caribe)

2. Diseñar y ejecutar un plan orientado a establecer mejoras en la gestión de las empresas, 

3. Entre otros.




¿QUÉ ES LO QUE OFRECEN AL ESTUDIANTE?




1. Empoderamiento para el desarrollo de las actividades propuestas.

2. Integración a un equipo internacional multidisciplinario.

3. Soporte de recursos para la realización de las actividades.

4. Constancias internacionales por participar en el programa.

5. Participación en el desarrollo de acciones de mejora empresarial 100% reales.




¿QUÉ DEBO HACER PARA PARTICIPAR EN EL VOLUNTARIADO EMPRESARIAL INTERNACIONAL?




1. Hacernos llegar tu CV.

2. Llenar una ficha de participación.

description:
About the job

About 1 At Bat Media




1 At Bat Media is a full-service eCommerce growth agency based in Toronto, helping ambitious DTC brands across Canada and the United States acquire more customers, improve retention, and scale profitably.




We specialize in performance marketing across the full customer journey, including paid media, email/SMS marketing, creative strategy, search marketing, influencer marketing, and conversion-focused eCommerce growth.




Our team works with Shopify-based eCommerce brands that are serious about growth and want a strategic partner who can help them improve performance across acquisition, retention, creative, and overall revenue strategy.




We are a lean, experienced, and performance-driven agency with a strong focus on communication, strategy, accountability, and measurable growth.




The Role




We are looking for an experienced Paid Media Specialist to manage and optimize Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns for eCommerce clients.




In this role, you will be responsible for campaign execution, optimization, testing, reporting, and performance improvement across a portfolio of DTC eCommerce brands. You will work closely with our Growth Strategists, creative team, and retention team to help clients acquire customers profitably and scale revenue.




This role is ideal for someone who is highly analytical, detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working inside ad accounts every day. You should understand how paid media fits into the broader eCommerce growth picture, including creative testing, offer strategy, landing pages, AOV, conversion rate, MER, ROAS, CAC, and retention.




The ideal candidate has strong hands-on experience with both Meta Ads and Google Ads, especially for Shopify-based eCommerce brands.




This is a remote contractor role.




What Success Looks Like




Client ad accounts are actively managed, optimized, and improved on a consistent basis
Campaigns are structured clearly and aligned with client goals, budgets, and growth strategy
Meta Ads and Google Ads performance is monitored closely, with proactive adjustments made as needed
Creative testing, audience testing, offer testing, and campaign testing are executed consistently
Performance insights are clearly communicated to Growth Strategists and clients
Budgets are managed responsibly with attention to pacing, efficiency, and scale
Opportunities, risks, and issues are identified early and communicated clearly
Paid media performance contributes to profitable revenue growth across client accounts




Responsibilities




Manage Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns for assigned eCommerce clients
Build, launch, monitor, and optimize paid media campaigns across Meta and Google
Manage campaign structures, budgets, bidding strategies, audiences, creative testing, and optimization priorities
Monitor daily and weekly performance across key paid media metrics including spend, revenue, ROAS, MER, CAC, CTR, CPC, CPM, CPA, CVR, and AOV
Analyze performance data to identify trends, issues, opportunities, and next steps
Work with Growth Strategists to align paid media execution with each client’s broader growth strategy
Work with creative team members to identify winning ads, creative fatigue, new testing needs, hooks, angles, and messaging opportunities
Provide clear recommendations for budget allocation, scaling, testing, and optimization
Support Google Ads execution across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, YouTube, and remarketing where applicable
Support Meta Ads execution across prospecting, retargeting, Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns, creative testing, and audience testing
Review product feeds, tracking, attribution, conversion data, and account setup to identify issues or improvement opportunities
Prepare performance updates, reporting notes, and insights for weekly client calls and internal reviews
Stay current on platform changes, best practices, and new opportunities across Meta Ads and Google Ads
Maintain strong organization across multiple client accounts, priorities, tests, and deadlines




Qualifications




3+ years of hands-on paid media experience managing Meta Ads and Google Ads
Strong experience working with Shopify-based eCommerce brands
Strong understanding of DTC customer acquisition and performance marketing
Experience managing paid media campaigns across Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads
Experience with Google Search, Shopping, Performance Max, remarketing, and campaign optimization
Experience with Meta campaign structure, creative testing, audience testing, retargeting, and Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns
Ability to analyze performance data and turn it into clear optimization decisions
Strong understanding of eCommerce metrics including revenue, ROAS, MER, CAC, AOV, LTV, CTR, CPC, CPM, CPA, CVR, and conversion rate
Experience managing paid media budgets across multiple client accounts
Strong attention to detail and ability to work inside ad accounts daily
Excellent written communication skills
Highly organized and able to manage multiple accounts, tests, priorities, and deadlines
Proactive, accountable, and comfortable taking ownership of performance
Comfortable working remotely with a distributed team




Nice to Have




Previous agency experience managing multiple eCommerce client accounts
Experience managing $100,000+ per month in paid media spend across Meta and Google
Experience with TikTok Ads, Pinterest Ads, YouTube Ads, or other paid media channels
Experience with Triple Whale, Northbeam, GA4, Looker Studio, Shopify Analytics, Klaviyo, ClickUp, or similar tools
Experience auditing ad accounts and identifying structural, tracking, creative, or scaling opportunities
Experience with creative strategy, UGC testing, landing page testing, and offer testing
Experience working with supplement, apparel, beauty, food/beverage, health, lifestyle, or other DTC eCommerce brands
Understanding of contribution margin, profitability, blended CAC, and full-funnel performance




Who You Are




You are analytical, proactive, and detail-oriented.
You enjoy working inside ad accounts, reviewing performance, identifying opportunities, and making clear decisions based on data.
You understand that strong paid media performance is not just about platform settings. It also depends on creative, offer, landing page, product, pricing, conversion rate, AOV, and retention.
You are comfortable managing multiple accounts and can stay organized without needing constant oversight.
You communicate clearly, take ownership, and care about helping clients grow profitably.
You are always looking for ways to improve performance, simplify account structure, test better creative, and make smarter budget decisions.

description:
About the job

We are PMG

Named Ad Age Best Places to Work for 11 years in a row and Fast Company Best Workplaces for Innovators since 2022, PMG is a global independent marketing services and technology company that seeks to inspire people and brands that anything is possible. Driven by shared success, PMG leverages business strategy and transformation, creative, media, and insights—as well as its proprietary operating system, Alli—to deliver cutting-edge digital solutions and innovative media strategies.

Our team comprises over 900 employees globally, and our work for ambitious brands like Apple, Nike, Sephora, Experian, Therabody, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, Creed Fragrances, BNY, Intuit, CKE Restaurants, Travelex, and Whole Foods spans 85+ countries.

Professional proficiency in written and spoken English is required, including for resume submission and interviews.

Who You Will Be Working With

At PMG, our Paid Search Marketing (SEM) team is a group of creative problem solvers and strategic thinkers who thrive on helping clients achieve meaningful results. We collaborate with cross-functional teams across media strategy, analytics, and creative to develop innovative paid search campaigns that make a tangible impact.

Our team approaches search marketing with curiosity and a fresh perspective, constantly exploring new solutions and opportunities to deliver value for our clients. We pride ourselves on creating an environment where everyone can grow professionally and personally, supported by a culture that values collaboration, innovation, and individuality.

As an SEM Senior Associate, you’ll play a critical role in shaping campaign performance, managing client goals, and contributing to broader strategic initiatives. If you’re passionate about digital marketing and enjoy solving challenges in a fast-paced environment, we’d love to welcome you to our team.

What You Will Do


Build and manage paid search campaigns, creating new campaigns and optimizing existing ones to meet client performance goals. 
Analyze and optimize campaign performance on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis, using data-driven insights to identify and act on opportunities for improvement. 
Execute and oversee search marketing campaigns, including ad group setup, keyword research and expansion, budget pacing, forecasting, and performance reporting. 
Test and refine campaign strategies, driving continuous improvement through creative testing and performance analysis. 
Contribute to budget management, monitoring spend across accounts and making recommendations to maximize results. 
Create and maintain detailed performance reports, pulling data from search platforms and additional sources to provide actionable insights. 
Stay informed on SEM industry trends, assessing their impact on clients and making proactive recommendations. 
Leverage PMG’s proprietary technology platform, Alli, to analyze data, streamline processes, and drive impactful results for clients. 


What You Will Bring


3+ years of experience in paid search, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience. 
Advanced knowledge of paid search platforms like Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, enabling you to create and optimize campaigns that deliver measurable results. 
Proficiency in campaign management, including keyword research, campaign, budget pacing, and forecasting to meet performance goals. 
Expertise in analyzing performance metrics and delivering actionable insights to enhance campaign outcomes. 
Experience with A/B testing methodologies and creative testing to refine strategies and drive continuous improvement. 
Proficiency in tools like Microsoft Excel, Google Analytics, and SQL to manage data, uncover valuable insights, and create clear, actionable performance reports. 
Strong organizational and collaborative skills, enabling you to align efforts across internal teams and clients effectively. 
A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a continual learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a customer-focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value. 
A dedication to people-focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by leading by example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel. 


What We Offer


Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support. 
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones. 
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events. 
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching. 
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses. 
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography. 
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances. 
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being. 
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available. 
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus. 
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities. 
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety. 


Benefits vary by country, location, and geography to reflect local laws, norms, and expectations.

What Sets Us Apart

Being part of PMG means joining a company culture that’s unmatched in digital. We're dedicated to working hard to serve our employees and clients, delivering value, results, and innovation—which often requires true grit and agility. We believe in taking care of ourselves and each other to continuously improve in every way.

In alignment with our core values to be inclusive and always change for the better, PMG is committed to creating a more diverse and inclusive culture, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe that we only change for the better by bringing diverse perspectives to our company. PMG recruits, employs, trains, compensates, and promotes regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

Temporary Assignment Notice

This is a temporary position expected to last approximately four (4) months and is intended to provide maternity leave coverage.

Employment opportunities for positions in the United States may require use of information which is subject to the export control regulations of the United States. Hiring decisions for such positions are required by law to be made in compliance with these regulations. Applicants for employment opportunities in other countries must be able to meet the comparable export control requirements of that country and of the United States.

Donaldson Company has been made aware that there are several recruiting scams that are targeting job seekers. These scams have attempted to solicit money for job applications and/or collect confidential information, Donaldson will never solicit money during the application or recruiting process. Donaldson only accepts online applications through our Careers | Donaldson Company, Inc. website and any communication from a Donaldson recruiter would be sent using a donaldson.com email address. If you have any questions about the legitimacy of an employment opportunity, please reach out to talentacquisition@donaldson.com to verify that the communication is from Donaldson.

Our policy is to provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified persons without regard to race, gender, color, disability, national origin, age, religion, union affiliation, sexual orientation, veteran status, citizenship, gender identity and/or expression, or other status protected by law.

skills: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
9 years of experience in marketing, with a focus on product, growth, performance and life-cycle marketing.

description:
About the job

Please submit your resume in English - we can only consider applications submitted in this language.

Only applications of candidates with Mexican citizenship will be evaluated for this role in compliance with the provisions of Article 7 of the Federal Labor Law.

Minimum qualifications:


Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
9 years of experience in marketing, with a focus on product, growth, performance and life-cycle marketing.
Experience defining and owning multi-year product and life-cycle marketing strategies using behavioral and measurement insights to develop multi-disciplinary road maps and business cases to grow direct-to-consumer businesses.
Experience managing cross-functional or cross-team projects.
Ability to communicate in Spanish and English fluently in order to communicate with stakeholders.


Preferred qualifications:


Experience in subscriptions marketing.
Experience building models and building business growth strategy and goals.
Ability to build global customer marketing programs, leading multidisciplinary teams to grow customer LTV and satisfaction.


About The Job

YouTube Marketing’s mission is to know our users, and to connect them to the magic of our products and creators. We make YouTube successful by shaping people’s perceptions of YouTube and inspiring them to engage with us. We’re also responsible for all of YouTube’s marketing activities to consumers, creators, and key opinion influencers.

In this role, you will drive sustainable, incremental paid subscriber growth and maximize customer lifetime value for YouTube Music and Premium. You will be responsible for the Paid Member life-cycle marketing programs, from on-boarding to churn prevention. Partnering across Marketing, Product, Engineering and UX, you will work with executive leaders to build the marketing execution infrastructure and measurement solutions that enhance the usefulness and effectiveness of communications. You will develop product marketing road maps to improve utilization, and deliver engaging, data-driven business cases to supercharge our re-acquisition multi-channel programs.

You will manage and develop a team of Product Marketing Managers across multiple sites, fostering a culture of psychological safety, continuous learning, and executional excellence. You will navigate complex global and regional matrices, acting as a mediator to ensure alignment on Objectives and Key Results (OKRs) and go-to-market execution.

Know the user. Know the magic. Connect the two. At its core, marketing at Google starts with technology and ends with the user, bringing both together in unconventional ways. Our job is to demonstrate how Google's products solve the world's problems--from the everyday to the epic, from the mundane to the monumental. And we approach marketing in a way that only Google can--changing the game, redefining the medium, making the user the priority, and ultimately, letting the technology speak for itself.

Responsibilities


Define the global YouTube Music & Premium Member marketing direction, creating a unified life-cycle strategy for marketing, product, engineering, UX and support teams to develop critical user journeys that maximize Customer Lifetime Value (LTV), minimize Churn, and supercharge win back programs.
Orchestrate sophisticated, contextual marketing campaigns that help Members discover features, nurture new consumption habits and reinforce personal value throughout their life-cycle leveraging own and operated channels.
Own the multi-channel win back growth and incentives marketing programs aiming to maximize the reactivation of lapsed Members.
Establish critical business metrics and measurement frameworks to evaluate Member health and satisfaction, maintain A/B experimentation road maps.
Lead and develop a multi-site team, anticipate and resolve life-cycle marketing challenges and influence multiple Director level stakeholders to define and deliver mutually beneficial solutions.



Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: SEO Specialist
skills: Driving organic traffic growth through on-page SEO, advanced keyword research, technical optimizations, and site structure improvements that produce measurable ranking results.
Using GA, GSC, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, and GBP to evaluate rankings, diagnose issues, and turn data into clear action plans.
Implementing internal linking, keyword cannibalization diagnoses, competitor analyses, website audits, and Local SEO and GEO strategies — including AI Overview and LLM visibility tactics.
Experimenting with new SEO approaches, challenging the status quo, and contributing to a team culture built on testing and evidence-based thinking.
Working directly with clients — communicating findings clearly and recommending the best path forward even when it challenges their assumptions.
3+ years of hands-on SEO experience — with demonstrated, proven ability to rank pages and websites. Theoretical knowledge is great but this team wants real results.
2+ years of client-facing agency experience — you manage expectations, communicate SEO concepts clearly, and uncover the real need behind every request.
Advanced proficiency with GA, GSC, GBP, Ahrefs, SEMrush, and Screaming Frog.
Ability to execute both short and long-term SEO strategies — and thrive in the uncertainty of an ever-changing algorithm landscape.
Strong analytical and independent problem-solving skills — you find patterns where others see noise.
Bonus: own website experience, digital PR or link building, WordPress/CMS, basic HTML/CSS, automotive or local SEO background.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.
💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 True ownership over strategy and execution — freedom to experiment and prove your ideas in a team that rewards curiosity over convention.
🏆 A collaborative, high-growth culture with access to SEO conferences, continuous learning, and a team that genuinely invests in making you better.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client with a clear path to growth from day one.

title: RSNA Expert - Marketing Specialist
description:
About the job

Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Overseas Exhibition Project Manager to oversee the comprehensive management of the entire process for international exhibitions, including the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) annual meeting. This role will lead exhibition planning, execution, vendor coordination, and client relationship management to ensure optimal brand presentation and participation outcomes at international events. Additionally, this position will serve as a key liaison for the company's digital accounts, collaborating closely with the marketing team to effectively convert offline exhibition traffic into online digital assets.




Position Responsibilities:

1. Exhibition Project Management (RSNA & Overseas Exhibitions)

· Manage the full lifecycle of planning and execution for the RSNA annual meeting and other overseas exhibitions, including booth reservation, exhibit material shipping, construction plan coordination, and on-site services.

· Maintain efficient communication with venues, external suppliers (construction, logistics, service providers) to ensure the smooth execution of all exhibition phases.

· Develop and manage project timelines and quality standards, ensuring critical milestones are met on schedule.

· Oversee on-site operations during exhibitions, including construction supervision, activity execution, and emergency handling.

· Possess thorough knowledge of RSNA rules and regulations to ensure exhibition behavior complies with organizer requirements and mitigates compliance risks.

2. Supplier and Budget Management

· Participate in the tendering, evaluation, and selection process for service suppliers (construction, logistics, PR, etc.), managing the Request for Proposals (RFP) process.

· Prepare and monitor exhibition project budgets, including booth fees, construction costs, shipping, travel expenses, etc., ensuring expenditures stay within budget and identifying cost-saving opportunities.

· Responsible for reviewing, archiving, and ensuring compliance for all exhibition-related contracts.

3. Client Relations and Sales Support

· Maintain efficient communication with exhibitors, providing professional services and on-site support.

· Nurture existing client relationships, identify potential client needs, and assist the sales team with registration and administrative processes.

· Collaborate with the digital marketing team to ensure sales leads generated during exhibitions are effectively entered into the CRM system (e.g., Salesforce) for data integration.

4. Cross-Cultural Communication & International Coordination

· Navigate cross-regional and cross-cultural work environments, building strong collaborative relationships with overseas organizers, service providers, and partners.

· Adapt to overseas travel requirements, leading teams to participate in RSNA and other international exhibitions, providing on-site support and problem-solving.

· Coordinate with internal departments (Marketing, Sales, Product, etc.) to ensure exhibition objectives align with the company's overall strategy.

5. Documentation and Reporting

· Organize, archive, and manage exhibition-related documents, including participation contracts, service agreements, and exhibition materials.

· Regularly prepare comprehensive post-exhibition summary reports, including effectiveness evaluation, ROI analysis, and recommendations for improvement

· Monitor industry trends and exhibition developments, providing data-driven insights and optimization suggestions for the company's exhibition strategy.




Required Skills & Education:

1. Education Background

· Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in International Business, Exhibition Management, Marketing, or a related field.

2. Work Experience

· Minimum 3 years of project management experience specifically with overseas exhibitions, having successfully led the preparation and execution of multiple international events.

· Experience with RSNA or other major medical/professional international exhibitions is highly preferred.

· Experience in domestic and international exhibition organization is preferred.

3. Professional Skills

· Proficient in the full cycle of exhibition project management, including planning, execution, and evaluation.

· Familiar with international trade practices and characteristics of overseas markets, possessing strong negotiation skills.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Asana).

· Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) is a plus.

· Experience in financial modeling and budget management is an advantage.

4. Language Ability

· Fluent in English with excellent listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills, capable of using English as a working language for business communication with international partners.

· Overseas work or study background is highly preferred.

5. Core Competencies

· Excellent communication, coordination, and execution skills, capable of building and maintaining strong collaborative relationships across departments and international teams.

· Strong project and time management skills, able to handle multiple tasks and emergencies simultaneously.

· High sense of responsibility and strong ability to work under pressure, adaptable to overseas travel and the high-intensity pace of exhibition work.

· Strong learning agility and market insight, capable of quickly grasping industry dynamics.

· Customer-oriented mindset with attention to detail and a pursuit of excellence in the industry’s exhibition experience.
